descriptive-ai.definitionSheetLabel: Descriptive AI (before was called traditional AI)
descriptive-ai.definitionText: Descriptive AI encompasses traditional AI approaches that analyze and interpret existing data to identify patterns, make predictions, and derive insights. This technology forms the foundation of practical AI applications in industry through machine learning, statistical analysis, and pattern recognition.

agentic-genai.definitionText: Generative AI and Agentic AI refers to AI systems that can create new content (text, images, code, synthetic data) and autonomously plan and execute multi-step actions to achieve goals. This technology leverages large language models and neural networks to generate novel outputs based on patterns learned from training data and complete tasks with reduced human supervision.

blockchain-decentralized-systems.definitionText: Blockchain technology enables secure, decentralized record-keeping and transactions without requiring central authority. It creates transparent, immutable records across distributed networks, supporting applications from cryptocurrency to supply chain tracking.

robotics-automation.definitionText: Robotics and Automation encompasses the design and deployment of physical and virtual systems that can perform tasks automatically with minimal human intervention. This includes industrial robots, autonomous systems, and process automation technologies.

quantum-computing.definitionText: Quantum Computing harnesses quantum mechanical phenomena like superposition and entanglement to perform computations. This technology enables exponentially faster calculations for specific problems, particularly in cryptography, material science, and complex system optimization.

Descriptive AI.name: Beijing Baidu Netcom Sci & Tech CO LTD

Quantum.name: Origin Quantum Computing Technology Hefei CO LTD

notes.Descriptive AI: Note: We see a very mixed crowd, hardware companies, data-native, and non-tech new challengers such as Toyota and Capital One.
notes.Blockchain: Note: On one hand, American financial institutions are heavily represented: Capital One, Bank of America and VIsa. On the other, we see a rise of Asian players with Samsung, Tencent and Huawei.
notes.Robotics: Note: Interestingly, Snap INC, famous for the social media app Snapchat, is one of the top applicants for this category, notably because they are patenting a lot around Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV).

Descriptive AI.name: Thinking Machines Lab
Descriptive AI.description: Thinking Machines Lab is an AI research and product company that aims to increase understanding and customization of AI systems.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Thinking Machines Lab is an artificial intelligence research and product company. It aims to make AI systems more widely understood, customizable, and generally capable. The company focuses on human-AI collaboration and building multimodal systems that adapt to various human expertise.

Descriptive AI.name: Wonderful
Descriptive AI.description: Wonderful develops software for deploying artificial intelligence agents in business operations and customer interactions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Wonderful develops software for deploying artificial intelligence agents in business operations and customer interactions. The platform allows companies to design, manage, and monitor AI agents that communicate through voice, chat, and email while integrating with internal enterprise systems and workflows. These agents handle tasks such as customer service inquiries, sales assistance, employee support, and operational processes across departments including finance, legal, procurement, and IT. Wonderful provides infrastructure for orchestrating agents across communication channels while supporting monitoring, evaluation, and continuous updates within production environments. The system also supports multilingual interactions and contextual understanding so agents can operate across different languages and cultural communication styles. Through this platform, Wonderful enables enterprises to incorporate AI-driven automation into routine interactions, service operations, and internal workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: Advanced Machine Intelligence
Descriptive AI.description: Advanced Machine Intelligence develops artificial intelligence systems that model real-world environments using sensor data.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Advanced Machine Intelligence develops artificial intelligence systems that model real-world environments using sensor data. The organization focuses on building machine learning architectures that form abstract representations of physical and digital environments, allowing systems to reason, predict outcomes, and plan sequences of actions. Its research includes world models that process continuous and complex data while filtering unpredictable elements to support structured decision making. The technology is designed to enable AI agents to evaluate the consequences of actions and operate under defined safety and control mechanisms. Advanced Machine Intelligence collaborates with industry and research communities to explore applications of these systems in areas such as industrial automation, robotics, wearable technology, and healthcare. The company also publishes research and develops software frameworks that support experimentation, deployment, and evaluation of intelligent systems.

Descriptive AI.name: Mind Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Mind Robotics develops artificial intelligence and robotics systems designed for industrial environments and manufacturing operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mind Robotics develops artificial intelligence and robotics systems designed for industrial environments and manufacturing operations. The company builds robotic platforms that combine physical hardware, machine learning models, and deployment infrastructure to enable robots to perform complex physical tasks on factory floors. Its technology focuses on robotic manipulation, object handling, component assembly, and other production activities that require dexterity and adaptation beyond traditional fixed automation systems. Mind Robotics trains its systems using operational manufacturing data to improve robot performance in variable tasks and real production workflows. The company’s platform supports integration with manufacturing processes where robots assist with activities such as parts handling, wiring assembly, and other labor-intensive industrial operations. Through these technologies, Mind Robotics develops tools that connect artificial intelligence with physical automation in industrial settings.

Descriptive AI.name: Axiom
Descriptive AI.description: Axiom Math AI develops artificial intelligence systems designed to solve complex mathematical problems and produce formally verified proofs.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Axiom Math AI develops artificial intelligence systems designed to solve complex mathematical problems and produce formally verified proofs. The platform processes mathematical questions written in natural language, converts them into formal proof structures, and applies automated reasoning to generate step-by-step solutions. Its system integrates modules that translate problems into formal languages, propose intermediate lemmas, and assemble proofs that are verified through proof-checking tools. The technology outputs explanations in formats such as plain text or LaTeX after verification, enabling researchers and technical users to review both reasoning and proof structures. The platform also ingests mathematical literature and research material to expand a structured knowledge base of verified theorems and relationships.

Descriptive AI.name: Project Prometheus
Descriptive AI.description: Project Prometheus is an artificial-intelligence company that builds systems for the physical economy.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Project Prometheus develops AI tools designed to learn from and interact with the physical world, rather than just process digital data. Its product efforts target engineering and manufacturing in aerospace, automotive, and computing sectors, using AI to optimize design, production, and performance.

Descriptive AI.name: Ricursive Intelligence
Descriptive AI.description: Ricursive Intelligence uses AI and computing to shorten semiconductor timelines through recursive cycles designing silicon for AI.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Ricursive Intelligence develops AI-driven systems that automate and optimize semiconductor design by creating a feedback loop where machine learning models design the next generation of chips, and those chips support more capable models. The company focuses on compressing traditional chip development processes by applying recursive AI techniques to tasks like layout, floorplanning, and verification to deliver ready-to-build chip designs. Its technology builds on methods used to design multiple generations of AI accelerator hardware, and it aims to enable closer co-evolution of compute and intelligence within the broader technology ecosystem. Ricursive Intelligence engages with enterprise partners to bring its platforms and tools into practical deployment.

Descriptive AI.name: Upscale AI
Descriptive AI.description: Upscale AI redefines networking with purpose-built solutions for high-performance compute.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Upscale AI is a high‑performance AI networking company accelerating AI democratization with open‑standard and full‑stack turnkey solutions.

Descriptive AI.name: humans&
Descriptive AI.description: humans& operates as a frontier artificial intelligence research and product lab focused on human-centered AI systems and interaction models.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: humans& designs and trains AI systems that emphasize human understanding, long-term reasoning, memory, and multi-agent collaboration to support how people and organizations work together. humans& integrates scientific research with applied product development, combining advances in reinforcement learning, behavioral modeling, and alignment with practical user interfaces. The organization develops AI technologies intended to strengthen coordination, decision-making, and communication across teams and communities.

Descriptive AI.name: Arena
Descriptive AI.description: Arena provides an online platform for evaluating and comparing AI models using real-world prompts and human feedback.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Arena provides an online platform that enables users and organizations to evaluate and compare artificial intelligence models through real-world prompts and human-driven feedback. The company’s services include side-by-side AI model interactions where responses are collected and ranked to reveal comparative performance across text, coding, and multimodal tasks. Arena supports contributions from major AI providers by showcasing model outputs before identities are revealed, and it captures user evaluations to inform model assessment. Its platform also offers tools for exploring AI behavior, generating insights on model strengths and limitations based on practical usage rather than static benchmarks.

Descriptive AI.name: Unconventional AI
Descriptive AI.description: Unconventional AI rethinks computer foundations to optimize energy efficiency for AI.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Unconventional AI develops a novel computing platform that rethinks how hardware and software interact to support artificial intelligence workloads with a focus on energy use and computational efficiency. The company works on integrating principles from biological neural systems into silicon-based circuits and related software interfaces to create a different substrate for running AI models. Its products and research aim to address the rising energy demands of AI by exploring non-traditional architectures that move beyond conventional digital simulation of neural networks. Unconventional AI also engages in early-stage development of prototypes and toolchains that support this new approach to AI computation.

Descriptive AI.name: Periodic Labs
Descriptive AI.description: Periodic Labs develops artificial intelligence systems that simulate and predict the properties of materials using machine learning.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Periodic Labs develops artificial intelligence systems that simulate and predict the properties of materials using machine learning. The company applies computational models to support the discovery and design of materials used in sectors such as energy, electronics, and infrastructure. It builds tools that aim to reduce the time and cost associated with traditional research and development processes. Periodic Labs uses AI to analyze large-scale scientific data and collaborates with academic and industry partners to support material science research.

Descriptive AI.name: Flapping Airplanes
Descriptive AI.description: Flapping Airplanes is an artificial intelligence research lab that focuses on advancing foundational AI technologies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Flapping Airplanes is an artificial intelligence research lab that focuses on advancing foundational AI technologies with an emphasis on data-efficient model development and fundamental research into next-generation learning approaches. The organization’s work centers on exploring alternative training paradigms that reduce dependency on massive datasets and compute scale, aiming to enable systems that learn with efficiency more akin to human cognition rather than brute-force training methods. Its team includes researchers and technical experts pursuing long-horizon scientific challenges in AI architecture, training mechanisms, and algorithmic innovation. Flapping Airplanes engages with investors and collaborators to support its research agenda, backing efforts that expand the theoretical and practical frontiers of artificial intelligence without immediate commercial product constraints. While the lab operates primarily as a research-first initiative, its findings are intended to inform future applications in areas such as enterprise AI, robotics, scientific discovery, and decision systems. The company’s strategy reflects a shift away from traditional scale-focused AI development toward exploring deep, principled advances in learning efficiency and model capabilities.

Descriptive AI.name: Playlist
Descriptive AI.description: Playlist is the parent company that operates various physical and mental fitness tech companies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Playlist is the parent brand uniting Mindbody, Booker, and ClassPass—industry leaders powering experience-driven businesses in fitness, wellness, lifestyle, and more. With a growing suite of AI-driven SaaS and consumer tools, Playlist empowers people to discover and book joyful, meaningful experiences that inspire movement in daily life.

Descriptive AI.name: Tala Health
Descriptive AI.description: Tala Health is a digital-first healthcare provider that offers AI-driven clinical support for diagnostic triage and care coordination.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Tala Health is a developer of personalized healthcare technology aimed at providing quality expert opinions accessible to anyone, anytime, anywhere. Its platform lets users interact with a proprietary AI agent online to receive prompt, personalized health assessments, after which the system connects them with clinicians, labs, or testing facilities as needed. Whether addressing routine health concerns or urgent medical issues, the clinical staff and intelligent AI agents collaborate to efficiently diagnose and treat diseases through both virtual and in-person interactions. This approach enables patients to gain confidence and insight, allowing them to make informed decisions about the next steps in their medical care.

Descriptive AI.name: Advanced Digital Gaming Technology
Descriptive AI.description: Advanced Digital Gaming Technology (ADGT) is a UAE-based fintech unicorn providing B2B payments infrastructure for regulated gaming markets.

Descriptive AI.name: Zhijian Power
Descriptive AI.description: Zhijian Power is a high-tech enterprise specializing in the research and development of intelligent driving technology.

Descriptive AI.name: NIO GeniTech
Descriptive AI.description: NIO GeniTech is a chip development company that focuses on intelligent driving chip development and related technologies and delivers computational power equivalent to four mainstream smart driving chips

Descriptive AI.name: 01.AI
Descriptive AI.description: 01.AI is developing a language model for the Chinese market that enhances productivity, creating significant economic and societal value.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: 01.AI is developing a language model for the Chinese market that enhances productivity, creating significant economic and societal value. The team behind 01.AI firmly believes that the new AI 2.0, driven by foundation model breakthroughs, is revolutionizing technology, platforms, and applications at all levels. They predict that AI 2.0 will create a platform opportunity ten times larger than the mobile internet, rewriting all software and user interfaces.

Descriptive AI.name: 1KMXC
Descriptive AI.description: 1KMXC is a high-tech research and development company for artificial intelligence robot solutions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: 1KMXC is a high-tech research and development company for artificial intelligence robot solutions. The company provides robotic car wash service that covers many provinces and cities across China. It has obtained Alibaba investment with a financing amount of over 100 million.

Descriptive AI.name: 6sense
Descriptive AI.description: 6sense is an account-based marketing platform that helps B2B organizations achieve predictable revenue growth.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: 6sense reinvents the way organizations create, manage, and convert pipelines to revenue. 6sense Revenue AI captures anonymous buying signals, targets the right accounts, and recommends the channels and messages to boost revenue performance. Removing guesswork, friction, and wasted sales effort, 6sense empowers sales, marketing, and customer success teams to significantly improve pipeline quality, accelerate sales velocity, increase conversion rates, and grow revenue predictably.

Descriptive AI.name: AA-I Technologies
Descriptive AI.description: AA-I Technologies is an AI company that develops systems intended to accelerate scientific discovery across multiple disciplines.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AA-I Technologies' research team spans computer science, mathematics, physics, and biology, enabling the creation of models designed to analyze complex scientific problems and generate new insights. The company focuses on building AI capable of supporting breakthroughs in areas where traditional research methods face limitations.

Descriptive AI.name: Abnormal AI
Descriptive AI.description: Abnormal AI is the leading AI-native human behavior security platform.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Abnormal AI is the leading AI-native human behavior security platform, leveraging machine learning to stop sophisticated inbound attacks and detect compromised accounts across email and connected applications.

Descriptive AI.name: Abridge
Descriptive AI.description: Abridge is an AI-driven platform that transforms patient-clinician conversations into structured clinical notes for healthcare industries.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Abridge provides an AI platform that transforms patient-clinician conversations into structured, billable clinical notes. This technology aims to reduce documentation burdens for clinicians and nurses. The system integrates into existing healthcare workflows and electronic health record systems.

Descriptive AI.name: Ada
Descriptive AI.description: Ada is an automated customer experience company that provides chat bots used in customer support.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Ada is a computer software company that features a chatbot-based platform that helps enterprise businesses to automate customer experience. Its platform operates through both web and mobile machine learning engine that reduces support volume and empowers customers to find answers on their own. The company was founded in 2016 and headquartered in Toronto in Canada.

Descriptive AI.name: Adept AI
Descriptive AI.description: Adept AI is a machine learning research platform that develops AI systems that enable human-computer collaboration.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Adept AI is a research and product AI lab that automates software processes for developers. It's similar to robotic process automation (RPA), or software robots that use a combination of automation, computer vision, and machine learning to automate repetitive tasks like filing forms and responding to emails. Adept is creating general intelligence by allowing humans and computers to collaborate creatively.

Descriptive AI.name: Advance Intelligence Group
Descriptive AI.description: Advance Intelligence Group is a financial technology firm that offers an ecosystem of AI-powered, credit-enabled products and services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Advance Intelligence Group is a financial technology firm that builds an ecosystem of AI-powered, credit-enabled products, and services. Founded in 2016, it leverages innovative technology and partnerships to build an ecosystem of products and services serving consumers, enterprises, and merchants.

Descriptive AI.name: Afiniti
Descriptive AI.description: Afiniti leverages artificial intelligence to improve customer experiences and drive better business outcomes.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Afiniti uses patented artificial intelligence technology to pair customers and contact center agents based on how well they are likely to interact. finiti focuses on delivering customer experience (CX) AI solutions that improve business outcomes by optimizing interactions and enhancing conversation quality. Its technology is used globally in healthcare, telecommunications, travel, hospitality, insurance, and banking.

Descriptive AI.name: Agibot
Descriptive AI.description: Agibot creates humanoid robots for real-world tasks and multi-robot collaboration.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Agibot develops humanoid robots designed to perform various real-world tasks using artificial intelligence. The company focuses on creating robots that can engage in fine-grained manipulation and collaborate with other robots in diverse scenarios. AgiBot's products aim to enhance the efficiency of operations across multiple industries by integrating advanced robotic capabilities. The company continuously explores new applications for its technology, contributing to the evolution of robotics in everyday environments. Through its innovative approach, AgiBot addresses the growing demand for automation and intelligent systems in the workforce.

Descriptive AI.name: Agile Robots AG
Descriptive AI.description: Agile Robots is an intelligent robot system development and application service provider.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Agile Robots is an intelligent robot system development and application service provider, dedicated to the development and application of intelligent robot systems. The core products include 7-degree-of-freedom lightweight arm and general-purpose robot controller. , robot vision system, etc.

Descriptive AI.name: AI21 Labs
Descriptive AI.description: AI21 Labs develops AI systems designed to understand and generate natural language with high accuracy.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AI21 Labs is a creator of generative artificial intelligence and massive language models, as well as tools for creating artificial intelligence systems with extraordinary understanding and generation of natural language. The company's tool captures real intelligence and rewrites writing to say exactly what is meant; it transforms the way people read and write, empowering them in the process; it is an artificial intelligence-based writing companion that understands context and meaning; and it helps people read more efficiently by providing summaries, allowing customers to understand, analyze, and visualize abstract knowledge structures.

Descriptive AI.name: Aibee
Descriptive AI.description: Aibee is an AI startup that develops speech recognition, big data analysis, and natural language processing technologies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Aibee is an AI startup that develops speech recognition, big data analysis, and natural language processing technologies. Founded by Dr. Yuanqing LIN in November 2017, Aibee is China’s leading AI startup providing AI total solutions and its mission is to empower and upgrade vertical industries with AI. At Aibee, they are working to perfect AI technologies for each industry by building total AI solutions that allow closing the loop among data, algorithms, technologies, and products/services. Aibee applies the most advanced and innovative AI technologies (computer vision, speech recognition, natural language understanding, big data analytics, robotics, etc.) to transform efficiency, productivity, and business value of their target vertical industries by gaining a deep understanding of pain points, needs and objectives of their clients as well as by creating new business opportunities.

Descriptive AI.name: Aiven
Descriptive AI.description: Aiven is a technology-driven company that enables businesses to manage an open-source data infrastructure in the cloud.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Aiven is a technology-driven company that enables businesses to manage an open-source data infrastructure in the cloud. Headquartered in Helsinki with offices in Berlin, Sydney, Toronto, and Boston, Aiven provides managed open-source data technologies, like PostgreSQL, Kafka, and M3, on all major clouds. It enables its customers to drive business results from open-source that trigger true transformations far beyond their own backyards.

Descriptive AI.name: AIWAYS
Descriptive AI.description: AIWAYS is a manufacturer of smart electric car, based in Shanghai.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AIWAYS is a maker of smart electric car, based in Shanghai. AIWAYS' two core technologies are electric drive and artificial intelligence. It covers the three major areas of travel services, automobile retail, and energy operation.

Descriptive AI.name: Alation
Descriptive AI.description: Alation is a data intelligence platform for banks, retailers, and government agencies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Alation is incorporated in enterprise data intelligence solutions including data search & discovery, data governance, data stewardship, analytics, and digital transformation.  Alation’s initial offering dominates the data catalog market. Thanks to its powerful Behavioral Analysis Engine, inbuilt collaboration capabilities, and open interfaces, Alation combines machine learning with human insight to successfully tackle even the most demanding challenges in data and metadata management. Alation was established on December 12, 2012 by Aaron Kalb, Satyen Sangani, Venky Ganti, and Feng Niu in Redwood City, California.

Descriptive AI.name: AlphaSense
Descriptive AI.description: AlphaSense is a platform harnessing AI to deliver insights, helping professionals make informed, impactful decisions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AlphaSense is a market intelligence platform that allows professionals to make critical decisions with confidence and speed. The company has nearly 2,000 enterprise clients, including financial institutions that use the platform to inform their business decisions. AlphaSense is trusted by over 1,800 enterprise customers, including a majority of the S&P 500.

Descriptive AI.name: Ambience Healthcare
Descriptive AI.description: Ambience Healthcare develops an AI operating system used for documentation, coding, and clinical workflows in healthcare organizations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Ambience Healthcare develops an AI operating system used for documentation, coding, and clinical workflows in healthcare settings. The company builds an AI medical scribe that captures clinician-patient conversations in real time and converts them into clinical notes. Its scribe tool includes speech recognition, real-time documentation, and AI features designed to integrate with electronic medical record systems. The tool generates notes within seconds and allows customization based on user preferences.

Descriptive AI.name: Amperity
Descriptive AI.description: Amperity is an Intelligent Customer Data Platform that empowers global consumer brands by unlocking all their customer data.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Amperity’s mission is to help people use data to serve the customer. They are revolutionizing the way companies connect, identify, and understand their customers by leveraging artificial intelligence to deliver a truly comprehensive and actionable Customer 360. This view improves marketing performance, fuels accurate customer insights, and enables world-class customer experiences. With Amperity, technical teams are freed from endless integration and data management, and business teams have direct access to the comprehensive data they need to build long-term customer loyalty and drive growth. Amperity serves many of the world’s most loved brands.

Descriptive AI.name: Anaconda
Descriptive AI.description: Anaconda is an open-source distribution of the Python and R programming languages for data science that simplifies package management.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Anaconda helps organizations simplify, safeguard, and accelerate AI with open source at scale. The Anaconda Platform bridges the gap between experimentation and production, giving teams the speed they need to innovate alongside the security and governance enterprises require. Over 50 million users and 95% of the Fortune 500 trust Anaconda for data science and AI development. With 21+ billion downloads across a decade of growth, Anaconda operates across hybrid AI environments and cloud platforms including AWS, Databricks, and Snowflake. Learn more at anaconda.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Andalusia Labs
Descriptive AI.description: Andalusia Labs is an applied research lab building internet-native economic infrastructure.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Andalusia Labs is an applied research lab building internet-native economic infrastructure.

Descriptive AI.name: Anduril Industries
Descriptive AI.description: Anduril Industries is a defense technology company that specializes in developing advanced autonomous systems to enhance national security.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Anduril Industries designs and supplies autonomous defense systems and integrated software for security and military applications. The company develops an AI-driven command-and-control platform that links sensors, unmanned vehicles across air, land, and sea, and related hardware into a cohesive operational network. Its portfolio covers unmanned aerial vehicles, counter-drone technology, undersea autonomous vehicles, and autonomous ISR (intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance) platforms. Anduril also builds mission support software that helps users fuse sensor data and manage operations in real time. The company serves defense, national security, and government clients with technology solutions that emphasize autonomous operation and data integration. Andurils' mission is to develop innovative technology that enables America and its allies to maintain global leadership now and into the future.

Descriptive AI.name: Anthropic
Descriptive AI.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that builds reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Anthropic conducts AI research and develops AI products, including the Claude AI model family. The company focuses on building AI for human well-being, emphasizing safety in its research, policy work, and product design. Anthropic offers various Claude models, such as Opus and Sonnet, for AI-powered applications and custom experiences, supporting coding and AI agents.

Descriptive AI.name: Anyscale
Descriptive AI.description: Anyscale accelerates the development and productionization of any AI app, on any cloud, at any scale.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Anyscale provides an application development platform for developers to build distributed applications. The platform is based on an open-source framework that enables software developers to easily write compute-intensive applications by simplifying the hardware decisions made. Anyscale was founded in 2019 and headquartered in  Berkeley, California.

Descriptive AI.name: Anysphere
Descriptive AI.description: Anysphere is an applied research lab focused on automating coding through innovative AI solutions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Anysphere is an applied research lab focused on automating coding processes. The company develops software and models to create a human-AI programmer, aiming for a significant increase in programming effectiveness. This hybrid approach allows for faster iteration and control over complex codebases.

Descriptive AI.name: Apollo.io
Descriptive AI.description: Building the industry’s first fully agentic GTM platform, transforming how revenue teams execute
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Apollo.io is the company behind the industry’s first fully agentic GTM platform, transforming how revenue teams execute. Going beyond automation, Apollo’s intelligent agents actively drive results across the entire sales funnel - from prospecting to deal management - all in one place. Trusted by millions of users and more than 550K companies, including Autodesk and Cyera, Apollo is making world-class go-to-market simple, intelligent, and accessible for all.  Visit apollo.io to learn more.

Descriptive AI.name: Applied Intuition
Descriptive AI.description:
Applied Intuition provides software infrastructure to safely develop, test, and deploy autonomous vehicles
 at scale.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Applied Intuition is the vehicle intelligence company that accelerates the global adoption of safe, AI-driven machines. Founded in 2017 and now valued at $15 billion following its recent Series F funding round, Applied Intuition delivers the Vehicle OS, Self-Driving System, and toolchain to help customers build intelligent vehicles and shorten time to market. 18 of the top 20 global automakers and major programs across the Department of Defense trust Applied Intuition's solutions to deliver vehicle intelligence. Applied Intuition services the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining, and agriculture industries and is headquartered in Mountain View, CA, with offices in Washington, D.C., San Diego, CA, Ft. Walton Beach, FL, Ann Arbor, MI, London, Stuttgart, Munich, Stockholm, Bangalore, Seoul, and Tokyo.

Descriptive AI.name: AppsFlyer
Descriptive AI.description: AppsFlyer is a data analytics company that provides deep linking and fraud protection technologies to help brands make business decisions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AppsFlyer helps brands make good choices for their business and their customers with its advanced measurement, data analytics, deep linking, engagement, fraud protection, data clean room and privacy-preserving technologies. Built on the idea that brands can increase customer privacy while providing exceptional experiences, AppsFlyer empowers thousands of creators and 10,000+ technology partners to create better, more meaningful customer relationships. To learn more, visit www.appsflyer.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Apptronik
Descriptive AI.description: Apptronik is a robotics company that designs and builds humanoid robots for various real-world applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Apptronik develops humanoid robots designed to operate alongside human workers and assist with physical tasks. The company focuses on creating general-purpose robotic systems that combine hardware, software, and AI to perform activities such as material handling, case picking, palletizing, and machine tending in industrial and logistics environments. Its flagship product, the Apollo humanoid, is engineered to navigate spaces built for people and interact with existing tools and infrastructure. Apptronik also integrates robotic solutions through service and ownership models to support operational workflows. The company partners with technology and industrial firms to advance robot capabilities and real-world deployment.

Descriptive AI.name: ASAPP
Descriptive AI.description: Breakthroughs are born out of research and ASAPP is advancing AI to drive greater human productivity and automating the world's workflows
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: ASAPP AI Native® products, driven by advances in fundamental AI research, make organizations highly productive and effective by augmenting human activity and automating the world’s workflows. The ASAPP Customer Experience Performance (CXP) platform provides Contact Center customer care and sales agents with a platform to know the right thing to say and the right action to take, in real-time.  The ASAPP machine learning models are continuously learning and predicting from every customer interaction, effectively turning every agent into the best agent without the need for manual programming or extensive training. Many of the world’s largest companies in telecom, financial services, and travel use the solution. The company has offices in New York, Silicon Valley, London and Buenos Aires.

Descriptive AI.name: Attentive
Descriptive AI.description: Attentive is a personalized mobile messaging platform that facilitates businesses with AI powered SMS and e-mail marketing solutions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Attentive is the leader in conversational commerce, reinventing business to consumer communication. The SMS-first software platform helps everyone from entrepreneurs to enterprises strengthen relationships with their consumers in a new way.

Descriptive AI.name: Augury
Descriptive AI.description: Augury develops AI-driven solutions for monitoring machine health and process efficiency in industrial operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Augury develops AI-driven solutions for monitoring machine health and process efficiency in industrial operations. Its technology analyzes data from manufacturing equipment to detect potential failures, optimize performance, and reduce downtime. The company’s platform integrates with existing systems to provide real-time insights into operational conditions. Augury works with manufacturers across various industries to improve productivity and minimize resource waste.

Descriptive AI.name: Aura
Descriptive AI.description: Aura provides AI-powered security solutions that offer identity theft protection, credit monitoring, and online privacy for individuals.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Aura is an information technology company dedicated to creating a safer internet for everyone. People are doing more online than ever, but as our lives get more connected, it's hard to know what’s safe. Aura believes people should be able to live their digital lives with peace of mind. Its mission is to create a safer internet by making comprehensive digital security simple to understand and easy to use so everyone can stay safe online.

Descriptive AI.name: Automation Anywhere
Descriptive AI.description: Automation Anywhere is a digital workforce platform that provides end-to-end automation solutions and business processes.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Automation Anywhere is a global company that specialises in Robotic Process Automation, offering AI-powered software bots that automate repetitive tasks. The company's cloud-native platform integrates RPA, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and analytics to enhance productivity, customer experience, and employee engagement.

Descriptive AI.name: Avathon
Descriptive AI.description: Avathon is an AI technology startup operating a machine learning software to analyze increasingly complex data stores.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Avathon is an artificial intelligence technology startup that builds AI technology solutions for industrial applications. A highly awarded company recognized for cutting-edge technology, Avathon develops AI-Powered cyber-physical software for the safety, security, and reliability of IT, OT, and the IoT.  The company's technology is capable of harnessing real-time sensor data and learning from it continuously, allowing for more accurate risk mitigation and prevention policies to intervene and avert disasters. Avathon cognitive software, DeepArmor, is utilized to prevent and detect malware with a high level of accuracy and efficacy by using advanced machine learning and artificial intelligence. They help customers analyze complex data, empower decision making, and transform human and industrial productivity with award-winning machine learning technology and expert teams focused on defense, IIoT, and finance.

Descriptive AI.name: Avride
Descriptive AI.description: Avride is a developer and operator of autonomous vehicles and delivery robots.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Avride develops autonomous vehicles and delivery robots. It offers self-driving cars that use proprietary hardware, including lidars, cameras, and radars to navigate complex urban and rural conditions. The company also provides four-wheeled delivery robots designed to operate on sidewalks and crossings with sensor sets for object detection and safe navigation. Its systems enable integration into client workflows with autonomous mobility and logistics capabilities.

Descriptive AI.name: Ayar Labs
Descriptive AI.description: Ayar Labs develops optical I/O solutions for large-scale AI workloads to accelerate data movement within AI systems.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Ayar Labs develops a monolithic in-package optical I/O (MIPO) solution for applications that require high bandwidth, low latency, and power-efficient short-reach interconnects. The company disrupts the traditional performance, cost, and efficiency curves of the semiconductor and computing industries by driving improvement in interconnect bandwidth density at lower power. Its patented approach uses industry-standard cost-effective silicon processing techniques to develop high speed, high density, low power optical-based interconnect “chiplets” and lasers to replace traditional electrical-based I/O. Ayar’s flagship product is a chip called TeraPhy that implements its optical technology on compact silicon die. The chip can be integrated directly into a central processing unit, graphics card, or another processor to give it optical data transmission capabilities.

Descriptive AI.name: Baichuan Intelligence
Descriptive AI.description: Baichuan Intelligence develops general artificial intelligence services to build large model bases.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Baichuan Intelligence develops general artificial intelligence services to build large model bases. The company's mission is to create a Chinese version of the OpenAI basic model and disruptive upper-level applications and enhance language AI in search, multi-modal, education, medical, and other aspects.

Descriptive AI.name: Baseten
Descriptive AI.description: Baseten is an AI infrastructure company that integrates machine learning into business operations, production, and processes.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Baseten is a serverless backend that offers a fast way to build machine-learning-powered applications with auto-scaling, GPU access, CRON jobs, and serverless functions. Data science and machine learning teams can use Baseten to build applications without prior knowledge of backend, frontend, or MLOps, allowing for faster, smarter decision-making at their organizations. Baseten is on a mission to make machine learning available to all organizations.

Descriptive AI.name: Beacon Software
Descriptive AI.description: Beacon Software is a holding company that specializes in the acquisition of software businesses.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Beacon Software is a holding company that specializes in the acquisition of software businesses.

Descriptive AI.name: Bedrock Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Bedrock Robotics enables the construction sector to grow at the rate that modern civilization requires.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Bedrock Robotics delivers enhanced autonomy to the built environment, allowing the construction sector to build at the rate that today's society requires.

Descriptive AI.name: BetterUp
Descriptive AI.description: BetterUp provides AI and human coaching to improve leadership, management, and employee performance across organizations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: BetterUp provides AI and human coaching through its platform, offering leadership, manager, resilience, and employee development programs. It uses behavioral science to align workforce performance with organizational goals and support professional growth. The platform delivers tools for coaching, training, and development to enhance productivity, leadership effectiveness, and employee well-being.

Descriptive AI.name: BigID
Descriptive AI.description: BigID is a data intelligence company that helps organizations discover, manage, and protect sensitive information.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: BigID develops software that helps companies have secure customer data and satisfy privacy regulations. It uses advanced machine learning and identity intelligence to help enterprises better protect their customer and employee data at a petabyte scale. The company helps organizations manage and protect their customer data, meet data privacy and protection regulations like the CCPA and GDPR, and leverage unmatched coverage for all data across all data stores. BigID aims to give enterprises the software to safeguard and steward customer data, by bringing data science to data privacy. BigID has offices in the US and Israel and is founded in 2016 by security industry veterans spanning the identity, data security, big data, and governance markets.

Descriptive AI.name: Black Forest Labs
Descriptive AI.description: Black Forest Labs develops advanced generative deep learning models that focus on producing and transforming visual content.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Black Forest Labs develops advanced generative deep learning models that focus on producing and transforming visual content such as images and videos. The company offers the FLUX model suite, which includes versions designed for high-detail image creation, developer experimentation, and fast local generation. Its models use a hybrid architecture that combines diffusion and transformer techniques, allowing them to generate images from text prompts or edit existing visuals through image-to-image workflows. Black Forest Labs distributes these models through a managed API that enables product teams to embed visual generation into applications and digital platforms. The company also provides open-weight versions so developers and researchers can run, customize, or fine-tune models in their preferred environments. Its technology is adopted by creative software providers and media tools that integrate FLUX into editing, design, or content-creation pipelines. Black Forest Labs continues to expand its platform toward broader visual-intelligence infrastructure, including planned capabilities for video generation and advanced media workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: Bluecore
Descriptive AI.description: Bluecore is an e-commerce platform that connects casual shoppers to the products.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Bluecore is a Multi-Channel Marketing Platform that uses predictive intelligence to trigger, prioritize, and personalize retail marketing. By unifying, scoring, and activating consumer, behavior, and product data in one platform, Bluecore paints a comprehensive picture of each shopper and their historical,  and most uniquely, anticipated relationship with brand products and experiences. Today, Bluecore manages nearly 500 million shopper IDs and a cumulative product catalog second only to Amazon.

Descriptive AI.name: Brevo
Descriptive AI.description: Brevo is a developer of a cloud-based digital marketing platform used to build strong customer relationships.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Brevo is a developer of a cloud-based digital marketing platform used to meet the demand of businesses to engage with customers. Its platform encompasses the entire chain, from the creation of a newsletter to analysis and reporting tools to targeting modules that enable businesses, eCommerce sellers, and agencies to build customer relationships through digital marketing campaigns, transactional messaging, and marketing automation. Unlike other marketing solutions built for enterprise-level budgets and expertise, Sendinblue tailors its all-in-one suite to suit the marketing needs of growing SMBs in tough markets. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Paris, France.

Descriptive AI.name: ByteDance
Descriptive AI.description: ByteDance is a technology company that develops content creation platforms and services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: ByteDance creates and operates various content platforms, including TikTok and Douyin, enabling users to connect, create, and consume content. The company focuses on enriching lives through innovative technology and has expanded its offerings to include tools for content creation and collaboration.

Descriptive AI.name: Canva
Descriptive AI.description: Canva is an online design and visual communication platform that provides design tools for non-designers.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Canva is a graphic design software solutions provider that helps users design presentations, social media graphics, and more with various layouts, images, photo filters, icons and shapes, and fonts. The platform combines a drag-and-drop design tool with a stock library of photographs, illustrations, and imagery. It helps users believe they don't need to understand complex software to unlock their creativity.

Descriptive AI.name: CAST AI
Descriptive AI.description: CAST AI is the leading Kubernetes automation platform that cuts AWS, Azure, and GCP customers’ cloud costs by over 50%
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: CAST AI is the leading Kubernetes automation platform that cuts AWS, Azure, and GCP customers’ cloud costs by over 50%.  CAST AI goes beyond monitoring clusters and making recommendations. The platform utilizes advanced machine learning algorithms to analyze and automatically optimize clusters in real time, reducing customers’ cloud costs, improving performance and security, and boosting DevOps and engineering productivity.

Descriptive AI.name: Celonis
Descriptive AI.description: Celonis provides an execution management system that helps companies in running their business processes.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Celonis believes that every company can unlock its full execution capacity. Powered by its market-leading process mining core, the Celonis Execution Management System provides a set of instruments and applications, the Celonis Studio as well as platform capabilities for business executives and users. The Celonis EMS offerings help companies manage every facet of execution management from analytics to strategy and planning, management, actions, and automation.

Descriptive AI.name: Cera
Descriptive AI.description: Cera is Europe’s largest provider of digital-first home healthcare
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Founded in 2016, Cera is is Europe’s largest provider of digital-first home healthcare, harnessing technology to bring care directly to homes, providing higher quality services at a fraction of the cost. Cera’s 10,000+ carers and nurses provide 60,000 in-person appointments a day, delivering high quality tech-enabled care to the people who need it most.  Cera has also gathered one of the largest home healthcare datasets globally, powering the development of cutting-edge AI products that have reduced hospitalisations by up to 70%. Cera’s pioneering approach has been recognised by numerous industry awards including Home Care Awards’ Most Outstanding Home Care Provider, a top-ten position in Deloitte Fast 50 for three consecutive years, and the prestigious Great British Entrepreneur of the Year award in 2023. Cera was co-founded by entrepreneur, physician and policy expert Dr Ben Maruthappu MBE. Its Advisory Board is Chaired by Sir David Behan, the former CEO of the Care Quality Commission.

Descriptive AI.name: Cerebras Systems
Descriptive AI.description: Cerebras Systems is an AI computing system company that provides deep learning applications, super computing, and cloud services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cerebras Systems focuses on creating innovative computing systems specifically designed to accelerate deep learning tasks. The company combines expertise in computer architecture and machine learning to build a new class of computer systems that enhance AI performance. By leveraging unique design principles, Cerebras aims to transform the future of AI work through its groundbreaking technology.

Descriptive AI.name: Chai Discovery
Descriptive AI.description: Chai Discovery develops artificial intelligence models that predict and reprogram biochemical molecule interactions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Chai Discovery develops artificial intelligence models that predict and reprogram biochemical molecule interactions to support drug discovery and molecular design. The company offers AI-driven platforms, including foundation models for molecular structure prediction and antibody design, that allow researchers and organizations to generate and assess novel molecules based on target inputs rather than extensive empirical screening. Its technology is applied to design antibodies and other molecular candidates with desired properties to help accelerate research and therapeutic development workflows. Chai Discovery partners with scientific and pharmaceutical teams to integrate its AI tools into discovery pipelines and expand access to computational design capabilities.

Descriptive AI.name: Character.ai
Descriptive AI.description: Character.aiprovides open-ended conversational applications in which users create characters and converse with them.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Character.ai provides open-ended conversational applications in which users create characters and converse with them. The company aims to create dialogue agents with a broad range of uses in entertainment, instruction, general question-answering, and other areas. The business specializes in neural language models, which can be used as tools for creativity, idea generation, language learning, and a variety of other tasks. Users can access dialogue agents that are propelled by in-house technology.

Descriptive AI.name: Checkr
Descriptive AI.description: Checkr is a software company that provides background screening and workforce monitoring services for businesses.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Checkr is a software company that provides background screening and workforce monitoring services for businesses. Its platform includes features such as criminal record checks, employment and education verifications, driving record assessments, drug testing, and international screenings. Employers can initiate background checks through a dashboard, selecting screening packages tailored to specific job requirements. The process involves candidates providing necessary information and consent, with both parties able to track progress via the platform. Checkr's services are utilized by companies across various industries, including gig economy platforms and traditional employers. The company emphasizes compliance with relevant hiring laws and aims to streamline the screening process through technology,

Descriptive AI.name: Clari
Descriptive AI.description: Clari is a revenue operations company that provides end-to-end sales analytics and a forecasting platform.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Clari is a connected revenue operations platform that uses automation and AI to unlock all the activity data captured in key business systems such as marketing automation, CRM, email, calendar, phone, content management, conversations, and more. Clari automatically aligns that data to accounts and opportunities, to deliver visibility, forecasting, and apply predictive insights, which results in more insight, less guesswork, and more predictable revenue. Clari helps companies by changing their revenue operations to be more connected, efficient, and predictable. Clari's platform is used by hundreds of sales, marketing, and customer success teams at B2B companies such as Qualtrics, Lenovo, Adobe, Dropbox, and Okta to control pipelines, audit deals and accounts, forecast the business, and reduce churn.

Descriptive AI.name: Clarify Health Solutions
Descriptive AI.description: Clarify Health Solutions develops an intelligence platform that delivers insights across healthcare.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Clarify Health enables health systems to deliver more satisfying and efficient care through a software and analytics platform that provides real-time insights and nudges to patients, family members, and clinicians. The solution optimizes episode of care workflows. Real-time tracking and machine learning analytics guide patients through dynamically-updated care journeys. Patients and family members benefit from greater transparency, personalization, and engagement. Clinicians can focus on the highest need patients while the platform streamlines workflows and simplifies tasks.

Descriptive AI.name: Clay
Descriptive AI.description: Clay is an AI-driven sales and marketing company that equips growth and sales teams with customer data and automated workflows.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Clay provides a platform for go-to-market teams to use unique data and AI. The platform offers access to over 100 data providers for contact information, firmographics, and other data points. It also includes an AI research agent to automate manual research and create flexible workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: ClickHouse
Descriptive AI.description: ClickHouse provides an open-source database system for real-time analytical reporting.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: ClickHouse is an open-source column-oriented database management system that focuses on real-time analytical reporting. It enables users to execute complex SQL queries efficiently, making it suitable for applications that require fast data processing and analysis. The system is particularly effective for big data environments, allowing organizations to manage and analyze large volumes of information seamlessly. ClickHouse supports various data ingestion methods and offers features that facilitate data warehousing and observability. Its architecture is designed to optimize performance and scalability, catering to the needs of sales teams and data analysts seeking actionable insights from their data.

Descriptive AI.name: Clio
Descriptive AI.description: Clio provides cloud-based legal practice management software, helping law firms manage cases, billing, and client relationships.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Clio is a suite of web-based tools that help law firms in practice management and client collaboration. Clio is a suite of online tools designed to manage a law firm. Completely web-based, Clio is a practice management system that is specifically designed for solo practitioners and small law firms.

Descriptive AI.name: Cognite
Descriptive AI.description: Cognite develops an industrial IoT data platform that enables digital transformation of heavy-asset industries.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cognite is a global industrial AI Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) company supporting the full-scale digital transformation of heavy-asset industries around the world. The flagship product, Cognite Data Fusion (CDF), empowers companies with contextualized Operational and IT data to drive industrial applications that increase the safety, sustainability, and efficiency of industrial operations. Cognite makes industrial data accessible to all, from engineers in the field to data scientists in the office, empowering individuals and companies to create value from data and transform an industry. Founded in January 2017, Cognite today has more than 400 software developers, data scientists, designers, 3D specialists, and industry professionals across offices in Norway, the US, and Japan.

Descriptive AI.name: Cognition
Descriptive AI.description: Cognition is an applied artificial intelligence lab that focuses on reasoning and code.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cognition AI is an applied AI lab focused on building end-to-end software agents that act as collaborative AI teammates. Their aim is to support engineering teams in being more efficient and innovative in their projects.

Descriptive AI.name: Cohere
Descriptive AI.description: Cohere is an enterprise AI firm developing secure and private AI technology to address real-world business challenges.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cohere is the leading security-first enterprise AI company.  Cohere builds cutting-edge foundation AI models and end-to-end products designed to solve real-world business problems. The company offers enterprises the highest levels of privacy, security and optionality to deploy across all major cloud providers, private cloud environments, or on-premises for total control of their data. Cohere partners closely with companies to deliver seamless integration, deep customization, and easy-to-use AI solutions for their workforce. Cohere is headquartered in Toronto and San Francisco and also has offices in Montreal, New York City, London, Paris, and Seoul.

Descriptive AI.name: Cohesity
Descriptive AI.description: Cohesity is a data management technology firm that offers hyper-converged secondary storage solutions for backups, files, and analytics.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cohesity is a data management technology company that provides hyper-converged secondary storage solutions for backups, file services, and analytics. With the Cohesity Data Cloud, organizations can secure, manage, and recover data at an enterprise scale while gaining insights through AI capabilities.

Descriptive AI.name: Collibra
Descriptive AI.description: Collibra delivers an end-to-end Data Intelligence platform to accelerate digital business transformation.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Collibra delivers an end-to-end Data Intelligence platform to accelerate digital business transformation. Collibra accelerates trusted business outcomes by connecting the right data, insights, and algorithms to all Data Citizens. The company's platform breaks down traditional data silos and opens up organizational data, providing trustworthy business intelligence, enabling users to find the data they need, collaborate on it, and easily understand its meaning. It was founded in 2008 and headquartered in Hoofdstedelijk Gewest, Belgium.

Descriptive AI.name: CommerceIQ
Descriptive AI.description: CommerceIQ is an omnichannel management platform that helps large brands use machine learning and automation to increase e-commerce sales.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: CommerceIQ specializes in Ecommerce Channel Optimization (ECO), the practice of using machine learning, analytics, and automation to optimize the e-commerce channel across the supply chain, marketing, and sales operations to win at the moment of purchase and drive profitable market share growth. CommerceIQ has been adopted by leading consumer brands accounting for more than $6 billion in e-commerce sales and millions in marketing spend, including Avery Products, Georgia-Pacific, Spectrum Brands, and 3 of the top-5 Fast-Moving Consumer Goods Companies in the U.S. These brands rely on CommerceIQ’s machine-based commerce technology and business processes, which are purpose-built to tune e-commerce algorithms, collaborate and share data-driven insights in real-time in response to changing variables across hundreds of products on leading retail sites. Using CommerceIQ as a single source of truth, customers have driven a 40% increase in incremental sales, a 20% improvement in profitability, and a 32% reduction in out-of-stock rates on Amazon. For more information, please visit CommerceIQ.

Descriptive AI.name: Commure
Descriptive AI.description: Commure is an AI-based company that specializes in health care.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Commure develops and operates a healthcare technology platform that supports hospital and health system operations. The company offers interconnected applications for ambient AI-assisted clinical documentation, revenue cycle automation, staff safety, and care coordination. It integrates with electronic health record (EHR) systems through partnerships such as the MEDITECH Alliance and deploys its platform across provider networks. Commure also orchestrates enterprise-wide AI deployments, including ambient scribing tools and workflow automation for clinicians. The company supports licensing, implementation, and content integration to enhance clinical and administrative workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: ConcertAI
Descriptive AI.description: ConcertAI is an AI-powered SaaS data company that develops medical research tools in oncology.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: ConcertAI is a developer of medical research tool suite intended to design and deliver care-based oncology research and data analytics. It is an integrated real-world data and AI-driven solutions to transform how insights are generated and accelerate therapeutic innovations to patients. It was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Boston, Massachusetts.

Descriptive AI.name: Contentsquare
Descriptive AI.description: Contentsquare is an AI platform that provides product analytics, customer feedback, digital experience analytics, and monitoring services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Contentsquare is an AI-powered platform that provides rich and contextual insight through customer behaviors, feelings, and intent. The platform helps brands to transform their businesses digitally using digital experience analytics that allows them to take action through enterprise scale and build customer trust with security, privacy, and accessibility.

Descriptive AI.name: Coralogix
Descriptive AI.description: Coralogix is a SaaS platform that uses machine learning algorithms to facilitate delivery and maintenance processes for software providers.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Coralogix is a full-stack observability platform that enables businesses to monitor and manage data in real time, providing instant insights without the need for indexing. The platform supports Log Analytics, application performance monitoring (APM), security information and event management (SIEM), real user monitoring (RUM), and infrastructure monitoring, offering complete visibility into AI performance, security, and governance in a single solution. Coralogix offers a simple pricing model based on data volume, along with world-class support that ensures rapid response times and swift resolutions.

Descriptive AI.name: Cornerstone Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Cornerstone Robotics operates to improve the accessibility of high-end medical services in China.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cornerstone Robotics operates to improve the accessibility of high-end medical services in China.

Descriptive AI.name: Creatio
Descriptive AI.description: Agentic CRM & Workflow Platform with No-Code and AI at Its Core
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Creatio is a global vendor of an agentic CRM & workflow platform with no-code and AI at its core. We help organizations automate customer and operational workflows achieving the fastest time-to-value and the highest ROI on the market. Millions of workflows run on Creatio daily, supporting thousands of clients in over 100 countries. Genuine care for our clients and partners is at the heart of our DNA.

Descriptive AI.name: Cresta
Descriptive AI.description: Cresta uses artificial intelligence to assist sales and service agents in the quality of customer service.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cresta uses artificial intelligence to assist sales and service agents with customer service tasks. it provides tools for managing inquiries. Cresta focuses on facilitating communication between agents and customers.

Descriptive AI.name: Cruise
Descriptive AI.description: Cruise is an autonomous vehicle company that develops electric cars for urban mobility.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cruise is building advanced self-driving vehicles to safely connect people with places, things, and experiences they care about. Cruise autonomous vehicles are actively navigating challenging and unpredictable driving environments, tackling the complex traffic scenarios human drivers face daily to bring self-driving technology to the world.

Descriptive AI.name: Crusoe
Descriptive AI.description: Crusoe is a vertically integrated AI infrastructure company that builds and operates data centers powered by energy sources.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Crusoe designs, builds, and operates the full infrastructure stack for artificial intelligence, positioning itself as an AI factory company. The company’s vertically integrated model spans from power sourcing, which includes wind, solar, geothermal, and converting otherwise wasted gas into electricity, to operating large-scale, modular AI data center infrastructure. Crusoe delivers its computing resources through Crusoe Cloud, an Infrastructure as a Service platform equipped with specialized GPUs for resource-intensive AI workloads.

Descriptive AI.name: Cyberhaven
Descriptive AI.description: Cyberhaven is an AI-powered data security company focused on detecting and preventing data loss, insider threats, and protecting cloud data.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cyberhaven is the data security company revolutionizing how companies protect their important information from theft and misuse.Security products only recognized and protected a limited range of data types because they relied on finding patterns in the content itself. Data tracing technology analyzes billions of events surrounding every piece of data to better understand and classify it, allowing for the protection of a broader range of sensitive data in any form, anywhere it goes.

Descriptive AI.name: Cyera
Descriptive AI.description: Cyera is an AI-powered data security platform that gives enterprises deep context on their data to assure cyber-resilience and compliance.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cyera is a data security company that gives businesses deep context on their data, applying proper, continuous controls to assure cyber-resilience and compliance. Cyera takes a data-centric approach to security across your data landscape, empowering security teams to know where their data is, and what exposes it to risk, and take immediate action to remediate exposures. Backed by leading investors, including Sequoia, Accel, Cyberstarts, and Redpoint Ventures, Cyera is redefining how companies secure data in the cloud.

Descriptive AI.name: d-Matrix
Descriptive AI.description: D-Matrix is a platform that enables data centers to handle large-scale generative AI inference with high throughput and low latency.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: D-Matrix is developing a platform that enables data centers to handle large-scale generative AI inference with high throughput and low latency. The company’s offering includes the Corsair™ inference accelerator card, the JetStream™ I/O networking accelerator, and the SquadRack™ rack-scale system, all designed to work together to deliver efficient inference compute. Their technology brings memory and compute closer together, embedding processing inside memory to reduce data movement, improve speed, and energy efficiency. The stack also includes software tools for deployment, model debugging, and performance monitoring, enabling enterprises to scale inference workloads across models and usage scenarios.

Descriptive AI.name: Darwinbox
Descriptive AI.description: Darwinbox is an end-to-end enterprise HR software that enables enterprises to automate the entire employee lifecycle in one HR platform.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Darwinbox is a provider of cloud-based Human Resources Management Software (HRMS). The company's platform helps enterprises to manage their talent with new-age employee experiences and disruptive AI-powered technology. Its cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) software caters to an organization's HR needs across the entire employee lifecycle.

Descriptive AI.name: Databricks
Descriptive AI.description: Databricks is a data and AI platform that unifies data engineering, analytics, and machine learning on a lakehouse architecture.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Databricks offers a cloud platform that unifies data engineering, warehousing, analytics, and AI workflows. It applies a lakehouse approach to support data ingestion, transformation, and governance alongside development and deployment of machine learning and generative AI models. The platform includes features like ETL orchestration, serverless SQL analytics, data sharing across environments, notebook-based collaboration, model training, model registry, and application development tools. Databricks also maintains several open-source projects, including Delta Lake, MLflow, and the DBRX large language model, and it continues to integrate AI-driven enhancements such as test-time adaptive model optimization.

Descriptive AI.name: DataDirect Networks
Descriptive AI.description: DataDirect Networks provides AI data storage and management solutions for enterprises.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: DataDirect Networks offers a comprehensive Data Intelligence Platform designed to enhance data storage and management for AI applications. The platform supports over 500,000 GPUs and is optimized for high-performance computing, enabling organizations to efficiently process massive datasets. With tailored solutions for various roles, DDN empowers data scientists, IT professionals, and researchers to unlock insights and drive innovation.

Descriptive AI.name: Dataiku
Descriptive AI.description: Dataiku operates as an enterprise artificial intelligence and machine-learning platform.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Dataiku is a centralized data platform that moves businesses along their data journey from analytics at scale to enterprise AI. By providing a common ground for data experts and explorers, a repository of best practices, shortcuts to machine learning and AI deployment/management, and a centralized, controlled environment, Dataiku serves as a catalyst for data-powered companies. Customers like Unilever, GE, and FOX News Group use Dataiku to ensure they are moving quickly and growing exponentially along with the amount of data they’re collecting. By removing roadblocks, Dataiku ensures more opportunities for business-impacting models and creative solutions, allowing teams to work faster and smarter.

Descriptive AI.name: Dataminr
Descriptive AI.description: Dataminr is a real-time AI platform that detects early signs of high-impact events and emerging risks.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Dataminr is an AI platform that detects the earliest signs of high-impact events and emerging risks from publicly available information. It discovers, distills, and delivers alerts from the increasingly diverse and complex landscape of publicly available information including social media, blogs, information sensors, and the dark web, ensuring that businesses have the knowledge they need to act with confidence.

Descriptive AI.name: DataRobot
Descriptive AI.description: DataRobot provides AI technology and ROI enablement services to global enterprises.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: DataRobot delivers AI technology and ROI enablement services to global enterprises. DataRobot’s enterprise AI platform democratizes data science with end-to-end automation for building, deploying, and managing machine learning models.

Descriptive AI.name: DataSnipper
Descriptive AI.description: DataSnipper is a financial audit company that provides an AI-powered intelligent automation platform in Excel.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: DataSnipper is a financial audit company that provides an AI-powered intelligent automation platform in Excel.

Descriptive AI.name: Decagon
Descriptive AI.description: Decagon provides a conversational AI platform for automating customer support across multiple channels.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Decagon provides an enterprise conversational AI platform that helps businesses automate and manage customer support across channels such as chat, email, and voice. The company’s platform uses configurable agent operating procedures to let teams define workflow logic in natural language while integrating with existing support systems and data sources. Its services include AI agents that can handle inquiry resolution, ticket routing, context-aware responses and actions like refunds or account updates. The platform also supports analytics and tools for monitoring agent performance and iterating on automated support processes.

Descriptive AI.name: Decart
Descriptive AI.description: Decart is an AI company that develops models to transform live footage into immersive digital environments in real time.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Decart is a startup that has developed innovative AI models capable of transforming live footage into immersive digital environments in real time. This technology aims to enhance streaming experiences significantly. The company leverages its efficient AI training and inference capabilities alongside cluster training reliability to push the boundaries of generative AI.

Descriptive AI.name: Deepgram
Descriptive AI.description: Deepgram provides a voice artificial intelligence platform for speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Deepgram provides a voice artificial intelligence platform that offers developer-accessible APIs for converting speech to text, generating natural spoken responses from text, and building voice-enabled applications. The company’s products include speech-to-text models that handle both real-time and recorded audio with conversational understanding and text-to-speech services that produce human-like voice outputs for applications and agents. Its platform supports integration through unified APIs that allow processing of multilingual audio, language understanding features, and voice agent workflows for digital systems. Deepgram serves software developers and technology teams seeking to embed automated voice capabilities into their products and services using scalable AI models.

Descriptive AI.name: DeepL
Descriptive AI.description: DeepL is a software company that offers a communication platform for AI based translation, editing, and writing services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: DeepL is a deep learning company using artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) for several language translation products, such as the bilingual dictionary Linguae or the machine translation service DeepL. The company was founded in 2017.

Descriptive AI.name: Deeproute
Descriptive AI.description: DeepRoute.aidevelops autonomous driving technology for safer and smarter transportation.
