Descriptive AI.description: Govini is a software company that transforms defense acquisition and national-security decision-making through data, analytics, and AI.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Govini is a software company that transforms defense acquisition and national-security decision-making through data, analytics, and AI. The company's flagship product, Ark, is a suite of AI-enabled applications built on a proprietary “National Security Knowledge Graph” that integrates commercial and government data to support workflows across supply chain, science & technology, production, sustainment, logistics, and modernization. Govini serves the U.S. Department of Defense, military services, national-security agencies, and contractors, helping users replace manual acquisition and procurement processes with accelerated, software-driven decision tools.

Descriptive AI.name: Groq
Descriptive AI.description: Groq provides a platform and hardware infrastructure designed for AI inference workloads.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Groq is a technology company that designs and provides specialized artificial intelligence compute solutions focused on accelerating AI inference workloads using its custom-built Language Processing Unit (LPU) hardware and associated software stack. The company’s core products include purpose-designed silicon and cloud-accessible platforms that support real-time execution of large language models and other AI tasks with low latency and high throughput, enabling developers and enterprises to integrate AI services into production environments efficiently. Groq also delivers cloud-based services that allow customers to access inference capabilities via APIs compatible with popular development tools, supporting seamless integration into existing AI workflows. Its engineering efforts emphasise deterministic performance and streamlined deployment, targeting use cases where speed and cost predictability are critical. Groq engages with partners and customers across sectors that require rapid AI inferencing, and the company’s technology has attracted significant strategic interest and investment within the broader AI infrastructure ecosystem.

Descriptive AI.name: GrubMarket
Descriptive AI.description: GrubMarket is an AI-powered B2B eCommerce business operating in the American food supply chain industry.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: GrubMarket is an AI-powered B2B eCommerce company operating in the American food supply chain industry Besides being the first mover of building B2B eCommerce, GrubMarket is also the first mover of providing Enterprise AI Solutions to the American food supply chain industry. It is one of the largest private food tech companies in the U.S. and the world.

Descriptive AI.name: GupShup
Descriptive AI.description: Billions of global conversations, powered by one purpose
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Gupshup enables better customer engagement through conversational messaging. We are the leading conversational messaging platform, powering over 6 billion messages per month. Across verticals, thousands of large and small businesses in emerging markets use Gupshup to build conversational experiences across marketing, sales and support. Our carrier-grade platform provides a single messaging API for 30+ channels, a rich conversational experience-building tool kit for any use case and a network of emerging market partnerships across messaging channels, device manufacturers, ISVs and operators. Businesses have made conversations an integral part of their customer engagement success.

Descriptive AI.name: H2O.ai
Descriptive AI.description: H2O.ai is a machine learning platform that builds smart applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: H2O.ai is an AI cloud company, on a mission to democratize AI for everyone. Customers use the H2O AI Hybrid Cloud platform to rapidly solve complex business problems and accelerate the discovery of new ideas. H2O.ai is the trusted AI partner to more than 20,000 global organizations, including AT&T, Allergan, Bon Secours Mercy Health, Capital One, Commonwealth Bank of Australia, GlaxoSmithKline, Hitachi, Kaiser Permanente, Procter & Gamble, PayPal, PwC, Reckitt, Unilever, and Walgreens, over half of the Fortune 500 and one million data scientists. Goldman Sachs, NVIDIA, and Wells Fargo are not only customers and partners, but strategic investors in the company. H2O.ai’s customers have honored the company with a Net Promoter Score (NPS) of 78— the highest in the industry based on breadth of technology and deep employee expertise. The world’s top 20 Kaggle Grandmasters (the community of best-in-the-world machine learning practitioners and data scientists) are employees of H2O.ai. A strong AI for Good ethos to make the world a better place and Responsible AI drive the company’s purpose. Please join our movement at www.H2O.ai.

Descriptive AI.name: Hadrian
Descriptive AI.description: Hadrian builds AI-powered automated factories that manufacture precision parts for defense, aerospace, and space industries.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hadrian is a precision manufacturing company that manufactures precision components to serve aerospace and defense clients. It builds autonomous, software-defined precision component factories that help its customers make rockets, satellites, jets, and eVTOLs.

Descriptive AI.name: Hailo
Descriptive AI.description: Hailo develops AI processors specifically designed to enable AI tasks on the edge.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hailo is developing high-performance AI processors specifically designed to run AI tasks on the edge.  Hailo’s processors bring data-class performance to smart devices such as personal computers, cars, security & industrial cameras, autonomous robots, etc.  With an innovative architecture, Hailo enables edge devices to run advanced AI models in real-time, with minimal power consumption, size, and cost, transforming a multitude of industries including automotive, security, PC and more.

Descriptive AI.name: Halcyon
Descriptive AI.description: Halcyon is an anti ransomware and cyber resilience platform that eliminates the business impact of ransomware.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Halcyon is a cybersecurity business that develops tools to protect enterprise clients from ransomware. It also offers layered ransomware protection that combines pre-execution detection, behavioral modeling, and deception techniques.

Descriptive AI.name: Haomo.AI
Descriptive AI.description: Haomo.AI is a Chinese autonomous driving startup controlled by Great Wall Motor's Chairman Wei Jianjun.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Haomo Zhixing is an artificial intelligence technology company dedicated to autonomous driving. Haomo Zhixing helps customers reshape and comprehensively upgrade the travel and logistics methods of the entire society.

Descriptive AI.name: Harmattan AI
Descriptive AI.description: Harmattan AI is a technology company that develops AI-powered autonomous systems and software for military and defense applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Harmattan AI is a technology company that develops artificial intelligence-powered autonomous systems and software tailored for military and defense applications. Its core offerings include AI algorithms and autonomous platforms designed to support unmanned vehicles, sensor integration, mission planning, and decision-making workflows in complex operational environments. The company focuses on embedding machine perception, adaptive control, and real-time situational awareness capabilities into systems that operate across land, air, and maritime domains to enhance autonomy and operational effectiveness. Harmattan AI also provides tools for simulation, testing, and evaluation that help defense organizations integrate autonomous functions with existing systems while maintaining safety, interoperability, and oversight. Its technology supports defense programs seeking to leverage advanced AI for autonomy, collaboration between manned and unmanned assets, and scalable mission execution. The company continues to advance its autonomous solutions through research, defense partnerships, and engineering development to address evolving defense requirements.

Descriptive AI.name: Harmonic
Descriptive AI.description: Harmonic is an artificial intelligence lab that develops mathematical reasoning engine designed to tackle complex mathematical problems.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Harmonic builds an AI-driven mathematical reasoning engine that aims to bring “mathematical superintelligence” to theorem proving, software verification, and education. The platform integrates reinforcement learning and formal methods to support development of tools that can reason about mathematical concepts and verify correctness in safety-critical systems. Harmonic offers software components and AI research infrastructure to translate research into usable applications, including mobile and web products.

Descriptive AI.name: Harness
Descriptive AI.description: Harness provides a software delivery platform that helps engineering teams build, deploy, and operate applications through a set of tools.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Harness is a software delivery platform that provides tools for automating code integration, testing, deployment, and verification across the software development lifecycle. It offers continuous integration and continuous delivery pipelines, GitOps support, and AI-driven features that assist in generating and troubleshooting workflows without manual scripting. The platform includes modules for managing feature flags, infrastructure as code, artifact registries, and options for automating security and cloud cost controls. Harness also supplies an open-source edition that enables teams to configure development environments and manage end-to-end delivery processes from a unified interface. Its services aim to streamline release practices, reduce manual effort, and bring coherence to complex software delivery operations.

Descriptive AI.name: Harvey
Descriptive AI.description: Harvey provides AI-driven tools to assist legal professionals with research, document review, and contract analysis.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Harvey offers AI-powered solutions designed to streamline legal work for law firms and corporate legal teams. Its tools support tasks such as document review, contract analysis, legal research, and due diligence, helping professionals save time and improve accuracy. The platform uses natural language processing to interpret complex legal language and generate relevant insights. Harvey’s services are tailored to meet the specific needs of clients across various practice areas.

Descriptive AI.name: HawkEye 360
Descriptive AI.description: HawkEye 360 detects, geolocates, and characterizesvarious RF signals using its satellite constellation in low Earth orbit.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: HawkEye 360 is a commercial company capable of detecting, geolocating, and characterizing various RF signals using its satellite constellation in low Earth orbit. The company specializes in radio frequency mapping and provides analytics solutions primarily for defense and intelligence sectors. HawkEye 360 provides reliable situational awareness and early-warning signals to the US Government and its allied partners. Our space-based collection methods, unique signal processing, and AI-driven analytics convert understanding of the RF spectrum into a competitive edge.

Descriptive AI.name: Helsing
Descriptive AI.description: Helsing develops AI-powered defense tech, focusing on drones and software, to enhance military capabilities for democratic nations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Helsing offers artificial intelligence solutions designed to support defence operations across land, air, naval, and subsurface domains. It provides software-driven platforms that integrate with existing military hardware to enable autonomous target detection, coordination, and engagement. Key offerings include a reconnaissance-and-strike system that fuses battlefield data, an AI‑enabled strike drone capable of operating in electronic warfare environments, underwater autonomous surveillance drones paired with an edge‑AI classifier, and AI “wingman” pilots for aircraft. Helsing collaborates with governments and industry to embed its AI-driven software into defense ecosystems while maintaining structured ethical oversight over technology use.

Descriptive AI.name: Higgsfield
Descriptive AI.description: Higgsfield is a video AI firm committed to democratizing social media content creation for everyone.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Higgsfield is a video AI firm aimed to making social media content creation accessible to everyone.

Descriptive AI.name: HighRadius
Descriptive AI.description: HighRadius is a SaaS company that develops artificial intelligence-based order-to-cash and treasury management software.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: HighRadius offers cloud-based Autonomous Software for the Office of the CFO. The company products provide value to a wide range of customers and are especially relevant to industries like consumer products, manufacturing, distribution, energy, and others that sell products or provide a service to other businesses.

Descriptive AI.name: Highspot
Descriptive AI.description: Highspot is a sales enablement platform that helps companies worldwide improve the performance of their sales teams.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Highspot is an AI-fueled sales enablement platform that helps companies worldwide improve the performance of their sales teams. Its platform specializes in providing intelligent content management, training, contextual guidance, customer engagement, and actionable analytics. Its unified sales enablement platform gives revenue teams a single solution to elevate customer conversations and drive repeatable revenue, bringing together native content and guidance, training and coaching, and engagement intelligence – all supported by actionable analytics. The company was founded in 2012 and headquartered in Seatle, Washington.

Descriptive AI.name: Hippocratic AI
Descriptive AI.description: Hippocratic AI is a healthcare technology company that develops safety-focused large-language models for medical applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hippocratic AI presents a platform that develops safety-focused large language models tailored for healthcare settings. The company offers AI agents designed to engage in non-diagnostic, patient-facing tasks such as preoperative preparation, post-discharge follow-up, and chronic-care management. Its architecture is built on a multi-agent system that aims to reduce clinician burden by managing routine patient interactions, while a clinician-driven test framework ensures service readiness. The service includes an “agent store” where licensed clinicians can design and deploy new agents across diverse specialties, and health systems, payers or providers can deploy them to support outreach and engagement workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: Hive
Descriptive AI.description: Hive provides cloud-based AI solutions for understanding, searching, and generating content
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hive is the leading provider of cloud-based AI solutions to understand, search, and generate content, and is trusted by hundreds of the world’s largest and most innovative organizations. The company empowers developers with a portfolio of best-in-class, pre-trained AI models, serving billions of customer API requests every month. Hive also offers turnkey software powered by proprietary AI models and datasets, unlocking breakthrough applications for critical business needs with deep learning and generative AI. Collectively, Hive’s technology is transforming approaches to platform integrity / content moderation (including AI-generated content detection), brand protection, sponsorship measurement, context-based ad targeting, and more. Hive has raised over $120M in capital from leading investors, including General Catalyst, 8VC, Glynn Capital, Bain & Company, Visa Ventures, and others. In April 2021, Hive announced a $50M Series D at a $2B valuation. The San Francisco-based company has 175+ full-time employees globally, in addition to a distributed workforce of more than 2.5 million global contributors that supports data labeling operations. For more information, visit thehive.ai or follow on LinkedIn.

Descriptive AI.name: Hopper
Descriptive AI.description: Hopper is a travel app that uses predictive analytics to make travel recommendations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hopper is a travel app that uses predictive analytics to make travel recommendations. The mobile application uses big data to predict and analyze airfare and accommodations. Hopper provides travelers with the information they need to get the best deals on flights and hotels and notifies them when prices are at their predicted lowest points. In 2007, Frederic Lalonde and Joost Ouwerkerk co-founded Hopper in Montréal, Quebec.

Descriptive AI.name: HT Aero
Descriptive AI.description: HT Aero aspires to be the pioneer of urban air mobility (UAM) and is dedicated to producing safe and intelligent electric flying vehicles.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: HT Aero aspires to be the pioneer of urban air mobility (UAM) and is dedicated to producing safe and intelligent electric flying vehicles. which combine automotive and aerospace technologies to realize domestic air-travel usage at scale.

Descriptive AI.name: Hugging Face
Descriptive AI.description: Hugging Face allows users to build, train, and deploy art models using the reference open source in machine learning.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hugging Face is an open-source and platform provider of machine learning technologies. Their aim is to democratize good machine learning, one commit at a time.

Descriptive AI.name: Huma
Descriptive AI.description: Huma offers a health platform used for remote patient monitoring and biological data gathering for preventative healthcare.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Huma is a global health technology company that provides a modular platform to support digital 'hospitals at home' across different disease areas. Its platform combines predictive algorithms, digital biomarkers, and real-world data to advance proactive, predictive care and research. The company's technology integrates data from hospital databases, patient wearables, and mobile devices to provide real-time information to healthcare providers.

Descriptive AI.name: Hyperchain Technology
Descriptive AI.description: Hyperchain Technology is a global leader in blockchain-powered digital infrastructure.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hyperchain Technology is a global leader in blockchain-powered digital infrastructure, dedicated to delivering secure, scalable, and intelligent solutions across industries. With deep expertise in blockchain, privacy computing, artificial intelligence (AI), and data security, we empower enterprises and public sectors to build trusted digital ecosystems that enhance efficiency, security, and interoperability. As China’s first blockchain unicorn, Hyperchain has enabled large-scale digital transformation for over 300 leading enterprises across key industries, including finance, energy, public services, supply chain, healthcare and more. Our technologies drive secure data exchange, AI-powered analytics, and privacy-preserving computations, ensuring that businesses and governments can operate with confidence in the digital era. Hyperchain is a global force in next-generation technology standardization, leading and contributing to the development of 80+ international standards, 20 national standards in China, and over 100 industry standards. With nearly 900 technology-related patents and 200 software copyrights, we hold a strategic leadership position in core technology innovation and regulatory framework development across blockchain, privacy computing, AI and secure digital infrastructure. Hyperchain has played a privital role in shaping China’s next-generation technology research landscape. We spearheaded the establishment of China’s first blockchain-focused national key laboratory—the National Key Laboratory of Blockchain and Data Security at Zhejiang University—and led the creation of the Zhejiang Institute of Blockchain Technology and the Chongqing Academy of Advanced Blockchain. Through deep collaborations with 60+ top universities, research institutions, enterprises, and government agencies, we continue to drive secure, intelligent digital infrastructure innovation.   Our impact has been widely recognized by global institutions and industry leaders. Hyperchain was selected as a Top 25 Finalist for the 2024 World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) Global Awards and has been featured in: Forbes’s Top 50 Most Innovative Enterprises in Blockchain Globally IDC Leader in China’s BaaS Platform IDC FinTech Fast 101 Fortune Impact Initiative 2023 Deloitte Top 50 High-Tech High-Growth Enterprises  KPMG’s Top 50 Leading Financial Technology Enterprises … along with numerous other prestigious accolades. By bridging cutting-edge research with real-world applications, Hyperchain is at the forefront of industry-wide digital transformation, promoting sustainable development and accelerating the evolution of next-generation digital ecosystems.

Descriptive AI.name: I-care Group
Descriptive AI.description: I-care is the predictive maintenance leader, using AI and IoT to keep worldwide industries running
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: The I-care group is the market leader in predictive maintenance, monitoring hundreds of thousands of industrial machines worldwide.  Powered by AI and built on an open API, I-care’s platform brings your PdM technologies together to predict failures long before they happen Thanks to I-care, production keeps moving—safely, efficiently, and sustainably. Founded in 2004 in Belgium, I-care employs over 1000 people, has 36 offices in 16 countries (Asia-Pacific, EMEA and the USA) and has customers in over 55 countries. I-care’s innovative work has earned multiple awards, including the 2025 Solutions Award at The Reliability Conference, the Factory Innovation Award at Hannover Messe, and ADM’s 2024 Supplier Award for excellence in reliability services. For more information, visit www.icareweb.com.

Descriptive AI.name: iCarbonX
Descriptive AI.description: iCarbonX is a China-based artificial intelligence platform for health data company.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: iCarbonX aimed at building a ecosystem of digital life based on the combination of consumers’ big life data, internet and artificial intelligence. The individual health steward, created by the common efforts of artificial intelligence team and top biotechnology,will lead a healthy life through the digital life ecosystem. The main founding team of the company was from the BGI Tech. It was deeply experienced in omics technology, mobile health, medical service, biological data analysis, artificial intelligence and data mining,etc. They will create the first and also most professional data collection platform of millions of health data in China, combine the best biotechnology and the top team of artificial intelligence, and integrate the advantages of artificial intelligence into the abundant analyses and applications of big life data through data mining and machine learning.

Descriptive AI.name: Icertis
Descriptive AI.description: Icertis is an AI-powered contract management platform that ensures compliance and minimizes risk.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Icertis is an enterprise contract management platform in the cloud that solves hard contract management problems on an easy-to-use platform. With Icertis, companies can accelerate business by increasing contract velocity, protect against risk by ensuring regulatory and policy compliance, and optimize commercial relationships by maximizing revenue and reducing costs.

Descriptive AI.name: Imbue
Descriptive AI.description: Imbue is a research lab that trains foundational models to develop AI agents.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Imbue is an independent research lab that trains foundational models to develop AI agents that can code. The company's AI models are optimized to perform well on its internal benchmarks for reasoning.

Descriptive AI.name: Immunai
Descriptive AI.description: Immunai is a biotech company that provides mapping and reprogramming immunology, machine learning, and software engineering.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Immunai is a biotech company that combines single-cell genomics with ML algorithms to enable high-resolution profiling of the immune system. Immunai's mission is to map the entire immune system and its functions using single-cell genomics and machine learning. Immunai leverages single-cell technologies to profile cells from a blood sample, and uses machine-learning algorithms (powered by its proprietary database) to map the hundreds of cell types and their states to create an immune profile. They work on biomarker discovery and insights that identify how a cell responds to its changing environment. The company is located in New York City, San Francisco, and Tel Aviv, Israel.

Descriptive AI.name: Incredible Health
Descriptive AI.description: Incredible Health is the largest AI company powering healthcare hiring, with 1.5 million US healthcare workers and 1500 healthcare employers
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Incredible Health is the largest AI company powering healthcare hiring, with over 1.5 million U.S. healthcare workers and over 1,500 healthcare employers. AI voice agents, Gale and Lyn, transform the healthcare hiring experience and economics of healthcare hiring, with the average hospital reducing hiring times from 90 days to under 20 for permanent nurses. Healthcare workers use Incredible Health's marketplace to discover opportunities, advance their careers, and land their dream jobs. Employers use the healthcare hiring solutions to gain a competitive edge, save millions in overtime, premium labor, and HR costs, and deliver consistent care to their communities. Powered by millions of marketplace datapoints and interactions, Incredible Health’s AI technology is continuously trained and refined to deliver fast, personalized, and reliable results. Co-founded by MD and Wharton alum, Iman Abuzeid, and MIT alum from a family of nurses, Rome Portlock, Incredible Health is headquartered in San Francisco, CA, and operates nationally.

Descriptive AI.name: Infarm
Descriptive AI.description: Infarm builds and distributes efficient vertical farms throughout cities.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Infarm builds and distributes efficient vertical farms throughout cities. Infarm combines efficient vertical farms with IoT technologies and Machine Learning, to offer an alternative food system that is resilient, transparent, and affordable. The company distributes its smart modular farms throughout the urban environment to grow fresh produce for the city’s inhabitants.  It was founded in 2013 and headquartered in Berlin, Germany.

Descriptive AI.name: Infinite Reality
Descriptive AI.description: Infinite Reality using AI to create interactive 3D websites, virtual showrooms, and XR media.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Infinite Reality (iR) helps clients with audiences develop immersive experiences that maximize the value between audiences, creators, and brands. iR powered virtual experiences enable brands and creators to fully control the ways in which they distribute content, engage audiences, commercialize their creations, and communicate with their communities. With deep expertise in Hollywood production, iR develops world-class Metaverse experiences that redefine the possibilities in connected digital environments. Services and Advisory teams manage, design, and oversee custom builds, leveraging the Technology team’s platform development excellence. Entertainment and Content Creation divisions produce breathtaking original content and live events from iR's 150,000 sq. ft. Los Angeles studio. iR’s Agency attracts, cultivates, and builds client audiences while iR’s digitally native brands, including championship esports organizations Rogue and the London Royal Ravens and premier influencer management agency TalentX Entertainment, increase awareness and adoption of Web3 opportunities.

Descriptive AI.name: Inflection AI
Descriptive AI.description: Inflection AI is a public benefit corporation leveraging its world class LLM to build an AI platform focused on the needs of the enterprise.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Inflection AI is building the future of enterprise AI. Founded in 2022, the company created one of the world’s most intelligent LLMs called Pi, used by millions of people around the world. In March 2024, Inflection AI was refounded under the leadership of CEO Sean White with a mission to enable people to achieve more by unlocking the full potential of enterprise intelligence.

Descriptive AI.name: InMobi
Descriptive AI.description: InMobi provides mobile advertising and consumer content platforms, connecting advertisers and users.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: InMobi operates a mobile advertising platform for advertisers and publishers to connect with consumers. The company also offers consumer brands like Glance, which delivers content to lock screens. InMobi aims to redefine digital experiences through a blend of human creativity and AI.

Descriptive AI.name: Innovaccer
Descriptive AI.description: Innovaccer provides an AI cloud platform for healthcare data management and analytics.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Innovaccer offers a Healthcare Intelligence Cloud that transforms fragmented healthcare data into actionable insights, enhancing patient care and operational efficiency. The platform supports value-based care initiatives by integrating various functionalities such as risk adjustment, population health management, and omnichannel marketing.

Descriptive AI.name: Insider One
Descriptive AI.description: #1 SaaS platform that brings everything customer engagement teams need in one place to reach their peak potential and become unstoppable.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Insider One is the #1 platform that brings everything marketing and customer engagement teams need in one place so they can reach their peak potential and become unstoppable.  With AI at its core and an integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP), Insider One unites data, personalization, and journey orchestration across the most extensive set of natively supported channels, including WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Web, App, and Site Search.  Insider One provides the ultimate vendor experience, proven in fifteen industries and more than 30 countries for more than a decade, to help teams be first, be focused, and be progressive, redefining what it means to lead in customer engagement. Trusted by 2,000+ customers, including some of the world’s most loved brands like Samsung, L’Oréal, Unilever, Allianz, ING Group, Toyota, Singapore Airlines, and GAP, to accelerate growth, build customer love, and become a market leader. Loved by customers, recognized by analysts, Insider One is the only vendor recognized as the #1 leader in all the capabilities marketing and customer engagement teams need, including AI, Customer Data Management, Cross-Channel Journey Orchestration, and Personalization, offering brands unrivaled product excellence within a single consolidated platform. Accolades include:  Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide AI-Enabled Marketing Platforms for Enterprise Companies 2025 2025 Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Personalization Engines #1 Customer Choice: 2025 Gartner Voice of the Customer for Personalization Engines Leader in the Forrester Wave for Experience Optimization Platforms, Q4 2024 The Gartner Customers’ Choice for Multichannel Marketing Hubs in 2025 The #1 G2 Leader in 11 categories, including CDP, Personalization Engines, Mobile Marketing, Customer Journey Analytics, SMS Marketing, WhatsApp Marketing, eCommerce Search, and eCommerce Personalization, with a perfect 100/100 user satisfaction score. Today, Insider One is powered by 1,500+ team members representing 50+ nationalities across 30+ offices. The company is woman-founded and predominantly women-owned, with 70% of senior executive roles, including the CEO, CMO, CHRO, and CFO, held by women. Through initiatives such as 100 Cities, 100 Projects, Young Engineers Club, SheCodes, and SheLeads, Insider One continues to expand its positive impact across global communities, driving opportunities, inclusion, education, and equity for this and future generations.

Descriptive AI.name: Insitro
Descriptive AI.description: Insitro is a drug discovery and development startup that utilizes machine learning and biology to transform drug discovery.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Insitro is an operator of a data-driven drug discovery and development company that utilizes machine learning and high-throughput biology to transform the way that drugs are discovered and delivered to patients. The company uses state-of-the-art technologies from bioengineering enabling it to generate high-throughput, functional genomic data sets and aligning them with patient data via novel machine learning methods, thereby building predictive models that can accelerate target selection and the design and development of effective therapeutics. In 2018, Daphne Koller established Insitro in South San Francisco, California..

Descriptive AI.name: Inspur Cloud
Descriptive AI.description: Inspur Cloud provides datacenter and cloud computing solutions worldwide.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Inspur Cloud provides datacenter and cloud computing solutions worldwide. It offers servers, storage systems, artificial intelligence, and HPC solutions; and tax cloud, set top box and home gateway, and financial terminals.  Inspur Cloud also offers software outsourcing services. It serves government, enterprise, and industrial customers.  Inspur Cloud began operation in 2010. It has its headquarters in Jinan in China.

Descriptive AI.name: Interos
Descriptive AI.description: Interos provides continuous visibility, analysis, and monitoring of extended supply chains to identify and manage risk factors.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Interos offers software that provides continuous visibility, analysis, and monitoring of extended supply chains to identify and manage risk factors such as financial, operational, governance, cyber, and regulatory vulnerabilities using artificial intelligence and large-scale data modeling. Its platform maps and assesses multi-tier supplier networks and business relationships, allowing organizations to detect potential threats early, visualize complex ecosystems, and monitor changes over time to aid decision-making and resilience planning. The company’s services include automated risk scoring, real-time alerts, and integration capabilities with existing enterprise systems for procurement, compliance, and risk workflows. Interos supports efforts to enhance operational resilience by helping customers understand and respond to supplier-related risks across diverse risk categories.

Descriptive AI.name: Invisible Technologies
Descriptive AI.description: Invisible Technologies provides systems and human expertise for developing, training, and deploying artificial intelligence.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Invisible Technologies provides a system of platforms and human services for AI development. The company offers tools for data processing, process building, and AI agent execution. It also connects businesses with experts for model training, data annotation, and evaluation.

Descriptive AI.name: Invoca
Descriptive AI.description: Invoca, the recognized leader in conversation intelligence AI for marketing, e-commerce, and contact center teams
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Invoca is the recognized leader in conversation intelligence AI that enables marketing, e-commerce, and contact center teams to drive efficient and profitable revenue growth by unlocking actionable insights from customer conversations. Through deep integrations with leading technology platforms, teams can turn conversation data into automated action to enhance every digital touchpoint and human interaction, leading to better experiences, more conversions, and higher revenue. With Invoca, top consumer brands, including AutoNation, DIRECTV, Mayo Clinic, Mutual of Omaha, and Verizon, experience unbelievable results powered by undeniable data. Invoca has raised $184M from leading venture capitalists, including Upfront Ventures, Accel, Silver Lake Waterman, H.I.G. Growth Partners, and Salesforce Ventures. For more information, visit www.invoca.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Iterable
Descriptive AI.description: Iterable is an AI-powered communication platform that improves customer retention with its marketing.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Iterable is the AI-powered communication platform that organizations trust to build deeper customer relationships through personalized, real-time engagement. With Iterable, leading brands like Priceline, Fabletics, Blockchain, and Box deliver seamless cross-channel experiences by turning data into action and continuously optimizing for maximum impact. Because the future of marketing isn’t about sending more campaigns—it’s about creating moments that matter. Learn more at www.iterable.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Iyuno-SDI
Descriptive AI.description: Iyuno-SDI Group is the media and entertainment industry service provider.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Iyuno-SDI Group is the media and entertainment industry service provider.

Descriptive AI.name: Jasper
Descriptive AI.description: Jasper is an AI platform specifically designed for marketing, enabling users to generate high-quality content.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Jasper is an AI platform specifically designed for marketing, enabling users to generate high-quality content at a significantly faster rate. It automates various marketing processes and enhances brand experience. The company provides tools for creating a wide range of content, including blog posts, social media updates, and marketing copy, leveraging advanced AI technology. It features a text-to-image generator that allows users to create visually appealing, on-brand images based on textual descriptions.

Descriptive AI.name: Kalshi
Descriptive AI.description: Kalshi is a regulated prediction market where users trade event-based contracts tied to real-world outcomes.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Kalshi is a federally regulated financial exchange that allows investors to trade directly on the anticipated outcome of future events. Kalshi’s markets cover a wide range of topics, including economics, international affairs, media and entertainment, climate/weather, and public health. Because Kalshi’s market topics can be more specific than those of other instruments, such as stocks or bonds, investors can gain direct exposure to the events and trends that interest them.

Descriptive AI.name: KoBold Metals
Descriptive AI.description: KoBold Metals is an AI-powered critical mineral startup that discovers essential materials for electric vehicles and renewable energy.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: KoBold Metals invests in battery materials projects across the globe by combining basic ore-deposit science, big data, and scientific computing with patient private capital. The company's software uses datasets with conventional geochemical, geophysical, and geological data in statistical association models to identify prospects to ensure a cobalt supply for the electric vehicle revolution, enabling mineral exploration companies to find new sources of cobalt through machine learning and data analysis.

Descriptive AI.name: Komodo Health
Descriptive AI.description: Komodo Health is an IT firm that specializes in data engineering, life sciences, artificial intelligence, and machine intelligence services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Komodo Health develops computer software that brings transparency and market intelligence to healthcare and life sciences. Its software platform applies artificial intelligence and other advanced data science techniques to its Healthcare Map. The company empowers a multitude of healthcare stakeholders life science companies, healthcare payers and providers, patient advocacy groups, and others to create a more cost-effective, value-driven healthcare system.

Descriptive AI.name: Kong
Descriptive AI.description: Kong is a cloud-native platform that powers API-led connectivity for developer productivity, automating security, and microservices.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Kong develops cloud API technologies that allow organizations to build AI applications while ensuring centralized API security, governance, and visibility across all services. It is an API platform that develops cloud API technologies to help with productivity, automate security, and push the performance of APIs.

Descriptive AI.name: Krutrim
Descriptive AI.description: Krutrim is a technology company that provides an AI-based platform to develop and support the operations of the mobility industry.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Krutrim SI Designs is an artificial intelligence (AI) firm that aims to focus on creating silicon chips and building a cloud infrastructure. The company is dedicated to constructing the nation's inaugural comprehensive AI computing infrastructure.

Descriptive AI.name: Kunlun
Descriptive AI.description: Kunlun is an artificial intelligence chip designer and manufacturer.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Kunlun is an artificial intelligence chip designer and manufacturer.

Descriptive AI.name: Lambda
Descriptive AI.description: Lambda is a cloud-based platform that provides high-performance GPU hardware and cloud infrastructure for AI model training and inference.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Lambda provides GPU-powered hardware, cloud, and software solutions tailored for AI model development, training, fine-tuning, inference, and deployment. Its offerings include on-demand GPU cloud instances and multi-node clusters, desktop and server workstations equipped with NVIDIA GPUs, a curated software stack for seamless integration of ML tools, and consulting services that help build scalable ML infrastructure and workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: LangChain
Descriptive AI.description: LangChain is a platform that provides open-source frameworks and tools for engineering and deploying language model agents.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: LangChain offers a comprehensive platform designed for the entire agent engineering lifecycle, enabling teams to build and ship reliable agents to production. Its open-source products include the LangChain framework for pre-built architecture and model integrations, and LangGraph for building custom agent workflows. The platform features LangSmith, which provides observability and tracing for debugging, evaluation tools to improve agent quality with test sets and feedback, and deployment infrastructure built for long-running workloads and human oversight.

Descriptive AI.name: Legora
Descriptive AI.description: Legora is a collaborative AI that empowers lawyers by enabling them to review documents, conduct research, and draft legal materials.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Legora is a collaborative AI that empowers lawyers by enabling them to review documents, conduct research, and draft legal materials. The platform aims to empower lawyers by automating repetitive tasks and streamlining workflows, ultimately enhancing productivity in legal practices. Legora acts as a genuine collaborator with clients, accompanying them from the initial interaction through to a comprehensive company implementation and further. This approach guarantees that Legora’s solutions are closely aligned with client requirements and that engagement is extensive and profound from the outset; ensuring that the technology is accepted by everyone from junior lawyers to managing partners within organizations.

Descriptive AI.name: Lendbuzz
Descriptive AI.description: Lendbuzz is a car financing platform that helps consumers with thin U.S. credit history obtain financing for their car purchase.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Lendbuzz develops an AI-based auto finance platform for people with a thin or no credit history. It helps consumers with a thin or no credit history obtain financing when purchasing a car. Powered by machine learning and proprietary algorithms, Lendbuzz is able to better assess the creditworthiness of consumers with limited credit history, who are underserved by traditional banks. By partnering with auto dealerships, Lendbuzz is able to offer consumers attractive financing solutions and dealerships are able to close additional business opportunities and serve a more diversified client base. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.

Descriptive AI.name: Lightmatter
Descriptive AI.description: Lightmatter develops photonic chips that enable data processing and communication using light instead of electricity.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Lightmatter designs photonic chips that enable data processing and communication through light. The company focuses on light-based technology for computing tasks. Lightmatter serves sectors including artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and telecommunications.

Descriptive AI.name: Lila Sciences
Descriptive AI.description: Lila Sciences creates a scientific superintelligence platform and autonomous labs for life sciences, chemistry, and materials science.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Lila Sciences is a platform that uses artificial intelligence to support research in life sciences, chemical sciences, and materials sciences. It develops AI-driven tools and autonomous labs to improve research efficiency and facilitate scientific discoveries. The platform is designed to enhance various aspects of the scientific method and contribute to advancements in technology and innovation.

Descriptive AI.name: Liquid AI
Descriptive AI.description: Build efficient general-purpose AI at every scale.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Liquid AI is a technology company that develops artificial intelligence solutions for various applications. It focuses on creating tools for data analysis and decision-making processes. Liquid AI serves industries such as finance, healthcare, and logistics.

Descriptive AI.name: LiveKit
Descriptive AI.description: LiveKit provides a cloud platform that enables developers to build, deploy, and manage real-time communication and AI-driven applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: LiveKit provides an open-source framework and cloud platform that enables developers to build, deploy, and manage real-time communication and AI-driven applications involving voice, video, and data streams. The company’s tools abstract the complexity of WebRTC infrastructure by offering scalable media routing, session management, and SDKs for platforms such as web, iOS, Android, and backend environments, supporting low-latency interaction across diverse use cases. LiveKit’s platform includes features to support AI agent development, multimodal communication, telephony integration, and real-time conferencing that help engineering teams incorporate interactive media into applications without building the underlying transport layer from scratch. Its offering allows teams to choose between self-hosting or using a globally managed cloud service with consistent APIs, enabling a unified development experience across deployment models. LiveKit’s capabilities also extend to real-time data exchange, encryption, and adaptive streaming features that support secure and responsive applications. The company works with developers to integrate its communication layer into solutions such as collaborative tools, live streaming, customer support interfaces, and AI voice agents that interact through audio and video in real time.

Descriptive AI.name: LogicMonitor
Descriptive AI.description: LogicMonitor is a hybrid observability platform that provides IT observability and monitoring for cloud-based IT infrastructures.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: LogicMonitor is a hybrid observability platform that provides IT observability and monitoring for physical virtual, and cloud-based IT infrastructures. Its platform helps improve IT and prevent issues with SaaS-based automated monitoring with advanced features for infrastructure, applications, and business services.

Descriptive AI.name: Loop AI Group
Descriptive AI.description: Enterprise AI agents powered by custom SLMs. Trained on your data. Running on your infrastructure. No vendor lock-in. Since 2012.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: From DARPA and SRI research to leading the AI revolution, since 2012 a journey of scientific rigor and bold innovation, Loop AI Group stands as a research-driven applied lab and the world’s first independent AI company.

Descriptive AI.name: Lovable
Descriptive AI.description: Lovable provides an AI-driven platform enabling users to generate and deploy web applications and websites from natural language prompts.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Lovable is a software technology company that provides an AI-driven platform enabling users to generate and deploy web applications and websites from natural language prompts. Its platform accepts conversational text descriptions and uses artificial intelligence to produce full-stack code, handling elements such as frontend interfaces, backend logic, databases, authentication, and deployment workflows without requiring manual coding. The solution supports rapid prototyping and iterative development with features like live previews, conversational planning, database integration, and version control to help teams turn ideas into functioning software. Lovable’s tools are designed to serve both technical and non-technical users, providing options to refine and export generated code or collaborate within the platform’s environment. The company also offers integrations with external services and development workflows to align with broader software projects and operational needs. Lovable continues to evolve its platform to streamline application creation and reduce barriers to building digital products using natural language inputs.

Descriptive AI.name: Lucid Software
Descriptive AI.description: Lucid Software is a visual collaboration suite that helps teams implement an idea into reality and game-changing solutions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Lucid is the only visual collaboration suite that helps teams see and build the future from idea to reality. Its products, Lucidchart and Lucidspark, provide users with an end-to-end experience that allows teams to truly see and build the future, by enabling collaboration and clear communication. Lucidspark is a virtual whiteboard application for freeform ideation, group brainstorming, and real-time team collaboration. Lucidchart is an intelligent diagramming application that empowers teams to clarify complexity, align their insights, and build the future—faster. Lucid products are utilized in over 180 countries by over 30 million users, including customers like Google, GE, NBC Universal Johnson & Johnson, and ninety-nine percent of the Fortune 500. Lucid's partners include industry leaders such as Google, Atlassian, Amazon Web Services, Salesforce, and Microsoft. Since the Utah-based company's founding in 2010, it has received numerous awards for its product, business, and workplace culture.

Descriptive AI.name: Luma AI
Descriptive AI.description: Luma AI develops tools that let users generate photorealistic images and videos from text, image, or video prompts.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Luma AI develops tools that let users generate photorealistic images and videos from text, image, or video prompts via its Dream Machine platform. Its models learn from multimodal data, including video, audio, and language to build “world models” that can reason about motion, context, and physics. It provides access through a web app, iOS app, and API, enabling creative professionals to scale visuals for storytelling, advertising, animation, gaming, and more. For enterprises, Luma offers a secure full-stack solution with data ownership, legal clarity, and customizable AI models.

Descriptive AI.name: MainFunc
Descriptive AI.description: MainFunc is an AI company delivering autonomous automation for SMEs and is the maker of Genspark, an AI workspace that streamlines tasks.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: MainFunc is a technology company building AI‑driven productivity tools, with a focus on enabling users, including knowledge workers and teams, to get real work done via autonomous AI agents. The company’s flagship product is Genspark, an AI workspace that automates tasks by collecting information from web searches, emails, meetings, and calls, processing it through a “Super Agent” that orchestrates many specialized AI sub‑agents, and generating outputs like full reports, slide decks, spreadsheets, or even prototype applications. In addition to productivity automation, MainFunc markets Genspark as an enhanced search and research tool: when users query the web, Genspark generates consolidated, bias‑reduced summaries using multiple underlying large‑language or multimodal models rather than relying on traditional keyword‑based ranking.

Descriptive AI.name: MaintainX
Descriptive AI.description: MaintainX provides a CMMS/EAM platform that streamlines maintenance, work orders, and asset management for industrial and frontline teams.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: MaintainX offers software for maintenance and asset management, aiming to prevent equipment downtime and regulatory interruptions. The platform includes features for work order management, preventive maintenance, reporting, and parts inventory. It helps businesses manage assets, standardize practices, and gain insights from operational data.

Descriptive AI.name: Mashgin
Descriptive AI.description: Mashgin is a software company that makes AI and computer vision checkout systems.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mashgin's builds A.I. based self-checkout systems that are deployed widely across thousands of locations including most of the top stadiums, airports and venues in the United States. The technology is also deployed widely across thousands of gas stations and convenience stores in the US. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Palo Alto, California. Mashgin is growing and is extremely profitable.

Descriptive AI.name: Meero
Descriptive AI.description: Meero is a photo creation company that offers AI-powered photography production, quality check, and enhancement solutions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Founded in 2016, Meero aims to revolutionize the world of photography by allowing photographers to dedicate themselves to their passion. From providing revenues and market research to invoicing, post-production, and delivery, Meero takes care of all the laborious, time-consuming tasks which plague the industry.  Above all, the company aims to provide them with tools for file compatibility, CRM, marketing, and other daily needs. In addition to this, they'll have access to a series of educational masterclasses, inspiring documentaries, meetups with photographers in 35 different countries, a magazine in 2 different languages, and even a foundation supporting photography worldwide. Meero also solves a major problem in the world of photography: photo editing. Normally 60 minutes of actual shooting will take up to 4 hours of extra post-production work. The cutting-edge content enrichment technologies the company is currently developing can reduce this time to a few seconds, solving the problems of long delivery times, inconsistent photo rendering and unfair prices. Meero further gives artists the chance to work with major brands and take advantage of a whole range of solutions that simplify their work and make the production of beautiful images far easier. These innovations allow brands, and soon individual consumers, to access made-to-measure photo and video solutions around the world. Meero manages the photoshoot process from beginning to end, guaranteeing unbeatable prices, delivery times of less than 24 hours and professional photo quality. Today Meero is: - The world's leading on-demand photography platform - A suite of tools dedicated to photographers' activities; masterclasses, a magazine in four different languages, inspiring documentaries, a community of artists, and a foundation in support of photography - The leader in image-processing artificial intelligence - 60,000 photographers around the world - 800 team members of 49 different nationalities - 1 Photoshoot delivered every 25 seconds - 6 offices: Paris, New York, Los Angeles, Tokyo, Bangalore, Singapore

Descriptive AI.name: MegaRobo
Descriptive AI.description: MegaRobo is an AI and robotics company that specializes in the fields of life sciences, clinical diagnosis, and applied chemistry.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: MegaRobo is an AI and robotics company that specializes in the fields of life sciences, clinical diagnosis, and applied chemistry. They focus on the research and development of robotics and artificial intelligence technology and deeply integrate it into industry applications to provide customers with advanced intelligent automation products and solutions.  MegaRobo was founded in 2016 and is based in Beijing, China.

Descriptive AI.name: MEGVII
Descriptive AI.description: Megvii builds AI Engine, a core fundamental technology powering various AI application.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Incorporated in 2011, Megvii is committed to make greatest value for customers and the whole society with extraordinary technology. Megvii is an Artificial Intelligence company specialized in providing enterprises and developers with intelligent solutions and data services, and is dedicated to the mission of “Create machines that can see and think”. Based on its original deep learning system Brain++, Megvii seeks to build AI Engine, a core fundamental technology powering various AI application. It is leveraging on recognition, control, optimization and other algorithms to connect individuals, objects and scenarios, building a product platform of IoT OS. It is connecting standardized hardware like sensors, robots and personal devices with AI+IoT (AIoT), thus commercializing three application-oriented IoT brains on a large scale, namely, city brain, supply chain brain, and personal life brain. Megvii is building an operation system for the era of AIoT. Megvii is an  AIoT solutions expert.

Descriptive AI.name: Mercor
Descriptive AI.description: Mercor is an AI-based hiring platform that improves the recruitment process by matching talent with opportunities tailored to their skills.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mercor presents an AI-powered platform that helps connect domain experts with roles in AI and other tech disciplines. It supports sourcing, vetting, and payment for talent, offering remote, expert-level assignments across fields like software engineering, consulting, data and legal. Additionally, the platform includes an interview preparation section where candidates can access hundreds of expert-reviewed mock interviews in areas such as software, design, security and analytics. Mercor uses machine-driven interview tools to assess candidate performance, aiming to streamline how expertise is matched to project work.

Descriptive AI.name: Metropolis
Descriptive AI.description: Metropolis is an AI and computer vision start-up built to modernize parking and empower the future of mobility.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Metropolis develops artificial intelligence and computer vision technology designed to simplify real-world transactions. The company’s platform enables frictionless interactions between people and physical environments by using visual recognition and data processing tools. Its primary focus is on transforming parking operations, allowing users to enter and exit parking facilities without manual payments or tickets. Metropolis applies its AI technology to automate identification, payment, and access processes, creating seamless and efficient mobility experiences.

Descriptive AI.name: Miro
Descriptive AI.description: Miro is a visual collaboration platform that provides an intuitive, engaging, and in-person collaboration experience for every team.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Miro is an online, visual collaboration platform designed to unlock creativity and accelerate innovation among teams of all kinds. The platform’s infinite canvas enables teams to lead engaging workshops and meetings, design products, brainstorm ideas, and more. Miro, co-headquartered in San Francisco and Amsterdam, serves more than 50M users worldwide, including 99% of the Fortune 100.

Descriptive AI.name: Mistral AI
Descriptive AI.description: Mistral AI is an AI platform that provides large language models and AI services tailored to diverse enterprise applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mistral AI presents a suite of configurable large language models and AI services tailored for diverse enterprise applications. It offers both open-weight and commercially licensed models that support tasks such as advanced reasoning, code generation, multitasking across modalities, and chatbot interactions. The company delivers full-stack AI capabilities, spanning model customization, deployment via APIs, agent-based automation, and scalable infrastructure, enabling integration into existing enterprise systems. Responses draw on publicly available technical information and aim for clarity and neutrality.

Descriptive AI.name: Mobvoi
Descriptive AI.description: Mobvoi develops technologies in Chinese language speech recognition, natural language processing, and vertical mobile search.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mobvoi, also known as Chumenwenwen, operates as an artificial intelligence company that develops technologies in Chinese language speech recognition, natural language processing, and vertical mobile search. It offers Chinese Smart Watch Operating System that features mobile intelligence voice search for iOS, Android, Android Wear, Google Glass, and Wechat.  Mobvoi has a strategic agreement with The Volkswagen Group. Li Yuanyuan, Li Zhifei, and Zhu Yizhou founded it in 2012, with its headquarters in Beijing in China.

Descriptive AI.name: Modular
Descriptive AI.description: Modular provides AI infrastructure for deployment, serving, and programming GPUs.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Modular provides an AI infrastructure platform designed for GPU portability and unparalleled performance in AI workloads. The platform features serverless inference endpoints, fine-tuning services, and training clusters to simplify the journey from AI development to production. Modular offers solutions for high-speed LLM serving and cross-hardware stack management for NVIDIA and AMD environments.

Descriptive AI.name: Moka
Descriptive AI.description: Moka is a SaaS-based HR platform that allows companies to optimize recruitment services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Moka is a SaaS software that helps companies optimize their recruiting services and find the right talent for their business. MokaHR is designed to summarize and analyze the resume information characteristics of a large number of job seekers using resume analysis techniques and machine learning algorithms. Through the local semantic analysis and pattern matching of important information in resumes, MokaHR learns a large number of enterprises' recruitment behavior data and conducts big data Statistics and analysis, so as to help enterprises to better understand the industry trends, to better identify the right candidates, and hiring key points to give guidance, to bring more accurate data analysis, the formation of data network effects.

Descriptive AI.name: Momenta
Descriptive AI.description: Momenta develops software systems for autonomous driving and driver assistance using artificial intelligence and data-driven algorithms.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Momenta is a technology company that develops software systems for autonomous driving and driver assistance using artificial intelligence and data-driven algorithms. The company builds perception, planning, and control software that enables vehicles to interpret road conditions, recognize objects, and make driving decisions in real time. Momenta supports both advanced driver assistance systems and higher levels of autonomous driving through a unified data and algorithm framework. Its platform uses large-scale data collection and simulation to continuously train and validate driving models across varied traffic scenarios. Momenta collaborates with automotive manufacturers and mobility providers to integrate autonomous driving software into passenger vehicles and commercial applications.

Descriptive AI.name: Moonshot AI
Descriptive AI.description: Moonshot AI seeks solutions in transforming energy into intelligence and generating intelligence with users through its product offerings.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: MoonShot AI seeks solutions in transforming energy into intelligence and generating intelligence with users through its product offerings. The key members of the founding team have been actively involved in the research and development of numerous prominent models, including Google Gemini, and Google Bard.

Descriptive AI.name: Morning Consult
Descriptive AI.description: Morning Consult is a global decision intelligence company changing how modern leaders make smarter, faster, and better decisions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Morning Consult is a global decision intelligence company changing how modern leaders make smarter, faster, better decisions. The company pairs its proprietary high-frequency data with applied artificial intelligence to better inform decisions on what people think and how they will act. It was founded in 2014 and headquartered in Washington, District of Columbia.

Descriptive AI.name: Motive
Descriptive AI.description: Motive is a fleet management and driver safety platform that helps improve the safety, productivity, and profitability of fleet operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Motive develops technology that connects and automates physical operations for businesses across various industries. The company provides a platform that combines telematics, fleet management, compliance tools, equipment monitoring, and AI-powered safety solutions. Its products help companies track vehicles, monitor driver behavior, automate workflows, and ensure regulatory compliance through real-time data and analytics. Motive also offers integrated solutions for spend management and maintenance, enabling businesses to control costs and improve operational efficiency. The platform supports diverse sectors including trucking, construction, oil and gas, and agriculture by centralizing data and enabling actionable insights. Through automation and visibility, Motive helps organizations optimize asset utilization and enhance decision-making in day-to-day operations.

Descriptive AI.name: Mu Sigma
Descriptive AI.description: Mu Sigma offers management consulting services designed to provide decision sciences and big data analysis.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mu Sigma offers data analytics services and develops decision support system tools and software for Fortune 500 organizations. It offers marketing analytics, such as marketing measurement, product/customer segmentation and profiling, prospecting, RFM analysis, purchase likelihood analysis, cross-sell/up-sell analysis, loyalty/customer lifetime modeling, churn analysis/retention modeling, brand/customer equity analysis, customer satisfaction analysis, marketing mix modeling and optimization, and others.  Mu Sigma also provides risk analytics, such as predictive modeling of claims, credit scoring, fraud detection and prediction, foreclosure prediction, rating structures, loss ratio analysis, risk based pricing, statistical analysis for FDA trials, elasticity/sensitivity/scenario/what if analysis, collection and recovery analytics, extreme event modeling, and others. Moreover, it offers supply chain analytics, which include trend plotting, demand/manpower forecasting, location allocation decision making, inventory management, sourcing/capacity/materials/transport optimization, stock replenishment analysis, due date quoting, expediting optimization, logistics and distribution analysis, vendor managed inventory systems, and others.  Mu Sigma serves companies operating in airline, hospitality and entertainment, pharmaceuticals and healthcare, BFSI, CPG, retail, technology, and telecom industries. Dhiraj C. Najaram founded it in 2004, with its headquarters in Bengaluru in India.

Descriptive AI.name: Multiverse
Descriptive AI.description: Multiverse is the upskilling platform for AI and Tech adoption.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Multiverse is the upskilling platform for AI and Tech adoption. Multiverse has partnered with over 1,500 companies in the US & UK to deliver a new kind of learning that’s transforming the workforce through tech skills. Multiverse apprenticeships are for people of any age or career stage and focus on critical AI, data and tech skills. Multiverse learners have driven $2bn + ROI for their employers, using the skills they’ve learned to improve productivity and measurable performance.

Descriptive AI.name: n8n
Descriptive AI.description: N8n is a workflow automation tool that integrates AI capabilities with business process automation.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: N8n provides a flexible AI workflow automation platform that supports building and integrating multi-step AI agents and applications. The tool is designed for technical teams, offering options for drag-and-drop building or code-based customization. N8n offers self-hosting capability, allowing users to deploy on-premise, or use a hosted cloud-based version with over 500 integrations.

Descriptive AI.name: Neko Health
Descriptive AI.description: Neko Health develops scanning technology for preventive healthcare and early detection.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Neko Health is a health-tech company focused on creating a healthcare system that emphasizes preventive measures and early detection of health issues. The company has developed a new medical scanning technology that enables broad, non-invasive health data collection, making health checks convenient and affordable.

Descriptive AI.name: Neo4j
Descriptive AI.description: Neo4j helps organizations find hidden patterns and relationships across billions of data connections deeply, easily, and quickly.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Neo4j, the Graph Database & Analytics leader, helps organizations find hidden patterns and relationships across billions of data connections deeply, easily, and quickly. Customers leverage the structure of their connected data to reveal new ways of solving their most pressing business problems, from fraud detection, customer 360, knowledge graphs, supply chain, personalization, IoT, network management, and more – even as their data grows. Neo4j’s full graph stack delivers powerful native graph storage with native vector search capability, data science, advanced analytics, and visualization, with enterprise-grade security controls, scalable architecture,e and ACID compliance. Neo4j’s dynamic open-source community brings together over 250,000 developers, data scientists, and architects across hundreds of Fortune 500 companies, government agencies, and NGOs. Visit neo4j.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Netradyne
Descriptive AI.description: Netradyne engages in improving fleet safety through computer vision and in-depth data analysis.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Netradyne engages in improving fleet safety through computer vision and in-depth data analysis. Through processing visual and sensory inputs, the company targets industries where the timeliness of actionable data is a key differentiator of performance. There is a continuing technology movement that is driving rapid improvements in camera technology together with reductions in the cost of sensors, processing, and connectivity. These improvements, along with advancements in deep learning technology, have created a perfect opportunity to deliver vision-based solutions across multiple industries.

Descriptive AI.name: NewsBreak
Descriptive AI.description: NewsBreak is the leading platform that connects people with the information that truly matters, through technology
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: NewsBreak is the leading platform for local news and information, with more than 40 million users across America. NewsBreak provides community-focused news and information from over 10,000 sources in a timely and accessible way. NewsBreak also builds intelligent monetization solutions and campaign optimization tools that help publishers unlock new revenue streams and enable businesses to reach their communities.  Founded in 2015 and headquartered in Mountain View, California, NewsBreak reached unicorn status in 2021.

Descriptive AI.name: Nimble Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Nimble Robotics is an AI robotics and e-commerce fulfillment technology company, automating the processes of picking and packing products.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Nimble Robotics specializes in AI-driven robots that automate the processes of picking and packing products, significantly enhancing efficiency in logistics. The company provides a complete eCommerce and omni-channel fulfillment service, allowing merchants to streamline their operations.

Descriptive AI.name: Nirvana Insurance
Descriptive AI.description: Nirvana Insurance offers A-rated commercial trucking insurance using telematics to enhance safety and reduce costs.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Nirvana Insurance is an AI-driven commercial trucking insurer that utilizes telematics data to enhance safety and reduce fleet costs. The company leverages artificial intelligence and telematics data to offer personalized insurance solutions that reward safe driving practices. Nirvana provides tailored policies for both fleet and non-fleet operators, including options such as auto liability, auto physical damage, general liability, and motor truck cargo coverage. By analyzing telematics data, Nirvana offers upfront discounts of up to 20% for safe driving behaviors. Their Safety Intelligence Platform delivers AI-powered insights to help fleets enhance safety and efficiency. Utilizing real-time data, Nirvana streamlines the claims process, enabling faster resolutions and reducing downtime for drivers.

Descriptive AI.name: Noon
Descriptive AI.description: Noon is an e-commerce platform and digital marketplace that offers products and services across multiple categories.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Noon is a technology company with a simple mission: to be the best place to buy and sell things. In doing this, Noon hopes to accelerate the digital economy of the Middle East, empowering regional talent and businesses to meet the full range of consumers' online needs. Starting in 2017 with noon.com, the region’s homegrown e-commerce platform and leading online shopping destination, noon is now a digital ecosystem of products and services - noon, noon Daily, noon food, NowNow, SIVVI, noon VIP, noon payments, and noon pay.

Descriptive AI.name: Zyphra
Descriptive AI.description: Zyphra is superintelligence research and product company based in San Francisco, California.

Descriptive AI.name: ZYBER 365
Descriptive AI.description: ZYBER 365 develops a sustainable AI chain for a cyber-secure Web3 OS.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: ZYBER 365 develops a sustainable AI chain for a cyber-secure Web3 OS. They provide an operating system that is reliable, decentralized, safe online, and adheres to the core values of environmental sustainability.

Descriptive AI.name: Zuoyebang
Descriptive AI.description: Zuoyebang is an online education platform that provides quality educational products and services to k12 students.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Zuoyebang is an online education startup that provides educational products and services to students in primary and high school. The platform that it offers is utilizing artificial intelligence which enables students to upload their homework questions and search for answers for their study-related problems. It is also providing online courses, live lessons, and homework help for kindergarten to 12th-grade students. Zuoyebang is backed by Chinese search firm Baidu as well as its investors which includes Alibaba Group, Tiger Global Management, SoftBank Vision Fund, Sequoia Capital China, and FountainVest Partners. Hou Jianbin founded the company in Beijing, Beijing, China in 2014.

Descriptive AI.name: Zhuoyu Technology
Descriptive AI.description: Zhuoyu Technology is a high-end intelligent driving solution provider company.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Zhuoyu Technology is a high-end intelligent driving solution provider that specialises in the research and development of intelligent driving systems as well as self-developed core components. It has given flexible and diverse high-end intelligent driving solutions for passenger cars of various price points and power types, assisting partners in lowering the threshold for mass manufacturing of intelligent driving.

Descriptive AI.name: Zeta
Descriptive AI.description: Zeta is a banking technology company that provides credit and debit card issuance, core banking, lending, and digital banking services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Headquartered in San Francisco, California, Zeta was named by Celent in 2023 as being among the likeliest partners for US banks and credit unions looking to modernize to a next-gen issuer processing platform. With our marquee credit card ranked #2 by American cardholders, Zeta is already acknowledged by leading issuers as the go-to platform for market-leading credit card experiences. Globally, Zeta is recognized as a next-gen banking technology company. Our platform enables financial institutions to launch extensible and compliant banking asset and liability products, across cards, loans and deposits, rapidly. Our cloud-native and fully API-enabled stack supports processing, issuing, lending, core banking, fraud, loyalty, digital banking apps, and many other capabilities. Zeta has 1700+ employees with over 70% in technology roles across locations in the US, Middle East, and Asia, with regional headquarters in Mumbai, India. Globally, customers have issued 25M+ cards on our platform.

Descriptive AI.name: Zelos
Descriptive AI.description: Zelos is an AI-driven startup is the way in autonomous driving technology.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Zelos is an AI-driven startup is the way in autonomous driving technology. Its primary focus is on developing software and hardware that is centered around AI. Zelos offers intra-city autonomous transportation technologies, infrastructure, and optimal business models.

Descriptive AI.name: Yuanfudao
