Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Placer.ai offers a traffic analytics platform that allows anyone with a stake in the physical world to instantly generate insights into any property for a deeper understanding of the factors that drive success. Its platform also empowers professionals in retail, commercial real estate, hospitality, and economic development. Placer.ai was founded in 2016 and headquartered in Los Altos, California.

Descriptive AI.name: Pilot
Descriptive AI.description: Pilot is a platform that offers bookkeeping, tax, and CFO services for growing businesses.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Pilot offers bookkeeping, tax, and CFO services for growing businesses. The company's platform offers accurate financial reports and automated accrual basis bookkeeping to produce on-demand and error-free reports, enabling businesses to reduce time, cost, and labor associated with traditional outsourced bookkeeping practices.

Descriptive AI.name: Physical Intelligence
Descriptive AI.description: Physical Intelligence is an AI company developing machine learning for robots and other physical devices.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Physical Intelligence is a company working on integrating general-purpose AI with robotics and physical devices. It develops foundation models and learning algorithms for robots to allow industries to perform tasks across various applications.

Descriptive AI.name: Phenom
Descriptive AI.description: Phenom is an HR technology company that uses AI to help businesses hire, develop, and retain employees.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Phenom is a purpose-driven company that delivers AI-powered talent experiences to global enterprises. Employers are using Phenom to hire employees faster develop them to their full potential, and retain them longer.  The Phenom Intelligent Talent Experience platform seamlessly connects candidates, employees, recruiters, hiring managers, HR, and HRIS — empowering over 500 diverse and global enterprises with innovative products including Phenom Career Site, Chatbot, CMS, CRM, AI Scheduling, One-Way Interviews, Campaigns, University Recruiting, Talent Marketplace, Career Pathing, Gigs, Mentoring, and Referrals. With Phenom, candidates find and choose jobs faster, employees develop their skills and evolve, recruiters become wildly productive, managers build stronger-performing teams, HR aligns employee development with company goals, and HRIS creates a holistic tech infrastructure through seamless integrations.

Descriptive AI.name: Perplexity
Descriptive AI.description: Perplexity is an AI-powered answer engine designed to provide accurate, real-time responses to user queries.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Perplexity provides an AI-powered information discovery and question-answering platform that combines large language models with real-time web search to deliver sourced, concise responses to user queries. The platform allows users to ask natural-language questions and receive answers that are grounded in cited sources, enabling verification and follow-up exploration. Perplexity supports multiple use cases, including general research, technical and coding queries, academic study, and business analysis, with the ability to refine questions through conversational follow-ups. Its product offerings include a free search experience and a subscription tier that adds access to advanced AI models, faster response times, file uploads, and extended research capabilities. The platform also offers tools for browsing topics, summarizing articles, comparing sources, and exploring related questions across the web. Perplexity integrates search, reasoning, and citation management into a single interface designed to replace or augment traditional keyword-based search workflows.

Descriptive AI.name: People.ai
Descriptive AI.description: People.ai is an AI platform that provides workflow-based applications to transform business activities and increase sales productivity.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: People.ai is an artificial intelligence (AI) platform for enterprise revenue. People.aihelps sales, marketing, and customer success teams uncover every revenue opportunity from every customer, by capturing all customer contacts, activity and engagement to drive actionable insights across all revenue teams. People.aiempowers sales leaders to be more effective at managing their teams and growing revenue by giving them a complete picture of sales activities and leveraging AI to deliver sales performance analytics, personalized coaching, one-on-one feedback, and pipeline reviews. The People.ai platform identifies and targets the buying group, and gives marketers a clear visualization of whom sales has spoken with, and which campaign has been successful in each opportunity.  Using this information, marketers are able to build personas and deal models in order to better target their marketing efforts and get better campaign ROI. Customer success and services teams use People.ai to ensure they are engaging with the right people when the customer is handed off to them, but more importantly, these post-sales teams are constantly looking to align their effort and activities with the right opportunities and customers, tracking the true cost to support each customer.

Descriptive AI.name: Pendo
Descriptive AI.description: Pendo is a product experience platform that specializes in software usage analytics and digital adoption solutions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Pendo is a platform that helps product managers and teams better understand how their users engage with their software products. Pendo's product experience platform enables businesses to quickly and efficiently turn product knowledge into actionable insights, ushering in a new era of businesses that prioritize products. Pendo's customers include global leaders such as Verizon, Morgan Stanley, LabCorp, OpenTable, Okta, Salesforce, and Zendesk. Pendo's Mind the Product and customer forums, sponsored events, and podcasts strive to help product and digital leaders around the world succeed. Pendo is based in Raleigh, North Carolina, with offices across the world.

Descriptive AI.name: PatSnap
Descriptive AI.description: PatSnap is a software development company that provides intellectual property and research and development services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: PatSnap is a connected innovation intelligence platform that provides IP and R&D intelligence. It is used by more than 10,000 customers in over 50 countries around the world to access market, technology, and competitive intelligence as well as patent insights needed to take products from ideation to commercialization.  The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Singapore.

Descriptive AI.name: Pathos
Descriptive AI.description: Pathos is a biotechnology company that leverages AI to accelerate oncology drug development.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Pathos is at the forefront of a novel approach to AI-driven drug development. This approach harnesses multimodal data, cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence, and profound clinical understanding to expedite the introduction of new therapies for patients. With an emphasis on Artificial Intelligence, clinical development, and implementation, Pathos is dedicated to enhancing patient outcomes by speeding up the transition from molecule to medicine.

Descriptive AI.name: Parloa
Descriptive AI.description: Parloa is an AI agent management platform that supports contact centers in automating and enhancing customer interactions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Parloa is an AI Agent Management Platform that supports contact centers in automating and enhancing customer interactions. The platform enables organizations to deploy autonomous AI agents capable of handling a wide range of customer service scenarios while also assisting human agents with real-time translation and contextual support. Parloa integrates with existing business systems, including CRM, ERP, and contact center infrastructure, enabling AI agents to access and act on relevant data during interactions. The platform incorporates simulation testing, quality assurance, and content filtering to ensure conversations remain reliable and safe. Designed for enterprise environments, Parloa focuses on high-stakes, natural customer communications where nuance and timing are critical, helping teams manage AI-driven operations at scale.

Descriptive AI.name: Parametrix.ai
Descriptive AI.description: Parametrix.ai is a game AI exploration startup that develops AI live beings and builds a virtual world.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Parametrix.ai is a game AI exploration startup that develops AI live beings and builds a virtual world. The startup provides artificial intelligence solutions to game companies by deeply integrating AI capabilities with game scenarios. It is primarily concerned with machine learning, reinforcement learning, large system engineering, and other technical fields. They expect AI bots, as virtual world natives, to co-create a rich, interesting, open, and inclusive world with humans in the most innovative way. Parametrix AI was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in China.

Descriptive AI.name: PaleBlueDot AI
Descriptive AI.description: PaleBlueDot AI is a technology company that provides cloud-based GPU infrastructure through a marketplace and dedicated computing clusters.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: PaleBlueDot AI is a technology company that provides AI cloud computing infrastructure and services connecting suppliers and users of GPU resources through a marketplace and dedicated cluster solutions. The company’s offerings include a platform for brokering unused GPU capacity to AI developers and building large-scale GPU clusters for enterprise computing workloads. Its services support deployment and scaling of AI models by enabling access to GPU resources and tools for managing compute demand. PaleBlueDot AI’s platform also incorporates capabilities to assist developers and organizations in planning and optimizing GPU deployments. The company’s model serves both early-stage technology teams and larger enterprise clients seeking tailored AI compute solutions.

Descriptive AI.name: Owkin
Descriptive AI.description: Owkin is an AI precision medicine company with a vision to find the right drug for every patient.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Owkin is a French-American startup that uses artificial intelligence to find the right treatment for every patient. Our focus is to use AI to discover and develop better treatments for unmet medical needs, starting with the fight against cancer. They use AI to identify new drug candidates, de-risk and accelerate clinical trials and build diagnostic tools that improve patient outcomes.  Using federated learning, a pioneering collaborative AI framework, Owkin enables medical and biopharma partners to unlock valuable insights from siloed datasets, while protecting patient privacy and securing proprietary data.  Owkin was co-founded by Thomas Clozel MD, a clinical research doctor and former assistant professor in clinical onco-hematology, and Gilles Wainrib, a pioneer in the field of machine learning in biology, in 2016. Owkin has raised over $255 million and became a ‘unicorn’ – a startup valued at more than $1 billion – in November 2021 through a $180 million investment from French biopharma company Sanofi.

Descriptive AI.name: OutSystems
Descriptive AI.description: OutSystems is an AI-powered low-code platform that enables businesses to develop, deploy, and manage enterprise-grade apps.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OutSystems is a global leader transforming how companies innovate through software, empowering IT leaders with a better way to build the software that matters most. The OutSystems platform helps companies develop, deploy, and maintain mission-critical applications by unifying and automating the entire software lifecycle. With OutSystems, organizations leverage generative AI to deliver software instantaneously, adapt faster to changing requirements, and reduce technical debt by building on a future-proof platform. Helping customers achieve their business goals by addressing key strategic initiatives, OutSystems delivers software up to 10x faster than traditional development. Recognized as a leader by analysts, IT executives, business leaders, and developers around the world, global brands trust OutSystems to tackle their impossible projects and turn their big ideas into software that moves their business, people, and the world forward.

Descriptive AI.name: Outreach
Descriptive AI.description: Outreach is a sales engagement platform that uses AI for predictive analytics as it relates to sales.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Outreach is a sales engagement platform that accelerates revenue growth by optimizing every interaction throughout the customer lifecycle. The platform manages all customer interactions across email, voice and social, and leverages machine learning to guide reps to take the right actions. Thousands of customers, including Cloudera, Glassdoor, Pandora, and Zillow, rely on Outreach to drive predictable and measurable growth, increase efficiency and effectiveness of customer-facing teams, and improve visibility into sales activity and performance.

Descriptive AI.name: osapiens
Descriptive AI.description: Osapiens is a technology company that provides digital systems and software solutions to automate and optimize operational workflows.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Osapiens provides enterprise software designed to help organizations manage, automate, and document operational and compliance-related workflows across complex business environments. The company offers a modular platform that supports functions such as process automation, data collection, workflow orchestration, and real-time operational visibility. Its software enables organizations to connect internal systems, suppliers, and operational data sources to maintain consistent documentation and process execution. Osapiens supports use cases including supply chain transparency, regulatory compliance management, operational monitoring, and performance tracking through configurable digital workflows. The platform integrates with existing enterprise systems and allows users to capture, validate, and analyze structured data across departments and external partners. Osapiens’ solutions are used by organizations that require coordinated process management, audit readiness, and standardized reporting across distributed operations.

Descriptive AI.name: OrCam Technologies
Descriptive AI.description: OrCam harnesses the power of artificial vision in an intuitive portable device that compensates for lost visual abilities.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OrCam harnesses the power of artificial vision in an intuitive portable device that compensates for lost visual abilities.  OrCam has created a technologically advanced device unique in its ability to provide visual aid through a discreet wearable platform and simple easy-to-use interface which serves to enhance the daily lives of people with vision loss. The OrCam device is a smart camera mounted on the frames of your eyeglasses, which “sees” text, recognizes objects and “whispers” in your ear.

Descriptive AI.name: Orbbec
Descriptive AI.description: The Orbbec mission is to create intelligent technologies for every human, everywhere through 3D image sensors and smart cameras.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Orbbec is formed by a group of top level 3D vision and artificial intelligence specialists. Orbbec is a developer and supplier of 3D motion sensor. they need more than the ability to make sense of the world around them—they need to see the world in 3D. And for intelligent computing to flourish, excellent 3D cameras that are affordably priced and universally available will be a necessity. They believe that in the future, it will be hard to remember a time when computers didn’t have 3D cameras.

Descriptive AI.name: Optibus
Descriptive AI.description: Optibus is a developer of an AI-enabled SaaS platform for planning and operating public transportation.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Optibus leverages the power of machine learning and optimization algorithms to redefine the way mass-transportation is planned and operated. Optibus’ disruptive technology drive some of the most complex transportation operations worldwide, helping to improve the quality of service, increase efficiencies, save money, and streamline operations.

Descriptive AI.name: OpenWeb
Descriptive AI.description: OpenWeb partners with publishers and brands to build audience relationships.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OpenWeb is a social engagement platform for people to elevate an open exchange of ideas across communities online. The platform utilizes AI and machine learning to incentivize healthy dialogue, decrease toxicity, and create thriving, engaged communities. OpenWeb works with more than 700 top-tier publishers and hosts 100 million active users each month. OpenWeb is on a mission to democratize and improve conversations online.  Founded in 2012, OpenWeb has over 100 employees in New York City and Tel Aviv and is backed by world-class investors including Insight Partners, AltaIR Capital, ScaleUp, Norma Investments, and Index Ventures.

Descriptive AI.name: Opentrons
Descriptive AI.description: Opentrons is a life science company that develops pipetting robot technology designed to automate experiments.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Opentrons is a developer of pipetting robot technology designed to automate experiments. Their technology is automated laboratory equipment that automates experiments by using the Python language, enabling scientific researchers to make the process faster and less tiresome.

Descriptive AI.name: OpenEvidence
Descriptive AI.description: OpenEvidence is a medical AI company that builds a search engine to support clinicians in making evidence-based decisions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OpenEvidence provides an artificial intelligence medical information platform that organizes and synthesizes peer-reviewed clinical research to help physicians access evidence-based insights for clinical decision support. Its products include an AI-powered medical search engine that quickly retrieves and cites relevant literature from major journals and tools like DeepConsult that generate comprehensive research syntheses for complex clinical questions. The platform also integrates features that support clinical documentation and evidence retrieval during patient encounters, aiming to streamline how healthcare professionals find and apply clinical evidence. OpenEvidence delivers responses grounded in sourced medical research and supports workflows that assist clinicians in evaluating and interpreting medical knowledge.

Descriptive AI.name: OpenAI
Descriptive AI.description: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company that develops advanced AI models, including ChatGPT.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company that conducts research and implements machine learning. The research organization is dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence safely and beneficially OpenAI aims to advance artificial general intelligence (AGI) that is safe, beneficial, and aligned with human values. The company focuses on creating AI systems that are capable of performing a wide range of tasks and learning autonomously from diverse data.

Descriptive AI.name: OneTrust
Descriptive AI.description: OneTrust is the AI-Ready Governance platform helping organizations accelerate innovation while ensuring responsible data use.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OneTrust is the leading platform for responsible data and AI use. Headquartered in Atlanta with global offices, OneTrust helps organizations simplify consent and preference management, automate governance across privacy, security, IT, third-party, and AI risk, and enforce policies throughout the data lifecycle. The platform unites data and risk teams to drive trusted innovation. OneTrust holds more than 300 patents and serves over 14,000 customers worldwide, including Fortune 500 companies and small businesses, across industries such as financial services, healthcare, and technology.

Descriptive AI.name: OLIX
Descriptive AI.description: OLIX designs optical AI accelerators that use light-based processors for training and inference on large models.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OLIX designs and manufactures optical processors that use light-based circuits to accelerate artificial intelligence workloads. The company develops Optical Tensor Processing Units that execute matrix and tensor operations for training and running inference on large-scale machine learning models. Its hardware aims to increase performance and reduce power consumption relative to conventional electronic accelerators by processing data in the optical domain. Flux Computing focuses on infrastructure for generative AI and advanced neural networks, targeting data centers and organizations that require intensive model computation. The product stack centers on custom optical chips integrated with supporting electronics, control software, and tools that link into existing AI frameworks. Sales and partnerships primarily address customers building large AI clusters, research environments, and emerging applications that benefit from high-throughput, low-energy computation.

Descriptive AI.name: o9 Solutions
Descriptive AI.description: O9 Solutions is a cloud-based business management platform powering digital transformations of integrated planning and operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: O9 Solutions is a cloud-based business management platform powering digital transformations of integrated planning and operations. O9 offers AI-powered planning, analytics and data platform called the Digital Brain that helps companies across industry verticals transform traditionally slow and siloed planning into smart, integrated, and intelligent planning and decision-making across the core supply chain, commercial, and P&L functions. Supported by an ecosystem of partners, O9’s innovative delivery methodology helps companies achieve quick impact in customer service, inventory levels, resource utilization, as well as ESG and financial KPIs while enabling a long-term, sustainable transformation of their end-to-end planning and decision-making capabilities.

Descriptive AI.name: Nuro
Descriptive AI.description: Nuro is a robotics company specializing in the development of autonomous driving technologies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Nuro is a robotics company specializing in the development of autonomous driving technologies for various applications, including goods delivery and passenger mobility. The company has created the Nuro Driver™, an autonomous driving system that integrates advanced software and hardware to enable Level 4 autonomous driving capabilities. This system is designed for use across multiple vehicle platforms, including passenger vehicles and delivery robots.

Descriptive AI.name: Nscale
Descriptive AI.description: Nscale provides a full-stack AI cloud platform designed for enterprise-scale workloads.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Nscale provides a full-stack AI cloud platform designed for enterprise-scale workloads. The company offers serverless inference endpoints, on-demand training clusters, and GPU-based infrastructure for model development, fine-tuning, and deployment. Its platform includes private cloud environments, bare metal clusters, and autoscaling inference solutions tailored for AI and high-performance computing tasks. Nscale also operates AI-focused data centers powered by renewable energy, supporting both sovereignty and sustainability in compute operations. Through its marketplace and pre-configured tools, it enables organizations to streamline the transition from experimentation to production in machine learning and generative AI applications.

Descriptive AI.name: NotCo
Descriptive AI.description: NotCo is a food tech company that uses artificial intelligence to create food from plants.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: NotCo is a food industry. They use technology to recreate the same products. They create food systems. They produce plant-based meat and dairy substitutes. They used artificial intelligence to make plant-based food that functions and animal-based tastes.

Descriptive AI.name: 7AI
Descriptive AI.description: 7AI provides an AI-driven cybersecurity platform that utilizes AI agents to manage the full lifecycle of security operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: 7AI provides an AI-driven cybersecurity platform that uses autonomous “agentic” security agents to manage the full lifecycle of security operations. These AI agents ingest security alerts from tools such as EDR, cloud, and identity systems, enrich and correlate the data, perform end-to-end investigations, and deliver conclusions, thereby reducing alert noise and false positives. With automation extending through detection, investigation, threat hunting, and even authorized response workflows, 7AI allows human security teams to shift focus from repetitive tasks to strategic work. The platform also offers unified incident management, real-time dashboards, and enterprise-insight reporting to contextualize threats and outcomes.

Descriptive AI.name: Affinity
Descriptive AI.description: "THE CRM FOR PRIVATE CAPITAL". Affinity is a relationship intelligence platform built to expand and evolve the traditional CRM.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Affinity is a relationship intelligence platform built to expand and evolve the traditional CRM. Affinity instantly surfaces all of your team's data and shows you who is best suited to make the crucial introductions you need to close your next big deal. Using AI and natural language processing, Affinity helps your team curate and grow its network by unlocking introductions to decision makers and auto-populating your pipeline to increase deal flow. -- Leverage your network: Map out your team's relationship graph to most effectively source the next big deal --  VCs, level up your portfolio: Ally with your portfolio companies and discover how you can introduce them to key prospects and help them raise their next round -- Startups, get the intro: Map out your team's relationship graph. Discover the entire rolodex of prospects your investors and advisors are connected to and unearth valuable introductions -- Reduce complexity: Get rid of spreadsheets for contact management and receive instant updates related to your pipeline as your team works -- Effectively manage pipeline: Keep track of meetings, manage follow-ups, and receive instant updates related to your pipeline as your team works It's time to adopt a CRM that makes your job easier and maximizes your team and investor's most valuable asset - their networks. Affinity has raised $13.5MM led by 8VC (Joe Lonsdale: Palantir, Addepar, OpenGov), Sway Ventures, Pear Ventures, Great Oaks Venture Capital & Western Technology Investment.

Descriptive AI.name: AISpeech
Descriptive AI.description: AI Speech Ltd is a high-tech start up specialized in computer speech recognition, analysis.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AISpeech is a high-tech start up specialized in computer speech recognition, analysis, tone analysis and dialog management techniques.

Descriptive AI.name: AMP
Descriptive AI.description: AMP utilizes AI-powered sortation to enhance recycling efficiency and reduce costs.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AMP’s AI-driven waste sorting solutions help optimize material recovery and recycling processes. Our waste sorting machines use real-time material characterization and high-speed sortation to increase resource recovery. As a waste sorting manufacturer, we deliver automated sortation services to enhance efficiency and reduce costs. Our technology supports plastic waste management services, fiber waste management services, metal waste management services, film waste management services, and single-stream waste management services. From MSW management services to e-waste management services, we help facilities maximize recovery rates and minimize contamination. Machining manufacturer expertise with AI-driven automation makes us a leader in waste recycling manufacturing. Get in touch to explore how we can optimize your facility.

Descriptive AI.name: Applied Compute
Descriptive AI.description: Applied Compute is an AI startup that builds custom AI models and Specific Intelligence solutions for enterprises.

Descriptive AI.name: AppZen
Descriptive AI.description: AppZen is a technology company that provides an AI-driven finance platform to automate and improve financial operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: AppZen is an artificial intelligence platform for modern finance teams, helping them to reduce spending, comply with policy, and streamline processes. It automates manual processes, uncovers problems, and optimizes decision-making for enterprises around the globe, including one-fourth of the Fortune 500. The company focuses on areas such as expense report auditing, accounts payable (AP) automation, and compliance monitoring to help finance teams reduce manual work, avoid errors, and manage risk. The platform combines patented deep learning, computer vision, and semantic analysis with intelligence from thousands of online data sources to understand financial transactions in a business context and make decisions before those transactions happen.

Descriptive AI.name: Articul8
Descriptive AI.description: Articul8 AI is an enterprise-generative AI platform that helps organizations build, deploy, and manage AI applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Articul8 is a generative artificial intelligence company that provides an enterprise software platform designed to turn complex data into actionable insights through domain-specific AI tools. It offers a full-stack GenAI system that uses a proprietary reasoning engine to assemble specialized agents and models for tasks such as engineering workflows, financial analysis, supply chain interpretation, and technical document understanding. The platform supports autonomous execution of data tasks with features for observability, traceability, and integration via APIs and customizable applications. It enables teams to deploy, tailor, and manage AI applications that align with specific industry requirements and internal data environments. Articul8’s offerings include modular AI agents and customizable templates that streamline the development of secure, domain-focused intelligence solutions.

Descriptive AI.name: Assort Health
Descriptive AI.description: Assort Health provides voice AI agents designed for healthcare call centers, enabling automation of appointment management tasks.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Assort Health delivers voice AI agents tailored for healthcare call centers, offering automation of appointment-related tasks such as scheduling, rescheduling, cancellations, triage, prescription refills, reminders, and multilingual support. These AI agents interface with clinics’ systems to follow specialty-specific rules, verify patient details, and route calls efficiently. The solution integrates with electronic health record and practice management platforms to support streamlined workflows and reduce call handling burdens. The technology activates quickly and adapts to diverse clinical specialties, helping staff focus on complex patient care instead of routine tasks.

Descriptive AI.name: Ataccama
Descriptive AI.description: Ataccama is a data trust platform that helps organizations accelerate their business initiatives with trusted, high-quality, governed data.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Ataccama ONE is an agentic data trust platform for enterprise data leaders that combines data quality, observability, lineage, governance and master data management in ONE solution to accelerate business growth, reduce cost, and mitigate risk.

Descriptive AI.name: Augment Code
Descriptive AI.description: Augment Code is an AI-powered platform for software development that provides services for chat, code completions, and guided edits.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Augment Code builds AI agents that understand entire codebases to generate, review, and manage software. It offers deep contextual code comprehension, IDE and CLI integration, and automated task coordination. Developers can also leverage semantic code analysis, remote agents, and personalized prompt suggestions to streamline complex projects.

Descriptive AI.name: Auradine
Descriptive AI.description: Auradine provides web infrastructure solutions encompassing blockchain, artificial intelligence, and privacy technologies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Auradine is a web infrastructure platform intended to offer blockchain and AI infrastructure solutions. The company provides groundbreaking software, hardware, and cloud offerings to enable scalable, sustainable, and secure solutions and has a proven track record in security, SaaS, semiconductors, and systems.

Descriptive AI.name: Auterion
Descriptive AI.description: Auterion provides a platform that unifies a diverse fleet of autonomous robots, catering to a wide range of applications and use cases.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Auterion provides software platforms and systems that enable autonomous robot and drone operations. It develops an open-source operating system (AuterionOS), management tools (Suite, Mission Control), and hardware modules (e.g. Skynode) to support fleet control, mission planning, and data integration. Auterion supports applications such as mapping, inspection, delivery, public safety, search & rescue, and coordinated drone swarms. Its products interoperate across different vehicle types and enable centralized control of multiple autonomous systems.

Descriptive AI.name: Beyond Imagination
Descriptive AI.description: Beyond Imagination develops Beomni AI, a next-generation AI brain designed to power humanoid robots and other advanced robotic systems.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Beomni AI, developed by Beyond Imagination, is a next-generation AI brain designed to power humanoid robots and other advanced robotic systems. Modeled after the way the human brain learns, Beomni AI acquires skills progressively—starting with individual tasks and advancing toward full professional capabilities across multiple domains. The company's technology is built around specialized, lightweight AI models (“Expert Minds”) that operate locally and offline, enabling robots to perform complex tasks without relying on constant cloud connectivity. Through its Hive Mind architecture, every Beomni-powered robot contributes to a shared learning network—accelerating collective intelligence across the fleet. At the core of its ecosystem is the Beomni Synthetic Brain, a proprietary AI platform that functions as a universal operating system for humanoid robotics. It enables seamless task learning, real-world adaptation, and secure, scalable deployment.

Descriptive AI.name: CalmCar Vision System
Descriptive AI.description: CalmCar enables deep learning based embedded system for complex road data recognition and localization.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: CalmCar Vehicle Vision is a Chinese intelligent driving vision system provider. They are specialized in developing intelligent vision system for ADAS, autopilot and autonomous driving with functions of Lane Departure Warning (LDW), Front Collision Warning (FCW), Pedestrian Collision Warning(PCW), Blind Spot Detection (BSD) and Traffic Sign Recognition (TSR).

Descriptive AI.name: Chalk
Descriptive AI.description: Chalk is a data platform for AI inference that provides the infrastructure needed to operationalize machine learning and AI.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Chalk is a data platform that powers machine learning and generative AI. Chalk's best-in-class developer experience enables data teams to declare features and their dependencies with idiomatic Python in online, streaming, and batch environments. Chalk compiles these definitions into parallel pipelines that run on a Rust-based engine. These pipelines use the same source code to serve temporally consistent training sets to data scientists and live feature values to models. This re-use ensures that feature values from online and offline contexts match and dramatically cuts development time. With Chalk, engineers, data scientists, and analysts can focus on their unique products while Chalk seamlessly handles data infrastructure.

Descriptive AI.name: Cleo
Descriptive AI.description: Changing the world’s relationship with money.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cleo is the world's first AI assistant that’s changing your relationship with money. She turns the complexity of your financial life into a conversation, the same kind you’d have with a friend. With a simple chat, Cleo can automate your money life and remove the stress of decision making with data-driven and deeply personal insights based on your specific needs and financial history to help you in ways your bank never could.

Descriptive AI.name: CloudTrucks
Descriptive AI.description: CloudTrucks offers a virtual trucking carrier application designed to reduce operating costs for truck drivers.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: CloudTrucks develops a virtual trucking carrier application designed to reduce operating costs for truck drivers. The platform helps to manage and book loads from brokers and shippers, offer instant payments after load delivery, and access to cheap insurance options, enabling truck owners and operators to strategize their schedule and design a revenue-maximizing driving program. The company was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

Descriptive AI.name: CodeRabbit
Descriptive AI.description: CodeRabbit offers software tools that perform automated code reviews using artificial intelligence.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: CodeRabbit offers software tools that perform automated code reviews using artificial intelligence. It inspects pull requests line by line, checks code flow and logic, enforces coding standards, runs linters and static analysis, and provides summaries of changes. It integrates with platforms like GitHub, GitLab, or Azure DevOps, and allows configuration with issue trackers such as Jira or Linear. It secures code reviews through encrypted data transmission and makes review feedback available in IDEs or via CLI. It includes features like autogenerated release notes, sprint reports, and support for both SaaS and self-hosted deployments.

Descriptive AI.name: Collaborative Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Collaborative Robotics is building robots that help in indoor and outdoor tasks alongside humans.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Collaborative Robotics is a team of innovators and builders redefining the future of human-robot interaction. A future in which robots are trustworthy extensions of the environment. They operate, adapt, and react in response.

Descriptive AI.name: Constructor
Descriptive AI.description: Constructor is an AI-enabled product search and discovery platform that provides assistance to e-commerce brands.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Constructor.io is the only search and product discovery platform tailor-made for enterprise eCommerce where conversions matter.  Constructor's cloud-based solutions use natural language processing, machine learning-enhanced results ranking, and collaborative personalization to deliver powerful user experiences across all facets of product discovery -- from search to browse, recommendations, autosuggest, quizzes, and attribute enrichment. We optimize revenue before relevance. This has allowed us to generate consistent $10M+ lifts for our customers, which include some of the biggest brands in retail like Sephora, American Eagle, Backcountry, Birkenstock, and Bonobos.  Constructor is a remote-first company with employees around the world. We were founded in 2015 by Eli Finkelshteyn and Dan McCormick.

Descriptive AI.name: Contextual AI
Descriptive AI.description: Contextual AI specializes in customizable generative AI applications with RAG 2.0 technology for the banking and media industries.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Contextual AI offers a pioneering approach to generative AI for the workplace.

Descriptive AI.name: Cosmose
Descriptive AI.description: Cosmose AI empowers oCommerce by synergizing offline and online for omnichannel and influence.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Cosmose AI empowers oCommerce by synergizing Offline and Online for Omnichannel. Their technology influences how more than 1 billion consumers shop by understanding their offline behavior, then delivers predictive analytics for businesses to optimize their marketing strategies and boost revenue. Connected to the consumer markets with high regard for privacy, shoppers and businesses alike create their own unique shopping experiences with Cosmose. Omnipresent with connections to 500K+ locations and 1B+ smartphones, Cosmose is the leader in location intelligence for its positioning accuracy (to the nearest 1.6m) and seamlessness (no hardware needed).

Descriptive AI.name: Crescendo
Descriptive AI.description: Crescendo offers a full-stack customer service platform combining the most advanced AI with a global service team.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Crescendo developed the world’s first augmented-AI customer experience (CX) platform that combines advanced AI with a global service team to deliver outcome-driven results for fast-moving, digitally-native enterprises growing quickly. With its unique approach, Crescendo offers scalable solutions that optimize both frontline and back office operations, helping companies create meaningful, personalized customer experiences.

Descriptive AI.name: David AI
Descriptive AI.description: David AI supplies audio datasets and associated services for speech, multilingual, and conversational AI applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: David AI supplies audio datasets and associated services for speech, multilingual, and conversational AI applications. Its product offerings include off-the-shelf datasets such as Converse (natural two-speaker English conversations), Atlas (multilingual, accented, and dialect-rich), Chorus (multi-speaker dialogues), and Dialog (expert domain conversations). The company also collaborates with clients to design custom data collection, labeling, and metadata pipelines to support specialized audio model training.

Descriptive AI.name: DEEPX
Descriptive AI.description: DEEPX is a Korean AI hardware system solution company.

Descriptive AI.name: Descript
Descriptive AI.description: Descript is a collaborative audio and video editor that transcribes audio to a text document for editing, training, and collaboration.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Descript is a collaborative audio and video editor that transcribes audio to a text document for editing. It also provides automated and manual transcribing solutions for voice audio files. In addition, the platform utilizes speech recognition technology to transcribe audio and video files in a short duration of time. Descript also offers AI-powered features and intuitive interface that fuel YouTube and TikTok channels, top podcasts, and businesses using video for marketing, sales, and internal training and collaboration

Descriptive AI.name: Digits
Descriptive AI.description: Digits is a fintech company that offers financial tools for small businesses.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Digits is a fintech company building tools for businesses and finance professionals by leveraging its proprietary Living Model technology. The company was founded by Wayne Chang and Jeff Seibert in 2018 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California, United States.

Descriptive AI.name: Doppel
Descriptive AI.description: Doppel is an AI-native security platform that helps organizations defend against social engineering risks and digital impersonation.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Doppel is an AI-native security platform that helps organizations defend against social engineering risks and digital impersonation. It continuously monitors threats across multiple channels, including domains, social media, paid advertising, messaging apps, and the dark web, then maps those threats into a real-time threat graph to identify attacker infrastructure. Doppel’s platform automates threat takedowns using AI and expert analysis, while its simulation product generates realistic, multi-step phishing scenarios to test and train employees across email, SMS, WhatsApp, Telegram, and more. Through its tools, Doppel enables proactive defense by disrupting malicious campaigns and building human resilience to modern, AI-driven attacks.

Descriptive AI.name: Dyna Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Dyna Robotics develops advanced robotic manipulation models to automate repetitive and stationary tasks.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Dyna Robotics develops advanced robotic manipulation models to automate repetitive and stationary tasks. The company's mission is to help businesses by automating repetitive, stationary tasks with affordable, intelligent robotic arms. Leveraging the latest advancements in foundation models, it performs a wider range of assignments with greater precision and adaptability. It also allows businesses to generalize robots across diverse tasks and environments and optimize operations.

Descriptive AI.name: Element Labs
Descriptive AI.description: Element Labs develops AI processors for inference.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Element Labs develops AI processors for inference.

Descriptive AI.name: Exa
Descriptive AI.description: Exa is a software development company that offers an AI-centered search engine tailored for automated systems and applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Exa offers an AI-centered search engine tailored for automated systems and applications, providing APIs for traditional search, content retrieval, web crawling, in-depth research, and large-scale query handling via its Websets product. It employs neural and embeddings-based indexing techniques to process semantically rich and complex queries, delivering full-page content and customizable filters to suit specific use cases.

Descriptive AI.name: Exodigo
Descriptive AI.description: Exodigo provides an AI-based platform for subsurface image mapping without physical intrusion.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Exodigo is a non-intrusive subsurface imaging platform that provides a digital geolocated 3D map of buried assets. The company utilizes a combination of multi-sensor fusion and artificial intelligence to dramatically improve accuracy and time to map while reducing damages and costs associated with unnecessary excavation. It also helps transportation, energy, utility, and construction leaders to design, dig, and build by providing accurate subsurface intelligence to derisk the underground.

Descriptive AI.name: FLYR
Descriptive AI.description: FLYR is a technology company that uses AI to help airlines and hospitality businesses.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: FLYR is a technology company that offers AI-enabled solutions that help airlines, cargo, and hospitality businesses improve their revenue performance. Its revenue management platform improves performance and modernizes the e-commerce experience through accurate forecasting, automation, and analytics.

Descriptive AI.name: FuriosaAI
Descriptive AI.description: FuriosaAI designs and develops data center accelerators for the most advanced AI models and applications.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: FuriosaAI delivers the performance for real-time AI services while achieving energy efficiency for the lowest operation cost at scale. They build the entire product on a solid core foundation because AI chips on the ground are doomed to fail when it comes to addressing the complex and rapidly changing requirement metrics of hyper scalers and enterprises.

Descriptive AI.name: General Counsel AI
Descriptive AI.description: General Counsel AI is a web-based legal AI workspace company for in-house legal teams to automate tasks and streamline operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: General Counsel AI is a web-based legal AI workspace company for in-house legal teams to automate tasks and streamline operations. The platform enables legal professionals to draft, review, and analyze documents and to respond to legal questions with a level of precision that reflects the needs of corporate legal departments. GC AI offers features such as “Easy Prompt,” which allows users to translate plain-language instructions into sophisticated legal queries, and “Exact Quote,” which provides verifiable citations for statements made by the AI. The system supports uploading and organizing company-specific knowledge bases so that its responses are tailored to the firm’s own legal context.

Descriptive AI.name: Globality
Descriptive AI.description: Globality is an AI-driven sourcing and procuremen company that utilizes advanced AI to create accurately scoped requirements.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Globality is a technology company that connects global companies with the best suppliers at the right price for any sourcing need across every service category. Globality is bringing digital transformation to the sourcing industry through its AI-powered Platform and Smart Sourcing technologies. Globality’s AI digital solution replaces the archaic analog Request for Proposal, efficiently and effectively scoping needs, managing demand, matching companies with outstanding suppliers that meet their specific service needs, and cutting the sourcing process from months to hours while delivering savings of 20% or more.

Descriptive AI.name: GumGum
Descriptive AI.description: GumGum is an Artificial Intelligence company that uses machine learning to extract value from digital content.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: GumGum is an artificial intelligence company focusing on computer vision and natural language processing. The company's mission is to unlock the value of images and videos produced everyday across the web, social media, and broadcast television. It teaches machines to solve hard problems across the media industry. The company serves contextual marketing in line with content users, helps marketers and right holders understand the media value of their sponsorship investments, and introduces the content safety analysis engine that finds what is relevant or what is dangerous. GumGum was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Santa Monica, California.

Descriptive AI.name: Hala
Descriptive AI.description: Hala is a digital financial platform for your payments.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hala offers a payment and wallet solution for individuals and point-of-sale (PoS) services that enable merchants to accept credit card payments.

Descriptive AI.name: Hammerspace
Descriptive AI.description: Hammerspace is a data platform that obliterates data access delays for AI and high-performance computing.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: ​Hammerspace is a data orchestration company that provides a global data environment , enabling enterprises to access and manage unstructured data seamlessly across on-premises data centers, public clouds, and edge infrastructures. Hammerspace aims to eliminate data silos and facilitate high-performance, globally distributed data access for applications and users.

Descriptive AI.name: Hanhou Group
Descriptive AI.description: Hanhou Group focuses on blockchain technology, AI, cloud computing, digital twin, and in-house algorithms.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hanhou Group focuses on blockchain technology, AI, cloud computing, digital twin, and in-house algorithms. It solves the problems of financial data tampering, untrustworthy data, insecure assets, and data islands in the development of the industrial Internet through distributed networking, cross-chain mode blockchain, data analysis, integration compatibility, and intelligent risk control to provide customers with credible, efficient, and data-flowable technical solutions.

Descriptive AI.name: Hebbia
Descriptive AI.description: Hebbia is an AI platform that helps companies transform heaps of information into insights.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hebbia is the interface for AGI– the first AI platform that works the way humans work. Designed to tackle even the most complex tasks, it turns prompts into processes that AI agents complete. Finance, law, government, and pharma professionals from the world’s largest institutions are using Hebbia to execute workflows with hundreds of steps over millions of documents. While other systems are a black box, Hebbia shows its work, letting users verify, trust, and collaborate with AI.

Descriptive AI.name: Hungryroot
Descriptive AI.description: Hungryroot is a provider of an artificial intelligence-powered personalized grocery service.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Hungryroot is your personal grocer, powered by AI and the belief that food deeply impacts your daily life. You tell us a little about yourself, and we use proprietary predictive technology to deliver groceries and recipes that best suit your individual needs and goals. We also assist with meal planning and nutritional support, helping you save time, save money, shop sustainably, and eat what makes you feel your best. Hungryroot is a provider of an artificial intelligence-powered personalized grocery service. Hungryroot first launched in 2015 as a better-for-you foods brand. Now six years later, Hungryroot is pioneering an entirely new way to grocery shop through predictive, personalized grocery delivery. Along with offering the best modern brands, Hungryroot continues to develop its own line of innovative healthy products, including the brand's award-winning Black Bean Brownie Batter. Check us out at: www.hungryroot.com

Descriptive AI.name: Infinitus Systems
Descriptive AI.description: AI healthcare company focused on automating complex phone-based workflows
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Infinitus Systems is an AI healthcare company that automates phone calls. By automating tedious and time-consuming phone-based processes across the healthcare ecosystem, we’re improving therapy access, adherence, and affordability for patients. Healthcare is one of the biggest contributors to the US GDP and we are on a mission to reduce the complexity and spend on back-office administration. Infinitus has raised $51.4M to date and is backed by leading growth investors Kleiner Perkins, Coatue, and Google Ventures. Learn more by visiting infinitus.ai or contact us to get started.

Descriptive AI.name: Iru
Descriptive AI.description: Iru is the AI-powered security & IT platform used by the world’s fastest-growing companies to secure their users, apps, and devices.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Iru is the AI-powered security & IT platform used by the world’s fastest-growing companies to secure their users, apps, and devices. Built for the AI era, Iru unifies identity & access, endpoint security & management, and compliance automation—collapsing the stack and giving IT & security time and control back.

Descriptive AI.name: K Health
Descriptive AI.description: K Health is a data-driven digital primary care system that uses AI to deliver personalized primary care services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: K Health is a data-driven digital primary care app that uses AI to deliver personalized primary care. The AI-powered health platform integrates data and creates a predictive model to enable its user to learn more about their personal well-being as well as help them better manage their health by comparing themselves to people with similar characteristics, gender, age, symptoms, and medical history, through a free symptom tracker. K Health is backed by Mangrove, 14W, Comcast Ventures, Lerer Hippeau, Primary Ventures, Max Ventures, The Box Group, GGV Capital, Valor Equity Partners, Kaiser Permanente, LTS Ventures, Atreides Ventures, PICO Partners, Marcy Venture Partners, and other New York and Israeli seed investors.

Descriptive AI.name: Krea
Descriptive AI.description: Krea.ai is a design tool that uses artificial intelligence to generate stunning visuals tailored to unique styles, concepts, or products.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Krea offers a browser-based platform that integrates various generative AI models to facilitate the creation, editing, and customization of images and videos. The platform provides tools such as real-time image generation, video restyling, and 3D object creation, enabling users to produce and refine visual content. Krea's user base includes professionals from organizations like Pixar, LEGO, and Samsung.

Descriptive AI.name: Labelbox
Descriptive AI.description: Labelbox is the leading data factory for AI teams.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Labelbox is the data factory for generative AI, providing high-quality, differentiated data to leading AI labs and enterprise AI teams. Labelbox’s comprehensive platform combines on-demand expert labeling services with the industry-leading data labeling platform. Labelbox’s software-first approach delivers unmatched quality, control, and efficiency, while our labeling services taps into the diverse and advanced skills of the Alignerr expert community to deliver high throughput and low response times. Labelbox customers include the majority of leading AI labs and Fortune 500 enterprises.

Descriptive AI.name: Laurel
Descriptive AI.description: Laurel automates timesheet management for legal and accounting firms using AI.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Laurel provides automated timesheet management solutions tailored for legal and accounting firms. The platform leverages artificial intelligence to capture user activities seamlessly in the background, allowing professionals to track their time without disrupting their workflow. By streamlining the time tracking process, Laurel enables firms to enhance operational efficiency and improve profitability. The software is designed to alleviate the administrative burden associated with time management, allowing users to focus on their core tasks. Additionally, Laurel continuously evolves its offerings to meet the changing needs of the professional services sector.

Descriptive AI.name: LinkSquares
Descriptive AI.description: LinkSquares is an AI-powered contract lifecycle management platform for in-house legal teams.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: LinkSquares is the leading AI-powered contract lifecycle management platform, trusted by more than 1,000 customers, including DraftKings, ProPharma, Wayfair, and the Boston Celtics. LinkSquares' advanced AI engine is uniquely designed with a proprietary blend of predictive and generative AI, specifically trained to excel with legal documents. LinkSquares revolutionizes contract management by delivering powerful analytics, minimizing organizational risk, and enhancing the speed and precision of contract workflows at every stage — unlocking greater efficiency, reliability, and strategic value for teams across the business. LinkSquares was founded in 2015, and is headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts.

Descriptive AI.name: Listen Labs
Descriptive AI.description: Listen Labs is an AI-first customer research platform that automates customer interviews and delivers actionable insights.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Listen Labs provides an AI-powered research platform that automates customer interviews to reveal what users think and why. It uses generative AI to design interview guides, recruit appropriate participants, conduct adaptive interviews, and turn responses into structured insights, themes, personas, and executive-ready reports in hours rather than weeks. The platform supports multiple languages, varied stimuli types like video and prototypes, and flexible recruitment channels including proprietary panels or clients’ own users. Teams use the platform to test product concepts, assess messaging, understand usability, and uncover user sentiment at qualitative scale with AI handling moderation and analysis.

Descriptive AI.name: Mech-Mind Robotics
Descriptive AI.description: Mech-Mind is a global leading provider of industrial 3D sensors and AI-powered software for intelligent robots.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mech-Mind is a global leading provider of industrial 3D sensors and AI-powered software for intelligent robots, with 10,000+ cameras depoyed in 50+ countries and regions. By combining 3D vision with AI technology, Mech-Mind empowers partners and system integrators to manage challenging automation tasks, such as (de)palletizing, bin picking and assembly.

Descriptive AI.name: Meltwater
Descriptive AI.description: Meltwater is a social listening platform that offers businesses insights into online reputation, industry trends, and customer behavior.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Meltwater helps companies make better, more informed decisions based on insights from the outside. We believe that business strategy will be increasingly shaped by insights from online data. Organizations will look outside, beyond their internal reporting systems to a world of data that is constantly growing and changing. Meltwater's customers use these insights to make timely decisions based on real-time analysis. More than 25,000 companies use the Meltwater media intelligence platform to stay on top of billions of online conversations, extract relevant insights, and use them to strategically manage their brand and stay ahead of their competition. With more than 50 offices on six continents, Meltwater is dedicated to personal, global service built on local expertise. Meltwater also operates the Meltwater Entrepreneurial School of Technology (MEST), a nonprofit organization devoted to nurturing future generations of entrepreneurs.

Descriptive AI.name: micro1
Descriptive AI.description: Micro1 offers an AI platform that converts human expertise into structured datasets and recruitment processes for companies.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Micro1 offers a platform that converts human expertise into structured datasets and recruitment processes for companies using AI. It provides a Data Engine that handles the recruitment of experts and manages human-in-the-loop operations to generate data used in post-training of AI models. It also provides Zara, an AI recruiter agent, which discovers, vets, and qualifies talent globally for enterprises and large-volume recruitment firms. The company maintains a Research Lab that publishes studies related to evaluating AI-assisted recruitment, speech-to-text systems, proctoring models, and other aspects of human-data integration into AI systems. It delivers APIs to access its human-data services and recruiter tools.

Descriptive AI.name: Mirage
Descriptive AI.description: Mirage is building foundation models and products that change the future of video.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mirage (formerly known as Captions) is a video-generating, video-editing and AI research company headquartered in New York City. Their first app, Captions, is available on iOS, Android, and Web and offers a suite of tools aimed at streamlining the creation and editing of videos. Their enterprise platform, Mirage Studio, generates AI actors and videos for marketing assets and video campaigns.

Descriptive AI.name: Mirantis
Descriptive AI.description: Mirantis delivers the fastest path to enterprise AI at scale, with full-stack AI infrastructure technology that streamlines operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Mirantis delivers the fastest path to enterprise AI at scale, with full-stack AI infrastructure technology that removes GPU infrastructure complexity and streamlines operations across the AI lifecycle, from Metal-to-Model. Today, all infrastructure is AI infrastructure, and Mirantis provides the end-to-end automation, enterprise security and governance, and deep expertise in Kubernetes orchestration that organizations need to reduce time to market and efficiently scale cloud native, virtualized, and GPU-powered applications across any environment – on-premises, public cloud, hybrid, or edge. Mirantis serves many of the world’s leading enterprises, including Adobe, Ericsson, Inmarsat, MetLife, PayPal, and Societe Generale. Learn more at www.mirantis.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Mutiny
Descriptive AI.description: Mutiny helps B2B companies generate pipeline and revenue from their target accounts through AI-powered personalized web experiences.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Most Marketing teams can’t play a meaningful role in breaking through to target accounts because the 1:1 marketing strategies that work don’t scale, and what scales doesn’t work. Mutiny helps B2B companies generate pipeline and revenue from their target accounts through AI-powered personalized experiences, 1:1 microsites, and account intelligence. We are backed by Sequoia Capital, Tiger Global, Insight Partners, and Y Combinator.

Descriptive AI.name: Nile
Descriptive AI.description: Nile is an AI platform specializing in networking architecture and wired and wireless LAN services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Nile is disrupting the enterprise network market by modernizing IT operations with a new AI networking architecture, delivering enterprise networks entirely as a service. For the first time in the industry, its Nile Access Service integrates zero trust security and offers performance guarantees. With Nile, IT organizations close the gap between their digital aspirations and legacy realities, reduce their total cost of ownership by more than 60%, and recover critical IT resources while their users gain superior connectivity. For more information, visit nilesecure.com/journey.

Descriptive AI.name: Notable
Descriptive AI.description: Notable is the AI platform for healthcare operations.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Notable is the AI platform for healthcare operations. Deployed at over 10,000 sites of care, Notable automates over a million repetitive workflows every day across Registration and Intake, Scheduling and Referrals, Assistant, Authorizations, Care Gap Closure, and HCC Chart Review. The result: personalized, streamlined care for patients, the elimination of burdensome manual work for caregivers, and improved financial health for healthcare providers.

Descriptive AI.name: Ocrolus
Descriptive AI.description: Ocrolus is an AI-powered data and analytics platform that enables faster and more accurate financial decision-making.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Ocrolus is an AI-powered data and analytics platform that enables financial institutions to make faster, more accurate decisions. We automate underwriting workflows across small business, mortgage, and consumer lending, delivering a best-in-class solution for analyzing financial documents. Our platform classifies documents, extracts key data, detects fraud, and delivers comprehensive cash flow and income analysis—all with exceptional precision and reliability. With Ocrolus, lenders can streamline the borrower experience, scale operations efficiently, and manage risk with greater confidence.

Descriptive AI.name: Omni
Descriptive AI.description: Omni is a business intelligence platform that combines the reliability of a unified data model with the flexibility of SQL.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Omni is the only BI platform that combines the consistency of a shared data model with the freedom of SQL. The company aims to enhance business intelligence, making it faster, and flexible while avoiding unnecessary complexity. With Omni no need to compromise. Omni balances the consistency of a shared data model with the freedom of SQL, so you can focus on answering your most important questions and driving business impact with data.

Descriptive AI.name: OpenRouter
Descriptive AI.description: OpenRouter is a platform that connects AI applications with large language models and cloud hosting providers.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OpenRouter is a platform that connects AI applications with large language models and cloud hosting providers, allowing users to optimize for costs, speed, and performance.  The platform supports over 180 AI models, offers a unified API, and includes functionalities like private chat and exploratory data capabilities. OpenRouter sets the new benchmark for large-scale AI inference with its global edge infrastructure, privacy-focused design, real-time accounting, and integrated billing.

Descriptive AI.name: OpenSpace
Descriptive AI.description: OpenSpace develops an AI-driven photo documentation tool that automatically creates navigable photo representations of job sites.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: OpenSpace develops an automated 360 video job site capture and mapping.  Its construction photo documentation software captures images every half-second and automatically ties them to project plans. The company was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

Descriptive AI.name: Overjet
Descriptive AI.description: Overjet is a software development company that offers an AI platform for dentistry with precision and educates patients.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Overjet is the world leader in dental AI. Founded by experts from MIT and Harvard University, Overjet builds artificial intelligence that helps dental organizations give patients the highest quality of care. Our FDA-cleared technology is the first objective standard for making oral health decisions — so that dentists can detect pathologies with precision and educate patients with confidence. To learn more, visit Overjet.com.

Descriptive AI.name: Overtime
Descriptive AI.description: Overtime is a sports network that produces several sports-focused series and short-form content for the next generation of sports fans.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Overtime is a sports network for the next generation of sports fans. It produces original content across YouTube, Snapchat, and IGTV, as well as highly engaging short-form content on Instagram and TikTok. Based in NYC, Overtime is funded by top VC firms like Andreessen Horowitz and Greycroft Ventures as well as industry leaders like Kevin Durant and former NBA Commissioner David Stern.

Descriptive AI.name: Parallel
Descriptive AI.description: Parallel develops systems for AIs to efficiently interact with the web.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Parallel is a technology company focused on adapting the web for artificial intelligences. It builds retrieval, ranking, and reasoning systems that enable AIs to perform high-value tasks using web data. The company's initial offering is an API designed to facilitate these interactions, enhancing the capabilities of advanced AIs.

Descriptive AI.name: Photoroom
Descriptive AI.description: Photoroom is an AI-enabled image capturing app that offers image retouching, background removal, and batch editing services.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Photoroom is an AI-enabled image capturing app that lets users create studio-quality product pictures in seconds. The company offers to remove background, change the background, and showcase products in one click on iPhone and iPad for free, helping users to easily make changes to their images.

Descriptive AI.name: PhysicsX
Descriptive AI.description: PhysicsX offers an AI-native simulation software stack for engineering and manufacturing across advanced industries.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: PhysicsX is a physical AI company on a mission to accelerate innovation and overhaul what engineering and manufacturing look like today. The company is building a new software stack to deliver deep AI enablement across the entire engineering lifecycle. PhysicsX partners with leading organizations in aerospace & defense, automotive, semiconductors, materials, and energy, supporting them on some of their most critical and complex challenges. PhysicsX is headquartered in the United Kingdom, with offices in London and New York.

Descriptive AI.name: Pinecone
Descriptive AI.description: Pinecone develops a vector database that makes it easy to connect company data with generative AI models.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Pinecone develops a vector database that makes it easy to connect company data with generative AI models. It combines vector search libraries, features such as filtering, and distribution infrastructure to provide reliability at any scale.

Descriptive AI.name: Pixellot
Descriptive AI.description: Pixellot develops AI-based automatic video and analytics solutions for the semi-professional sports market.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Pixellot is a leading sport media company that offers automatic production solutions for the amateur and semi-professional market. Pixellot’s patented technology streamlines the production workflow by deploying an unmanned multi-camera system that covers the entire field. Advanced algorithms enable dynamic coverage of the flow of play and highlight generation. The company streams more than 11,000 live video hours each month to fans, players, and coaches on a variety of platforms. Founded in 2014 by seasoned video and media technology experts, Pixellot has sold over 2,000 systems around the world, deployed with minor leagues, high schools, as well as at youth academies and top league clubs.   Pixellot’s partners include ESPN, PlayOn Sports, the US’ biggest high school sports media company and right holder, Sporttotal.tv, Germany’s  largest amateur league media platform, global coaching solution provider STATS, SeeUPlay in Mexico and Hockey TV, North America’s largest non-NHL ice hockey streaming platform. The company also works directly with leading clubs such as Bayern Munich, Spain’s Real Sociedad, Dutch AZ Alkmaar and Maccabi Tel-Aviv.

Descriptive AI.name: PolyAI
Descriptive AI.description: PolyAI develops conversational artificial intelligence software that enables organizations to automate customer service interactions.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: PolyAI develops conversational artificial intelligence software that enables organizations to automate customer service interactions through voice-based virtual agents. The company provides a platform that uses natural language understanding to handle inbound phone conversations, answer questions, complete tasks, and route calls based on customer intent. Its technology integrates with existing contact center systems and business tools to support order management, account inquiries, bookings, and issue resolution. PolyAI also offers tools for conversation design, testing, deployment, and performance monitoring to help teams manage and update voice interactions over time. The platform supports multiple languages and accents and is designed to operate continuously while collecting structured data from conversations for analysis and operational improvement.

Descriptive AI.name: Port
Descriptive AI.description: Port is an agentic engineering platform enabling the software industry to transition from manual workflows to autonomous engineering.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Port is a software platform that provides an internal developer portal solution supporting software engineering workflows and operations for engineering teams. It offers tools to centralize engineering data, model a unified software catalog, and automate routine actions such as provisioning resources or responding to incidents through configurable workflows and AI-enabled interactions. The platform integrates with existing development tools and systems to give teams a consistent source of truth for services, metrics, and processes, and makes contextual information accessible via interfaces and natural language queries. Port also includes mechanisms for monitoring engineering performance indicators and managing access controls across development environments. The company maintains documentation, support resources, and AI assistance features to help users implement and troubleshoot portal configurations.

Descriptive AI.name: Profluent Bio
Descriptive AI.description: Profluent Bio is an AI-first protein design company creating new proteins and gene-editing tools for medicine, agriculture, and science.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Profluent Bio is an AI-first protein design company that designs novel, optimal proteins that bypass existing barriers in industry.

Descriptive AI.name: Pryon
Descriptive AI.description: Pryon is an enterprise knowledge management platform designed to simplify and accelerate the adoption of artificial intelligence.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Pryon is an artificial intelligence company focused on enterprise knowledge management. Its natural language processing platform transforms unstructured data into experiences that increase productivity with unmatched accuracy and speed. Pryon’s automated machine learning engines deliver rapid time to value by enriching existing content. This no-code approach prevents operational disruption and allows organizations to quickly maximize the business value trapped within their information assets. Pryon was founded by Igor Jablokov, whose previous company defined the state of the art for AI assistants and was acquired by Amazon to form the basis for Alexa.

Descriptive AI.name: Reducto
Descriptive AI.description: Reducto is an AI-driven API that specializes in converting unstructured documents like PDFs and images into structured data.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Reducto is a company that specializes in converting complex documents into AI-ready inputs, leveraging state-of-the-art vision models developed by a team from MIT. The technology enables AI teams to process unstructured data, such as medical records and financial statements, with high accuracy and reliability. These models read documents in a way that mimics human understanding, addressing a critical bottleneck in AI workflows. Reducto’s solutions are designed to support the processing of sensitive documents, ensuring that AI systems can handle such data in production environments with precision. The company focuses on making it easier for organizations to work with unstructured data, improving the efficiency and effectiveness of their AI systems.

Descriptive AI.name: Reevo
Descriptive AI.description: Reevo is an AI-native revenue operating system that integrates marketing, sales, and customer success into a unified platform.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Reevo offers an integrated sales platform that supports go-to-market teams through every stage of the revenue process, from prospecting and outreach to deal closing and post-sale management. It enables users to source and enrich target accounts, run multi-channel sequences, handle email deliverability and dialing, capture meeting recordings and insights, and manage pipelines and forecasts all within a unified interface. Reevo also embeds native AI tools that surface next steps, draft follow-ups, and provide contextual insights across customer interactions so that sales activity is tied directly to meaningful outcomes.

Descriptive AI.name: Rillet
Descriptive AI.description: Rillet is an AI-native ERP platform that automates accounting for complex revenue models.
Descriptive AI.fullDescription: Rillet is an AI-native ERP that automates accounting for complex revenue models, allowing for fast book closings and providing a reliable source of truth.
