Their primary focus is to enable a permissionless, transparent, and fair ecosystem for MEV extraction and redistribution..

Blockchain.name: Forte
Blockchain.description: Forte is an economic technology for games that powers NFTs and rich token economies.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Forte is building economic technology for games that is secure, easy to use, and fully compliant. Its end-to-end blockchain platform enables the emergence of community economics, a system where the interests of game developers and players are aligned, leading to healthier, sustainable game communities. The team is composed of longtime industry members (Unity, ngmoco, Riot Games, Electronic Arts, Sony, and Rockstar Games, among others), and is currently working with over 25 acclaimed game developers from across the globe to reimagine the economics of games.

Blockchain.name: Gauntlet
Blockchain.description: Gauntlet is a fintech company that develops solutions for risk management and simplifies tasks in cryptocurrency businesses.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Gauntlet’s applied research and optimization teams model market risk, and economic incentives, and drive sustainable growth for crypto’s top protocols, chains, and on-chain treasuries. It simulates risk parameters and maximizes returns. Gauntlet maximizes protocol growth efficiency and improves financial growth for businesses.

Blockchain.name: Genies
Blockchain.description: Genies is an Avatar Technology Company creating an avatar experiences for their users.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Genies is culture’s leading avatar technology company empowering humans to create their own avatar experiences. To-date, Genies has been widely adopted by cultural tastemakers and has partnerships with Universal Music Group and Warner Music Group as their rosters’ “official avatar.” Genies has recently launched its consumer arm via its AR Developer Kit which allows developers to create interoperable avatar experiences for mobile and hardware AR. Their first avatar experience, Silver Studio, allows users to design and exchange digital fashion. Genies has raised $250M from investors such as  Silver Lake, BOND, NEA, and Bob Iger valuing the company at $1 billion.

Blockchain.name: GeoComply
Blockchain.description: GeoComply provides fraud prevention & advanced geolocation solutions to detect location fraud & help verify a user's true digital identity.
Blockchain.fullDescription: GeoComply is an advanced compliance and anti-fraud solution that brings clarity to the digital ecosystem and all suspicious activity. The build people-centered solutions and aim to make the internet safer for all. Their products include geocomply core, pinpoint, geocomply chargeback integrator, idcomply, geoguard, zipgeo, and more.

Blockchain.name: Helium
Blockchain.description: Helium is an internet-of-things developer platform for building the network and transferring IoT device data.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Helium is an internet-of-things developer platform for building the network and transferring IoT device data. The platform builds the peer-to-peer wireless network to simplify connecting anything to the internet by rewarding anyone to become a network operator. It provides wireless coverage for low-power Internet of Things (IoT) devices and earns a new cryptocurrency, Helium, from your living room. Helium tokens by verifying network transactions, adding new blocks to the blockchain, and performing other tasks. The Proof-of-Coverage is a unique work algorithm that uses radio waves to validate that hotspots are providing legitimate wireless coverage.

Blockchain.name: Humanity Protocol
Blockchain.description: Humanity Protocol provide developers with unique-human authentication mechanisms.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Humanity Protocol is developing Proof of Humanity, a novel feature designed to provide developers with unique-human authentication mechanisms and give users complete ownership over their data and identity.

Blockchain.name: Hyperchain Technology
Blockchain.description: Hyperchain Technology is a global leader in blockchain-powered digital infrastructure.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Hyperchain Technology is a global leader in blockchain-powered digital infrastructure, dedicated to delivering secure, scalable, and intelligent solutions across industries. With deep expertise in blockchain, privacy computing, artificial intelligence (AI), and data security, we empower enterprises and public sectors to build trusted digital ecosystems that enhance efficiency, security, and interoperability. As China’s first blockchain unicorn, Hyperchain has enabled large-scale digital transformation for over 300 leading enterprises across key industries, including finance, energy, public services, supply chain, healthcare and more. Our technologies drive secure data exchange, AI-powered analytics, and privacy-preserving computations, ensuring that businesses and governments can operate with confidence in the digital era. Hyperchain is a global force in next-generation technology standardization, leading and contributing to the development of 80+ international standards, 20 national standards in China, and over 100 industry standards. With nearly 900 technology-related patents and 200 software copyrights, we hold a strategic leadership position in core technology innovation and regulatory framework development across blockchain, privacy computing, AI and secure digital infrastructure. Hyperchain has played a privital role in shaping China’s next-generation technology research landscape. We spearheaded the establishment of China’s first blockchain-focused national key laboratory—the National Key Laboratory of Blockchain and Data Security at Zhejiang University—and led the creation of the Zhejiang Institute of Blockchain Technology and the Chongqing Academy of Advanced Blockchain. Through deep collaborations with 60+ top universities, research institutions, enterprises, and government agencies, we continue to drive secure, intelligent digital infrastructure innovation.   Our impact has been widely recognized by global institutions and industry leaders. Hyperchain was selected as a Top 25 Finalist for the 2024 World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) Global Awards and has been featured in: Forbes’s Top 50 Most Innovative Enterprises in Blockchain Globally IDC Leader in China’s BaaS Platform IDC FinTech Fast 101 Fortune Impact Initiative 2023 Deloitte Top 50 High-Tech High-Growth Enterprises  KPMG’s Top 50 Leading Financial Technology Enterprises … along with numerous other prestigious accolades. By bridging cutting-edge research with real-world applications, Hyperchain is at the forefront of industry-wide digital transformation, promoting sustainable development and accelerating the evolution of next-generation digital ecosystems.

Blockchain.name: Immutable Systems
Blockchain.description: Immutable is a blockchain-based games platform that aims to introduce people to blockchain technology.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Immutable develops blockchain-based eSport games designed to familiarize users with blockchain technology in a fun and user-friendly environment. Its eSports games use ethereum blockchain to transform digital asset ownership in the video-gaming industry. Immutable provides scalable blockchain infrastructure for video games, enabling organizations to bring transparency in the opaque world of in-game economies.

Blockchain.name: Injective
Blockchain.description: Injective is the blockchain built for finance. It is an open, interoperable network for applications shaping the future of DeFi.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Injective Labs is a key contributor to Injective, the blockchain designed specifically for finance. Injective is an open, interoperable network that provides solutions for DeFi developers in a unique way. Injective, which is Cosmos IBC and Ethereum compatible, is a hub for dApps shaping the future of finance. Injective-based applications benefit from zero gas fees, secure transactions, and fast transmissions for dynamic scalability. The company aims to create a truly free and inclusive financial system through decentralization.

Blockchain.name: iTrustCapital Inc.
Blockchain.description: iTrustCapital is a digital asset investment platform to buy and sell Cryptocurrencies and Physical Gold real-time.
Blockchain.fullDescription: iTrustCapital is a digital asset investment platform that allows clients to buy and sell Cryptocurrencies and precious metals real-time, 24/7, through their retirement accounts. The service addresses approximately $1 Trillion + of capital that's held by investors who trade these assets outside of tax-advantaged accounts.  An estimated 10-15 million Americans invest in cryptocurrencies and millions more in precious metals. While other IRA services charge as much as 15% for a single transaction, iTrust's transaction fee is just 1%. As part of the service, iTrust provides IRA maintenance and institutional-grade secure storage.

Blockchain.name: Kraken
Blockchain.description: Kraken is a cryptocurrency exchange platform that provides parachain auctions, staking, and index services.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Kraken is a digital asset exchange and related services provider that enables users to buy, sell, trade, stake, and store cryptocurrencies. It offers spot trading, futures, margin trading indexes, over-the-counter (OTC) execution, and a multi-chain wallet. Kraken supports a large number of cryptocurrencies and fiat currency pairs, and it provides tools for both retail users and institutional clients. It also offers advanced order types, real-time market data, account management services, and resources for learning about blockchain and digital assets.

Blockchain.name: KuCoin
Blockchain.description: KuCoin is a cryptocurrency exchange that facilitates trading and investing in digital assets.
Blockchain.fullDescription: KuCoin offers a comprehensive platform for buying, trading, and earning cryptocurrencies, catering to a global user base. The exchange provides various services, including spot trading, margin trading, and crypto derivatives, to help users maximize their investment potential.

Blockchain.name: LayerZero Labs
Blockchain.description: LayerZero Labs is a blockchain messaging protocol developer that allows decentralized applications build across multiple blockchains.
Blockchain.fullDescription: LayerZero Labs is a blockchain messaging protocol developer that allows decentralized applications build across multiple blockchains. The company is a User Application (UA) configurable on-chain endpoint that runs a ULN.

Blockchain.name: Lead
Blockchain.description: Lead is a Banking as a Service platform providing financial solutions for individuals, businesses, and fintech companies.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Lead is a bank that provides financial services for individuals and businesses. It also operates a Banking-as-a-Service platform that helps fintech companies build their own banking products. The platform offers solutions including lending, transfers, cards, and accounts for partners.

Blockchain.name: Ledger
Blockchain.description: Ledger provides security and infrastructure solutions to critical digital assets for consumers and institutional investors.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Ledger develops security and infrastructure solutions for cryptocurrencies as well as blockchain applications for individuals and companies, by leveraging a distinctive, proprietary technology. Launched in 2014, Ledger has designed an acclaimed line of hardware security devices quickly placing the company as a leader in the market with 1,000,000 units sold in more than 165 countries. For enterprises and corporations, Ledger introduced the Vault: a fully managed SaaS solution addressing the need to safeguard a very large amount of multiple cryptocurrencies while mitigating both IT and physical assault threats. The company is also active in the industrial IoT market, leveraging its secure hardware technology to interface sensors and machines to smart contracts or blockchain-based assets. Ledger is headquartered in Paris, has a production facility in Vierzon (France), and offices in San Francisco.

Blockchain.name: Lighter
Blockchain.description: Lighter is a software company that builds financial applications.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Lighter develops software focused on financial applications. It designs tools to support financial tasks and processes. The company creates solutions for various financial needs. Its products aim to streamline financial activities. Lighter specializes in software development for finance.

Blockchain.name: Lukka
Blockchain.description: Lukka provides enterprise data and software solutions for managing crypto assets and blockchain data.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Lukka specializes in managing and processing complex blockchain and cryptocurrency data, making it accessible and useful for businesses. The company focuses on financial applications, offering tools for accounting, auditing, tax reporting, and compliance within the digital asset space. Its products include LukkaTax, a software solution designed to simplify tax calculations and compliance for individuals and businesses dealing with cryptocurrencies. LukkaCrypto Office serves as a back-office solution for managing crypto assets, providing features such as pricing, valuation, and reporting. Additionally, Lukka Reference Data offers normalized data for crypto assets, ensuring consistency and accuracy for enterprise applications.

Blockchain.name: Magic Eden
Blockchain.description: Magic Eden is an NFT marketplace for users to discover, trade, and create NFTs.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Magic Eden is a community-centric company. They work hard to be responsive, close to the ground, and in service to the best interests of their collections. To prove their commitment to the community, they airdropped Magic Tickets, their own collection, to over 30,000 users. Holding a Magic Ticket gives holders access to their discord-based DAO, MagicDAO, where they deliver interconnectivity via social programs and rewards to the community.

Blockchain.name: MasterClass
Blockchain.description: MasterClass is a provider of an online education platform designed to offer video based vocational courses.
Blockchain.fullDescription: MasterClass is the streaming platform where anyone can learn. It offers a wide range of subjects, including arts and entertainment, business, design and style, sports and gaming, writing, and more.

Blockchain.name: Matrixport
Blockchain.description: Matrixport is a digital assets financial services platform where users can invest, trade, and leverage crypto assets.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Matrixport is a one-stop digital assets financial services platform where users can invest, trade, and leverage crypto assets.

Blockchain.name: Mesh
Blockchain.description: Mesh is a global crypto payments network that enables easy payment across hundreds of exchanges, wallets, and providers
Blockchain.fullDescription: Mesh Pay is a payment infrastructure platform that enables businesses to accept and send digital assets and cryptocurrency transactions through a single integration. It supports connectivity with hundreds of wallets and exchanges, and processes payments, deposits, verification,s and global payouts, settling funds in stablecoins or local currency to reduce volatility risk and increase completion rates. The platform includes SmartFunding™, which orchestrates funding from multiple sources to streamline checkout and payout processes, and offers real-time address validation and settlement features. Mesh Pay also provides programmable wallet capabilities for autonomous commerce and routes funds securely across wallets, banks and exchanges.

Blockchain.name: MobileCoin
Blockchain.description: MobileCoin is a cryptocurrency platform that provides anti-fraud services and payment systems for merchants.
Blockchain.fullDescription: MobileCoin is a cryptocurrency platform that develops P2P payment tokens and digital payment systems for mobile. It combines privacy, security, and distributed trust with a great user experience. MobileCoin is designed so that a mobile messaging application like WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, or Signal could integrate with a MobileCoin wallet.

Blockchain.name: Monad
Blockchain.description: Monad develops a blockchain protocol that streamlines Ethereum throughput via parallel transaction processing techniques.
Blockchain.fullDescription: MONAD is a proof-of-stake (PoS) blockchain and decentralized computation platform that combines the best of performance and portability.

Blockchain.name: MoonPay
Blockchain.description: MoonPay is a fintech company providing payment infrastructure for converting fiat currencies into cryptocurrencies and NFTs.
Blockchain.fullDescription: MoonPay, founded by Ivan Soto-Wright & Victor Faramond, is a financial technology company that specializes in providing payment infrastructure that facilitates the seamless conversion between fiat currencies and cryptocurrencies.  MoonPay's platform enables users to purchase cryptocurrencies and non-fungible tokens (NFTs) using various payment methods, including credit and debit cards, local bank transfers, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. The company operates on a non-custodial model, meaning it does not hold customer funds, thereby granting users greater control over their digital assets.

Blockchain.name: MSquared
Blockchain.description: MSquared develops a network that allows metaverses to be used together.
Blockchain.fullDescription: MSquared (M²) develops a network that allows metaverses to be used together. It uses blockchain and cryptocurrency to connect digital assets to various organizations. MSquared is based in London, United Kingdom.

Blockchain.name: Multichain
Blockchain.description: Multichain is a cross-chain router protocol (CRP) providing a mature real-time CRP system.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Multichain is a cross-chain router protocol (CRP) providing a mature real-time CRP system.

Blockchain.name: Mysten Labs
Blockchain.description: Mysten Labs develops tools that make web3 secure, reliable, and ready for mass adoption.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Mysten Labs develops tools that make web3 secure and ready for mass adoption. They create foundational infrastructure to accelerate the adoption of web3.

Blockchain.name: Mythical Games
Blockchain.description: Mythical Games develops video games and a platform enabling true ownership of in-game items.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Mythical Games develops and publishes blockchain-enhanced video games, focusing on providing players with true ownership of in-game assets. The company offers the Mythical Platform, a comprehensive solution that helps developers integrate a secondary economy into their games. The platform uses the MYTH token and the Mythos Chain to facilitate secure transactions within the digital ecosystem.

Blockchain.name: ZYBER 365
Blockchain.description: ZYBER 365 develops a sustainable AI chain for a cyber-secure Web3 OS.
Blockchain.fullDescription: ZYBER 365 develops a sustainable AI chain for a cyber-secure Web3 OS. They provide an operating system that is reliable, decentralized, safe online, and adheres to the core values of environmental sustainability.

Blockchain.name: zerohash
Blockchain.description: zerohash makes it effortless to bring your business on-chain.
Blockchain.fullDescription: zerohash is the leading infrastructure provider for crypto, stablecoin, and tokenized assets. zerohash provides regulatory-compliant infrastructure that can be embedded into any app, platform or wallet, allowing clients to innovate quickly and thoughtfully. zerohash’s API and embeddable dev-kit enables innovators to easily launch solutions across trading, cross-border payments, commerce, remittance, payroll and tokenization.

Blockchain.name: Zama
Blockchain.description: Zama brings confidentiality to public blockchains
Blockchain.fullDescription: Zama is a cryptography company building open source FHE solutions. Their flagship Zama Protocol enables confidential applications on top of any L1 or L2, unlocking use cases across confidential payments, tokenization, finance and network states.

Blockchain.name: Yuga Labs
Blockchain.description: Yuga Labs is a blockchain technology company that develops NFTs and digital collectibles.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Yuga Labs is a blockchain technology company that develops NFTs and digital collectibles. It specializes in the fields of blockchain, cryptocurrency, and digital media. Yuga Labs was founded in 2021 by Wylie Aronow and Greg Solano and headquartered in Miami, Florida.

Blockchain.name: Wormhole
Blockchain.description: Wormhole is a generic cross-chain messaging protocol platform that can use data, assets, and messages from other chains.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Wormhole covers a range of use cases to make chains for tokens, NFTs, apps, and other generic messaging applications. They build protocols on wormholes that can use data, assets, and messages from other chains.

Blockchain.name: TRM Labs
Blockchain.description: TRM Labs is a software company that offers blockchain, transaction monitoring, and analytics to help financial institutions and governments.
Blockchain.fullDescription: TRM Labs is a blockchain intelligence company that helps financial institutions, crypto businesses, and government agencies detect and investigate crypto-related financial crime and fraud. Our products are trusted by leading companies including PayPal, Visa, FTX, Uniswap, Anchorage, and federal agencies such as the FBI and IRS. Every day, we tackle challenges in data engineering, data science, and threat intelligence to advance our mission to build a safer financial system for billions of people. To accomplish our mission, we have raised over $79M from JPMorgan Chase, Visa, Citi, PayPal, Block, Tiger Global, and Bessemer. Our team is made up of world class experts from the FBI, U.S. Secret Service, US Treasury Department, McKinsey, Coinbase, and top-tier tech companies. TRM is a remote-first workplace, with hubs in San Francisco, Washington, DC, and London.

Blockchain.name: Trade Republic
Blockchain.description: Trade Republic helps Europeans for wealth creation through easy, secure, and free access to financial markets.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Trade Republic is a mobile-only and commission-free broker that brings the opportunity to invest easily. The company works as a broker for a new generation for a more mobile, more intuitive, faster - and permanently free of commission. Trade Republic was founded in 2015 and based in Berlin, Germany.

Blockchain.name: Tools For Humanity
Blockchain.description: Tools for Humanity is a technology company building for humans in the age of AI. Currently building tools for World.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Tools for Humanity is a technology company building for humans in the age of AI. The company is currently building the tools to bring blockchain and digital identity technologies and products to people by contributing to the development and growth of the World ecosystem and other projects.

Blockchain.name: The Open Platform
Blockchain.description: The Open Platform is a Web3 infrastructure company enabling crypto apps and payments within Telegram through its TON-based tools.
Blockchain.fullDescription: The Open Platform We are a venture studio focused on building and scaling Web3 startups for mass audiences from the ground up. We partner with exceptional founders, and share our extensive expertise in product development, marketing and design with the goal to reach an escape velocity together.

Blockchain.name: TaxBit
Blockchain.description: TaxBit is a cryptocurrency tax and accounting software that automates tax calculations and reporting on cryptocurrency transactions.
Blockchain.fullDescription: TaxBit is a cryptocurrency tax and accounting software that automates tax calculations and reports on cryptocurrency transactions. With TaxBit, users can link their exchanges and wallets to seamlessly pull their transactions through their tax engine and auto-generate tax forms. Aside from automating taxes, TaxBit provides crypto enthusiasts with real-time portfolio tracking and tax optimization visibility so that they can make tax-optimized crypto trades throughout the year. TaxBit connects the consumer and enterprise cryptocurrency tax experiences.

Blockchain.name: Talos
Blockchain.description: Talos is an end-to-end crypto trading platform that provides digital asset trading technology for lenders, brokers, and investors.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Talos Trading is an institutional technology infrastructure provider that connects all crypto ecosystem participants to support a full trading lifecycle. Talos Trading is based in New York, NY and was co-founded by Anton Katz and Ethan Feldman in 2018.

Blockchain.name: Sygnum
Blockchain.description: Sygnum is a digital asset banking group that enables professional and institutional investors to invest in digital assets.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Sygnum is an international digital asset banking organization, rooted in Swiss and Singaporean traditions. The company provides professional and institutional investors, banks, corporations, and DLT foundations with the means to invest in digital assets with utmost confidence. Sygnum's team facilitates this through our top-tier security, personalized expert service, and regulated services in digital asset banking, asset management, tokenization, and B2B offerings.

Blockchain.name: Story Protocol
Blockchain.description: Story Protocol is a creator of web3 technology that aims to change the way narrative universes are formed.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Story Protocol is a web3 technology developer whose goal is to change the way narrative universes are formed. The company's technology enables creators to develop a narrative plot with ownership and motivation by allowing them to create, control, and license intellectual property on-chain.

Blockchain.name: StockX
Blockchain.description: StockX is an online marketplace to buy and sell limited edition and high demand sneakers.
Blockchain.fullDescription: StockX operates a live bid/ask marketplace for buying and selling limited edition and high demand sneakers. Its marketplace enables users to anonymously buy and sell limited edition consumer products with stock market-like visibility. StockX’s platform allows users to create their own personalized sneaker portfolio by uploading their current collection and compare and contrast their sneaker collection to other users on the platform.  The company was founded in March 2015, with its headquarters in Detroit in Michigan.

Blockchain.name: StarkWare Industries
Blockchain.description: StarkWare Industries develops a full-proof stack in generating and verifying proofs of computational integrity in the blockchain.
Blockchain.fullDescription: StarkWare Industries uses Stark technology to develop a full proof stack in generating and verifying proofs of computational integrity.

Blockchain.name: Sorare
Blockchain.description: Sorare is a global fantasy football game where players can buy, trade, and play with official digital cards.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Sorare is a global fantasy football game where managers can trade official digital collectibles. It is on a mission to make crypto fun and accessible to all through fantasy football. Based in Paris, Sorare provides a soccer team management game with digital NFT cards that fans can collect and trade. Founded in December 2018, Sorare currently sold $1.8 million worth of cards in December 2020.

Blockchain.name: Sky Mavis
Blockchain.description: Sky Mavis is a technology company that creates decentralized applications and services.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Sky Mavis is a technology company that creates decentralized applications and services. They specialize in the fields of information technology, blockchain, video game, and more.

Blockchain.name: Scroll.io
Blockchain.description: Scroll.io provides a native zkEVM scaling solution for Ethereum.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Scroll.io provides a native zkEVM scaling solution for Ethereum. The company upholds the Ethereum network's high-security features while offering users nearly instantaneous, inexpensive transactions.

Blockchain.name: Ripple
Blockchain.description: Ripple is a provider of stablecoin-powered cross-border payments and digital asset custody solutions.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Ripple provides one frictionless experience to send money globally using the power of blockchain. It offers a global real-time payment system that enables banks and financial institutions around the world to directly transact with each other without the need for a central correspondent. The company also offers FX Market Making, a solution enabling enterprises to gain access to cross-currency liquidity through a distributed network that allows foreign exchange to be externally sourced from a competitive FX marketplace or an internal FX trading desk. This minimizes FX exposure thereby lowering the volatility and counter-party risk of trades. Ripple Insights features industry updates, insider perspectives, and in-depth market analysis.

Blockchain.name: RedotPay
Blockchain.description: RedotPay is a stablecoin-based payment fintech company that enables users to convert and pay with various cryptocurrencies.
Blockchain.fullDescription: RedotPay is a global fintech company that uses stablecoins to support payment and transfer services, integrating blockchain technology with traditional banking systems. The platform allows users to spend, send, and manage digital assets through a single interface designed for everyday financial transactions. RedotPay supports individuals without access to conventional banking by enabling stablecoin-based payments and transfers across borders. It also serves users who hold digital assets by providing tools that connect cryptocurrency use with common payment scenarios.

Blockchain.name: Rain
Blockchain.description: Rain is a fintech company that builds stablecoin-powered payment infrastructure, allowing businesses and individuals to use tokenized money.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Rain provides infrastructure for stablecoin-powered payments and financial products for businesses. The company builds APIs and tools that let partners create and manage digital wallets, embed stablecoin accounts, and issue payment cards that connect blockchain settlement with traditional payment networks like Visa. Its platform supports money-in and money-out flows, fiat-to-stablecoin conversion, and compliance features so enterprises and financial platforms can integrate digital money use cases directly into their products. Rain’s technology is modular, enabling firms to pick components such as card issuance, wallet services, and cross-border payouts based on their needs.

Blockchain.name: Public
Blockchain.description: Public is a fintech brokerage firm that offers commission-free trading for a variety of asset classes.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Public is the investing platform built for those who take it seriously—with technology that makes building a multi-asset portfolio, fast, frictionless, and secure. Members can invest in stocks, options, bonds, crypto, and contribute to retirement accounts —in the same place. Alongside the robust suite of investing tools, Public offers Alpha, a proprietary AI layer, that provides fundamental data and custom analysis to support informed investment decisions.

Blockchain.name: Polymarket
Blockchain.description: Polymarket is a prediction market platform where traders predict future event outcomes, reacting to news in real time.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Polymarket is a prediction market platform that allows users to bet on the outcomes of various global events using cryptocurrency. Polymarket operates on the Ethereum blockchain, utilizing the Polygon network to enhance scalability and reduce transaction costs. Users connect to the platform through an Ethereum-compatible wallet and use the USDC stablecoin to place bets on events, ranging from political outcomes to entertainment predictions​.

Blockchain.name: Polyhedra Network
Blockchain.description: Polyhedra Network is an infrastructure company that develops a Web3 infrastructure platform through zero-knowledge-proof protocols.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Polyhedra Network is an infrastructure company that develops a Web3 infrastructure platform using zero-knowledge-proof protocols. Its platform offers a bridge for cross-chain communication that allows developers to build secure and interoperable applications across layer-1 and layer-2 blockchains.

Blockchain.name: Polygon
Blockchain.description: Polygon is a platform for Ethereum scaling and infrastructure development.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Polygon is a platform for Ethereum scaling and infrastructure development and web3. Its growing suite of products offers developers easy access to all scaling and infrastructure solutions: L2 solutions (ZK Rollups and Optimistic Rollups), sidechains, hybrid solutions, stand-alone and enterprise chains, data availability solutions, and more. Polygon’s scaling solutions have seen widespread adoption with 7,000+ applications hosted, 1B+ total transactions processed, ~130M+ unique user addresses, and $5B+ in assets secured.

Blockchain.name: Phantom
Blockchain.description: Phantom is a crypto wallet that facilitates the buying, trading, and storing of cryptocurrencies, including NFTs and tokens.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Phantom is a digital wallet reimagined for DeFi and NFTs. Phantom is a multichain wallet that supports various applications and allows users to manage their crypto and NFT assets across multiple blockchain networks, particularly Solana. The Phantom wallet is accessible through various platforms including mobile and browser extensions, making it versatile for all users engaging with digital finance.

Blockchain.name: Paxos
Blockchain.description: Paxos is a regulated financial institution building infrastructure to enable movement between physical and digital assets.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Paxos is a regulated financial institution building infrastructure to enable movement between physical and digital assets. Paxos was founded in 2012 and headquartered in New York, United States.

Blockchain.name: PandaDoc
Blockchain.description: PandaDoc is the top-rated solution for creating, managing, tracking, and eSigning every important document you handle.
Blockchain.fullDescription: PandaDoc is committed to delivering transformative technology that simplifies the way companies of any size operate and win. We serve customers across hundreds of industries, but they all share a common goal: earning trust with every interaction. PandaDoc helps them do just that—by making agreements faster, clearer, and more transparent.

Blockchain.name: Optimism
Blockchain.description: Optimism is an Ethereum-based decentralized infrastructure platform that allows for instant transactions and scalable smart contracts.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Optimism is an Ethereum-based decentralized infrastructure platform that allows for instant transactions and scalable smart contracts. The company is a public benefit corporation, a for-profit corporation that is obligated to balance the financial interests of our stockholders with the best interests of our community and society. Optimism, which was founded in 2019 and is based in New York, provides an Ethereum layer 2 scaling solution to assist developers in building on the blockchain.

Blockchain.name: Opn
Blockchain.description: Opn is a full-featured payment management platform that focuses on providing fintech solutions and products to individuals and companies.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Opn, which was rebranded from SYNQA, is a company founded in 2013 with expertise in Asia. Opn specializes in online payment, blockchain technology for fintech applications and digital transformation solutions. Opn connects people, businesses and society in innovative ways that spread the wealth of financial opportunity and provide fair and open access to a growing economic ecosystem under its vision of enabling access to the digital economy for everyone. Opn is powered by its payment infrastructure sister company, Omise Payment Holdings, which provides one-stop online payment solutions. Its services are used by thousands of merchants and businesses around the world.

Blockchain.name: OpenSea
Blockchain.description: OpenSea is an NFT marketplace that enables users to discover, collect, and sell blockchain-based digital assets.
Blockchain.fullDescription: OpenSea is a peer-to-peer marketplace for crypto collectibles and non-fungible tokens. It includes collectibles, gaming items, and other virtual goods backed by a blockchain. On OpenSea, anyone can buy or sell these items through a smart contract.

Blockchain.name: Offchain Labs
Blockchain.description: Offchain Labs develops a solution for scaling Ethereum smart contracts.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Offchain Labs develops a solution for scaling Ethereum smart contracts.

Blockchain.name: NYDIG
Blockchain.description: NYDIG is a bitcoin company that provides technology and financial services to businesses in a broad range of industries.
Blockchain.fullDescription: NYDIG is a technology and financial services firm dedicated to Bitcoin for institutions, private clients, and banks. The firm offers asset management, derivatives, financing, custody, and execution services. NYDIG's platform satisfies the highest regulatory, audit, and governance standards.

Blockchain.name: Animoca Brands KK
Blockchain.description: Animoca Brands KK is a Web 3 enterprise that offers development of platforms utilizing blockchain technology and NFTs.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Animoca Brands KK supports the global strategy of Web3.0 for Japanese intellectual property and content (IP)  holders such as major publishers, brands, education, sports organizations, athletes, artists, and game companies. rice field. Animoca Brands KK builds and provides a platform that utilizes blockchain technology and provides a mechanism for IP / IP holders to have their own ecosystem in Web3.0 and issue NFTs and tokens within it.

Blockchain.name: Auradine
Blockchain.description: Auradine provides web infrastructure solutions encompassing blockchain, artificial intelligence, and privacy technologies.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Auradine is a web infrastructure platform intended to offer blockchain and AI infrastructure solutions. The company provides groundbreaking software, hardware, and cloud offerings to enable scalable, sustainable, and secure solutions and has a proven track record in security, SaaS, semiconductors, and systems.

Blockchain.name: Bitwise
Blockchain.description: Bitwise is a crypto-specialist asset manager for individuals, investment managers, and institutions navigating cryptocurrency.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Bitwise is a crypto-specialist asset manager for individuals, investment managers, and institutions navigating cryptocurrency. The company offers a suite of 32 investment solutions, including yield and alpha strategies, multi-strategy solutions, separately managed accounts, onchain staking, index funds, bitcoin ETPs, and more. By serving as a specialist partner, it enables clients to access the opportunities that meet their objectives.

Blockchain.name: C2x
Blockchain.description: C2x is a blockchain gaming platform that specializes in the development of web3 gaming architecture through decentralized finance.
Blockchain.fullDescription: C2x is a blockchain gaming platform.

Blockchain.name: Chia Network
Blockchain.description: Chia Network is building a blockchain platform based on Proofs of Space and Time.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Chia Network is building a blockchain based on proofs of space and time to make a cryptocurrency that is less wasteful, more decentralized, and more secure.

Blockchain.name: Doodles
Blockchain.description: Doodles is a web3 NFT, media, and entertainment brand.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Doodles is a web3 NFT, media, and entertainment brand. It specializes in offering a number of exciting traits with faces, hair, hats, body, and backgrounds made with imaginative ideas, adequate resources, and coordination. Doodles was founded in 2021.

Blockchain.name: Elixir
Blockchain.description: The global network behind deUSD, the gateway for institutional assets to enter DeFi. Powering instant liquidity for the onchain economy.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Elixir is the most widely adopted network for RWAs: bringing funds from BlackRock, Hamilton Lane, Apollo and others to DeFi. This is made possible by deUSD – a fully collateralized, yield-bearing synthetic dollar powered by the Elixir Network.

Blockchain.name: Elwood Technologies
Blockchain.description: Elwood is a leading fintech specialising in comprehensive digital asset trading, portfolio, and risk management software for institutions.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Elwood is a leading fintech firm specializing in comprehensive digital asset trading, portfolio, and risk management software for institutions. Its front-to-back solutions connect clients to global crypto exchanges, liquidity providers, custodians, and fund administrators while offering advanced execution management, portfolio analytics, and risk management tools. Built by industry experts with deep experience in traditional finance and digital technology, Elwood empowers financial institutions to navigate digital asset markets with efficiency, security, and confidence.

Blockchain.name: Hanhou Group
Blockchain.description: Hanhou Group focuses on blockchain technology, AI, cloud computing, digital twin, and in-house algorithms.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Hanhou Group focuses on blockchain technology, AI, cloud computing, digital twin, and in-house algorithms. It solves the problems of financial data tampering, untrustworthy data, insecure assets, and data islands in the development of the industrial Internet through distributed networking, cross-chain mode blockchain, data analysis, integration compatibility, and intelligent risk control to provide customers with credible, efficient, and data-flowable technical solutions.

Blockchain.name: KAST
Blockchain.description: KAST is a financial technology company that provides a global money platform that allows users to send, receive, and spend digital dollars.
Blockchain.fullDescription: KAST is a financial technology company that provides a global money platform built on stablecoin infrastructure, enabling users to send, receive, and spend digital dollars worldwide. The platform offers USD-denominated accounts, global payments, and debit cards, allowing individuals and businesses to move money to more than 190 countries and spend funds at millions of merchants and ATMs. Its services include international transfers, stablecoin deposits, and financial tools designed to make cross-border transactions faster and cheaper than traditional banking networks.

Blockchain.name: Midas
Blockchain.description: Midas is a regulated brokerage firm that offers investment services for equities, mutual funds, and cryptocurrencies.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Midas is a regulated brokerage firm that offers investment services for equities, mutual funds, and cryptocurrencies. It allows trading on U.S. exchanges while permanently eliminating all commissions and account-related charges, including clearing and custody fees. In addition, the platform provides real-time market data at no cost to its users.

Blockchain.name: Minterest
Blockchain.description: Dollar for dollar Minterest delivers the highest long-term yields in DeFi.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Minterest is a decentralised lending protocol which facilitates interest rate markets for token assets. It features a unique economic model where the protocol itself captures 100% of the fees generated from its functions, including interest, flash loan, and auto-liquidation fees. These fees are exchanged via automated buyback processes for its native MNT governance token which is then distributed to its users to reward them for their participation in the protocol’s governance. In doing so, Minterest delivers its users the highest long term yields in DeFi.

Blockchain.name: Nansen
Blockchain.description: Nansen is a blockchain analytics platform for crypto professionals and investors.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Nansen is a blockchain analytics platform that enriches on-chain data with millions of wallets labels. Crypto investors use Nansen to discover opportunities, perform due diligence and defend their portfolios with its real-time dashboards and alerts.

Blockchain.name: Nirvana
Blockchain.description: Nirvana is an AI-native financial infrastructure shaping the future of Agentic DeFi.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Nirvana is an AI-native financial infrastructure shaping the future of Agentic DeFi. - Redefining DeFi with AI Agents – Nirvana builds AI frameworks for DEFAI agents to maximize capital efficiency - AI-Native On-Chain Protocols – Empowering DEFAI agents with AI-native protocols to autonomously launch innovative financial instruments and optimize strategies

Blockchain.name: Npixel
Blockchain.description: Npixel is a computer game development company that aims to build a game ecosystem based on DAO such as blockchain-based projects and NFTs.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Npixel is a computer game development company that aims to build a game ecosystem based on DAO (Decentralized Autonomous Organization) such as blockchain-based projects and NFTs. Npixel was formed in September 2017 by a group of developers who previously worked on Seven Knights, a popular Netmarble mobile game. Its first game, Gran Saga, is scheduled for release in South Korea in the first half of 2020.

Blockchain.name: P0x Labs
Blockchain.description: P0x Labs is the team behind Manta Network is a privacy-preserving technology operating on the Polkadot blockchain.
Blockchain.fullDescription: P0x labs is the team behind Manta Network is a privacy-preserving technology operating on the Polkadot blockchain.

Blockchain.name: Parallel
Blockchain.description: Autonomous
Blockchain.fullDescription: Parallel is a Sci-Fi Card Game based on the Ethereum blockchain. Parallel is an application that provides users with the opportunity to purchase, collect, and showcase digital blockchain collectibles.

Blockchain.name: Plasma
Blockchain.description: Plasma is an operational setting that supports payments, real-world assets, and DeFi, with trustless settlement on Bitcoin.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Plasma is an operational setting that supports payments, real-world assets, and DeFi, with trustless settlement on Bitcoin.

Blockchain.name: Quicknode
Blockchain.description: #1 Blockchain Infrastructure Platform. Learn, Build, and Scale Onchain.
Blockchain.fullDescription: QuickNode is a blockchain infrastructure platform that supplies developers and enterprises with tools to build, scale, and maintain Web3 applications. It offers APIs and access endpoints (RPC/REST/WebSocket) across 60+ blockchains and 100+ networks, including full-node and archive-node options depending on the use case. The platform includes developer-friendly features such as Streams for real-time data delivery, Functions (serverless edge code) to respond to on-chain events and transform blockchain data without managing infrastructure, QuickAlerts / Webhooks for being notified of smart contract events, and a Marketplace of add-ons and tools to extend functionality.

Blockchain.name: Sardine
Blockchain.description: Sardine is a fraud prevention and compliance software company for the digital economy.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Sardine specializes in providing risk management solutions primarily for the financial services sector. They focus on using artificial intelligence and machine learning to help enterprises manage risks associated with fraud, credit, and compliance. The company aims to serve businesses in the digital economy by offering tools and services that enhance operational efficiency and ensure regulatory compliance.

Blockchain.name: Sei Labs
Blockchain.description: Sei Labs is the layer 1 blockchain uniquely optimized for DeFi DeFi
Blockchain.fullDescription: Sei Labs is a crypto startup.

Blockchain.name: Vivid
Blockchain.description: Vivid is a leading European financial platform for business that seamlessly integrates the management of personal and business finances.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Vivid is a leading European financial platform for businesses that seamlessly integrates the management of personal and business finances. Focused on SMEs, Vivid delivers cost-effective, scalable financial solutions with best-in-class pricing, market-leading interest rates on savings and advanced business tools. Founded in 2019 in Berlin by Alexander Emeshevand Artem Iamanov, Vivid has quickly grown into one of Germany’s top financial platforms for SMEs and private accounts. Backed by Greenoaks Capital and DST Global, the company is expanding across Europe setting new standards in how businesses bank.

Blockchain.name: Zora
Blockchain.description: Zora Labs is a marketplace for non-fungible tokens.
Blockchain.fullDescription: Zora Labs is a marketplace for non-fungible tokens. Its platform utilizes blockchain technology that offers secondary market value to digital files including photos, videos, audio, and music, and includes features such as drop alerts and notifications. Zora Labs was founded in 2020 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.

Quantum.name: IQM Quantum Computers
Quantum.description: IQM Quantum Computers builds superconducting full-stack quantum computer systems designed for research institutions and developers.
Quantum.fullDescription: IQM Quantum Computers builds and delivers superconducting full-stack quantum computer systems and cloud services designed for research institutions and developers. It offers several products including Spark, a compact 5-qubit system for academic use, Radiance, a scalable platform with configurations from 20 to 150 qubits, and Resonance, a managed cloud service that provides high-fidelity quantum processors with tools, algorithm libraries, and pulse-level programmability. The company develops hardware topologies such as Crystal and Star, which enhance connectivity and aim to support error-corrected, fault-tolerant computing through the integration of quantum error-correction codes. In addition, IQM provides developer-focused resources such as SDKs, multi-framework compatibility, and educational programs to facilitate quantum algorithm experimentation.

Quantum.name: Loop AI Group
Quantum.description: Enterprise AI agents powered by custom SLMs. Trained on your data. Running on your infrastructure. No vendor lock-in. Since 2012.
Quantum.fullDescription: From DARPA and SRI research to leading the AI revolution, since 2012 a journey of scientific rigor and bold innovation, Loop AI Group stands as a research-driven applied lab and the world’s first independent AI company.

Quantum.name: Xanadu
Quantum.description: Xanadu provides hardware, software, applications, and simulators for quantum computing.
Quantum.fullDescription: Since its founding in 2016, Xanadu has focused extensively on the effects quantum will have on society and how to best service those needs.  Xanadu's ultimate goal is to provide quantum on demand to enable significant computational improvements over the best classical methods to solve really tough real-world problems. Xanadu has amalgamated leading scientists and professionals to pair academic research with industry veterans to develop a massively scalable venture.

Quantum.name: SandboxAQ
Quantum.description: SandboxAQ develops AI and quantum technology solutions that enhance biopharma, cybersecurity, and materials science.
Quantum.fullDescription: SandboxAQ develops AI and quantum technology products aimed at solving complex challenges. The company integrates knowledge from various fields to create Large Quantitative Models and AI sensing applications. Its focus is on providing practical solutions in areas that require advanced computational techniques. The industries served include financial services, healthcare, and telecommunications.

Quantum.name: Quantinuum
Quantum.description: Quantinuum is a IT firm that accelerates quantum computing and the development of applications across chemistry, cybersecurity, and finance.
Quantum.fullDescription: Quantinuum is a quantum company dedicated to the advancement of quantum computers and the development of software solutions. Quantinuum's technology spearheads advancements in materials discovery, cybersecurity, and next-generation quantum AI. The company has nearly 500 professionals, including over 370 scientists and engineers, Quantinuum takes the helm in driving the quantum computing revolution globally.

Quantum.name: PsiQuantum
Quantum.description: PsiQuantum focuses on developing a scalable quantum computer using photonic qubits.
Quantum.fullDescription: PsiQuantum is building the first utility-scale quantum computer to solve some of the world’s most important challenges. PsiQuantum’s approach is based on photonic qubits, which have significant advantages at the scale required to deliver a fault-tolerant, general-purpose quantum computer. With quantum chips now being manufactured in a world-leading semiconductor fab, PsiQuantum is uniquely positioned to deliver quantum capabilities that will drive advances in climate, healthcare, finance, energy, agriculture, transportation, communications, and beyond.

Quantum.name: Origin Quantum
Quantum.description: Origin Quantum is a full-stack quantum computing company that delivers a quantum computing cloud service platform.
Quantum.fullDescription: Origin Quantum is a full-stack quantum computing company that delivers a quantum computing cloud service platform. It is concerned with the creation, promotion, and application of quantum computers. Quantum chips, quantum measurement and control systems, quantum software (content computer software and various quantum algorithm software), quantum cloud services, and quantum artificial intelligence are all part of its business scope. It allows quantum computing to truly serve humankind outside of laboratories. Origin Quantum was established in 2017 and is based in China.

Quantum.name: Quantum Machines
Quantum.description: Quantum Machines is a leading provider of quantum control solutions, powering quantum-classical integration at scale with Hybrid Control.
Quantum.fullDescription: Quantum Machines (QM) is a leading provider of quantum control solutions, driving the advancement of quantum computing with its Hybrid Control approach. By harmonizing quantum and classical operations, Hybrid Control eliminates friction and optimizes performance across hardware and software, enabling researchers and builders to iterate at speed, resolve setbacks, and bring visionary ideas to life. Its platform supports any type of quantum processor, empowering the industry to scale systems, accelerate breakthroughs, and push the boundaries – previously impossible.
